---
name: using-superpowers
description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
---

<SUBAGENT-STOP>
If you were dispatched as a subagent to execute a specific task, skip this skill.
</SUBAGENT-STOP>

<EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>
If you think there is even a 1% chance a skill might apply to what you are doing, you ABSOLUTELY MUST invoke the skill.

IF A SKILL APPLIES TO YOUR TASK, YOU DO NOT HAVE A CHOICE. YOU MUST USE IT.

This is not negotiable. This is not optional. You cannot rationalize your way out of this.
</EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT>

## Instruction Priority

Superpowers skills override default system prompt behavior, but **user instructions always take precedence**:

1. **User's explicit instructions** (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, AGENTS.md, direct requests) йҲҘ?highest priority
2. **Superpowers skills** йҲҘ?override default system behavior where they conflict
3. **Default system prompt** йҲҘ?lowest priority

If CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md, or AGENTS.md says "don't use TDD" and a skill says "always use TDD," follow the user's instructions. The user is in control.

## How to Access Skills

**In Claude Code:** Use the `Skill` tool. When you invoke a skill, its content is loaded and presented to youйҲҘж”Ҷollow it directly. Never use the Read tool on skill files.

**In Gemini CLI:** Skills activate via the `activate_skill` tool. Gemini loads skill metadata at session start and activates the full content on demand.

**In other environments:** Check your platform's documentation for how skills are loaded.

## Platform Adaptation

Skills use Claude Code tool names. Non-CC platforms: see `references/codex-tools.md` (Codex) for tool equivalents. Gemini CLI users get the tool mapping loaded automatically via GEMINI.md.

# Using Skills

## The Rule

**Invoke relevant or requested skills BEFORE any response or action.** Even a 1% chance a skill might apply means that you should invoke the skill to check. If an invoked skill turns out to be wrong for the situation, you don't need to use it.

```dot
digraph skill_flow {
    "User message received" [shape=doublecircle];
    "About to EnterPlanMode?" [shape=doublecircle];
    "Already brainstormed?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" [shape=box];
    "Might any skill apply?" [shape=diamond];
    "Invoke Skill tool" [shape=box];
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" [shape=box];
    "Has checklist?" [shape=diamond];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [shape=box];
    "Follow skill exactly" [shape=box];
    "Respond (including clarifications)" [shape=doublecircle];

    "About to EnterPlanMode?" -> "Already brainstormed?";
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Invoke brainstorming skill" [label="no"];
    "Already brainstormed?" -> "Might any skill apply?" [label="yes"];
    "Invoke brainstorming skill" -> "Might any skill apply?";

    "User message received" -> "Might any skill apply?";
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Invoke Skill tool" [label="yes, even 1%"];
    "Might any skill apply?" -> "Respond (including clarifications)" [label="definitely not"];
    "Invoke Skill tool" -> "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'";
    "Announce: 'Using [skill] to [purpose]'" -> "Has checklist?";
    "Has checklist?" -> "Create TodoWrite todo per item" [label="yes"];
    "Has checklist?" -> "Follow skill exactly" [label="no"];
    "Create TodoWrite todo per item" -> "Follow skill exactly";
}
```

## Red Flags

These thoughts mean STOPйҲҘж”ңou're rationalizing:

| Thought | Reality |
|---------|---------|
| "This is just a simple question" | Questions are tasks. Check for skills. |
| "I need more context first" | Skill check comes BEFORE clarifying questions. |
| "Let me explore the codebase first" | Skills tell you HOW to explore. Check first. |
| "I can check git/files quickly" | Files lack conversation context. Check for skills. |
| "Let me gather information first" | Skills tell you HOW to gather information. |
| "This doesn't need a formal skill" | If a skill exists, use it. |
| "I remember this skill" | Skills evolve. Read current version. |
| "This doesn't count as a task" | Action = task. Check for skills. |
| "The skill is overkill" | Simple things become complex. Use it. |
| "I'll just do this one thing first" | Check BEFORE doing anything. |
| "This feels productive" | Undisciplined action wastes time. Skills prevent this. |
| "I know what that means" | Knowing the concept йҲ®?using the skill. Invoke it. |

## Skill Priority

When multiple skills could apply, use this order:

1. **Process skills first** (brainstorming, debugging) - these determine HOW to approach the task
2. **Implementation skills second** (frontend-design, mcp-builder) - these guide execution

"Let's build X" йҲ«?brainstorming first, then implementation skills.
"Fix this bug" йҲ«?debugging first, then domain-specific skills.

## Skill Types

**Rigid** (TDD, debugging): Follow exactly. Don't adapt away discipline.

**Flexible** (patterns): Adapt principles to context.

The skill itself tells you which.

## User Instructions

Instructions say WHAT, not HOW. "Add X" or "Fix Y" doesn't mean skip workflows.

Output:
---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence йҲ®?evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter йҲ®?compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion йҲ®?excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
йүҒ?[Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
йүӮ?"Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
йүҒ?Write йҲ«?Run (pass) йҲ«?Revert fix йҲ«?Run (MUST FAIL) йҲ«?Restore йҲ«?Run (pass)
йүӮ?"I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
йүҒ?[Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
йүӮ?"Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
йүҒ?Re-read plan йҲ«?Create checklist йҲ«?Verify each йҲ«?Report gaps or completion
йүӮ?"Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
йүҒ?Agent reports success йҲ«?Check VCS diff йҲ«?Verify changes йҲ«?Report actual state
йүӮ?Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion йҲ«?redirect йҲ«?rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import os
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
import time
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict

import requests


def _wait_http(url: str, timeout_seconds: float) -> None:
    deadline = time.time() + timeout_seconds
    last_error: str = ""
    while time.time() < deadline:
        try:
            response = requests.get(url, timeout=1.5)
            if response.status_code == 200:
                return
            last_error = f"HTTP {response.status_code}"
        except Exception as exc:
            last_error = str(exc)
        time.sleep(0.4)
    raise RuntimeError(f"service not ready: {url}, last_error={last_error}")


def _post_json(url: str, payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    response = requests.post(url, json=payload, timeout=5.0)
    body = response.json() if response.content else {}
    if response.status_code >= 400:
        raise RuntimeError(f"POST {url} failed: status={response.status_code}, body={body}")
    if isinstance(body, dict):
        return body
    return {"data": body}


def _get_json(url: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    response = requests.get(url, timeout=5.0)
    body = response.json() if response.content else {}
    if response.status_code >= 400:
        raise RuntimeError(f"GET {url} failed: status={response.status_code}, body={body}")
    if isinstance(body, dict):
        return body
    return {"data": body}


def _terminate(proc: subprocess.Popen[Any]) -> None:
    if proc.poll() is not None:
        return
    proc.terminate()
    try:
        proc.wait(timeout=5)
    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
        proc.kill()
        proc.wait(timeout=5)


def run_smoke(monitor_port: int, worker_port: int, enable_tts: bool, voice_name: str) -> int:
    root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
    config_path = root / "config" / "settings.yaml.example"

    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(
        mode="w",
        encoding="utf-8",
        suffix=".txt",
        prefix="clonecut-machines-",
        delete=False,
    ) as mf:
        mf.write(f"127.0.0.1:{worker_port}:1\n")
        machines_path = Path(mf.name)

    worker_cmd = [
        sys.executable,
        "-m",
        "apps.worker.main",
        "--config",
        str(config_path),
        "--host",
        "127.0.0.1",
        "--port",
        str(worker_port),
    ]
    monitor_cmd = [
        sys.executable,
        "-m",
        "apps.monitor.main",
        "--config",
        str(config_path),
        "--host",
        "127.0.0.1",
        "--port",
        str(monitor_port),
        "--machines-file",
        str(machines_path),
    ]

    worker_proc: subprocess.Popen[Any] | None = None
    monitor_proc: subprocess.Popen[Any] | None = None
    local_video_path: Path | None = None
    try:
        worker_env = dict(os.environ)
        worker_env["REDIS_NAMESPACE"] = "clonecut_worker_smoke:"
        worker_env["CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE"] = "true" if enable_tts else "false"

        monitor_env = dict(os.environ)
        monitor_env["REDIS_NAMESPACE"] = "clonecut_monitor_smoke:"

        worker_proc = subprocess.Popen(worker_cmd, cwd=root, env=worker_env)
        monitor_proc = subprocess.Popen(monitor_cmd, cwd=root, env=monitor_env)

        _wait_http(f"http://127.0.0.1:{worker_port}/health", timeout_seconds=20)
        _wait_http(f"http://127.0.0.1:{monitor_port}/health", timeout_seconds=20)

        if enable_tts:
            submit_payload = {
                "task_type": "tts",
                "priority": "normal",
                "metadata": {"source": "smoke"},
                "payload": {"text": "smoke test"},
            }
            if voice_name.strip():
                submit_payload["payload"]["voice_name"] = voice_name.strip()
        else:
            with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(
                mode="wb",
                suffix=".mp4",
                prefix="clonecut-smoke-video-",
                delete=False,
            ) as vf:
                vf.write(b"smoke-video")
                local_video_path = Path(vf.name)
            submit_payload = {
                "task_type": "video",
                "priority": "normal",
                "source_url": str(local_video_path),
                "metadata": {"source": "smoke"},
            }
        submit_result = _post_json(
            f"http://127.0.0.1:{monitor_port}/api/tasks/submit",
            submit_payload,
        )
        task_id = str(submit_result.get("task_id", "")).strip()
        if not task_id:
            raise RuntimeError(f"monitor did not return task_id: {submit_result}")

        _post_json(f"http://127.0.0.1:{monitor_port}/api/dispatch-once", {})

        deadline = time.time() + 20
        final_status: Dict[str, Any] = {}
        while time.time() < deadline:
            task_result = _get_json(
                f"http://127.0.0.1:{worker_port}/api/worker/task/{task_id}"
            )
            task = task_result.get("task") if isinstance(task_result, dict) else None
            if isinstance(task, dict):
                final_status = task
                if task.get("status") in {"completed", "failed"}:
                    break
            time.sleep(0.5)

        if final_status.get("status") != "completed":
            raise RuntimeError(f"task did not complete: {final_status}")

        cluster = _get_json(f"http://127.0.0.1:{monitor_port}/api/cluster/status")
        worker = _get_json(f"http://127.0.0.1:{worker_port}/api/worker/status")

        print("SMOKE OK")
        print(f"task_id={task_id}")
        print(f"monitor_queue={cluster.get('queue_size')}")
        print(f"worker_total_queue={worker.get('total_queue_size')}")
        return 0
    finally:
        if monitor_proc is not None:
            _terminate(monitor_proc)
        if worker_proc is not None:
            _terminate(worker_proc)
        try:
            machines_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
        except Exception:
            pass
        if local_video_path is not None:
            try:
                local_video_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)
            except Exception:
                pass


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut local smoke test")
    parser.add_argument("--monitor-port", type=int, default=18200)
    parser.add_argument("--worker-port", type=int, default=18205)
    parser.add_argument("--enable-tts", action="store_true", help="run smoke with tts task")
    parser.add_argument("--voice-name", type=str, default="", help="optional voice name for tts task")
    args = parser.parse_args()
    return run_smoke(
        monitor_port=args.monitor_port,
        worker_port=args.worker_port,
        enable_tts=args.enable_tts,
        voice_name=args.voice_name,
    )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

app:
  name: clonecut
  env: production
  role: worker
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8205

redis:
  host: 127.0.0.1
  port: 6379
  db: 0
  password: ""
  namespace: "clonecut_worker:"

paths:
  input_dir: D:/clonecut/input
  output_dir: D:/clonecut/output
  log_dir: D:/clonecut/logs

queue:
  max_retries: 3
  retry_backoff_seconds: [5, 10, 20]
  dedup_ttl_seconds: 86400

worker:
  max_download_workers: 2
  max_process_workers: 2
  max_upload_workers: 2
  # Built-in TTS/voice-clone path. Enabled by default.
  tts_enable: true
  # local | http | auto (auto=local first then http fallback)
  tts_engine: "local"
  tts_default_voice: ""
  tts_local_sample_rate_hz: 24000
  # Optional HTTP bridge endpoint, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:9000
  tts_api_endpoint: ""
  tts_api_timeout_seconds: 15
  # Upload storage backend. Current supported value: local
  upload_storage_backend: "local"
  # Forum reply during upload stage. Only applies to video tasks carrying forum thread context.
  forum_upload_enabled: true
  forum_reply_content: "Video processing completed"
  forum_settings_path: "config/forum_settings.yaml"
  # Upload-stage retry backoff (seconds), used only for upload failures.
  upload_retry_backoff_seconds: [1, 2, 4]
  # Tiny-input migration fallback threshold in bytes. Set 0 to disable.
  internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0
  # Retry/Zombie background scheduler tuning.
  retry_check_interval_seconds: 1
  zombie_timeout_seconds: 7200
  zombie_timeout_by_status_seconds:
    pending: 7200
    downloading: 7200
    processing: 7200
    uploading: 7200
  zombie_check_interval_seconds: 300

monitor:
  dispatch_interval_seconds: 2
  health_check_interval_seconds: 10
  # legacy key alias, same meaning as health_check_interval_seconds
  check_interval_seconds: 10
  dispatch_timeout_seconds: 5
  forum_discovery_enabled: true
  forum_check_interval_seconds: 10

llm:
  # Supported providers: rule/openai/deepseek/qwen/kimi/g4f
  provider: "rule"
  # Provider-specific model name. Keep empty to let adapters use their defaults.
  model: ""
  # API key for remote providers. Not required for `rule`.
  api_key: ""
  # Optional provider endpoint override (compatible OpenAI base URL).
  base_url: ""
  # Stream output switch for adapters implementing stream_call.
  stream: false
  # Request timeout in seconds.
  timeout_seconds: 25.0

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import logging
import os
from typing import Any
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

from flask import Flask, jsonify, request
from jinja2 import ChoiceLoader, FileSystemLoader

from apps.web.mock_data import (
    build_worker_resources,
    build_worker_status,
    build_worker_tasks,
)
from apps.web import STATIC_DIR, TEMPLATE_DIR, render_worker_dashboard
from apps.worker.service import WorkerService
from infra.config.loader import load_app_config
from infra.logging.setup import setup_logging


def create_app(service: WorkerService) -> Flask:
    app = Flask(
        __name__,
        template_folder=str(TEMPLATE_DIR),
        static_folder=str(STATIC_DIR),
        static_url_path="/web/static",
    )
    if app.jinja_loader is not None:
        app.jinja_loader = ChoiceLoader([app.jinja_loader, FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR))])
    _web_mock_mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_WEB_MOCK_MODE", "").strip().lower() == "true"

    def _mock_mode_from_request() -> bool:
        if _web_mock_mode:
            return True
        raw = request.args.get("mock", "").strip().lower()
        return raw in {"1", "true", "yes"}

    @app.get("/")
    def dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/web/worker")
    def worker_dashboard() -> Any:
        return render_worker_dashboard(
            {
                "page_title": "CloneCut Worker Dashboard",
                "dashboard_mode": "worker",
                "api_base": "/api/worker",
                "mock_mode": "true" if _mock_mode_from_request() else "false",
            }
        )

    @app.get("/health")
    def health() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"status": "ok"})

    @app.get("/ready")
    def ready() -> Any:
        payload = service.get_readiness()
        status_code = 200 if payload.get("ready") else 503
        return jsonify(payload), status_code

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/status")
    def mock_worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, **build_worker_status()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/resources")
    def mock_worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": build_worker_resources()})

    @app.get("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_tasks() -> Any:
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "10")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
        except ValueError:
            limit = 10
        tasks = build_worker_tasks(limit=limit)
        return jsonify({"success": True, "tasks": tasks, "total": len(tasks), "limit": limit, "offset": 0})

    @app.post("/web/mock/worker/tasks")
    def mock_worker_submit() -> Any:
        payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        source_url = str(payload.get("source_url", "")).strip()
        if not source_url:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "missing source_url"}), 400
        task_id = f"mock-submit-{datetime.now().strftime('%H%M%S')}-{uuid.uuid4().hex[:6]}"
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id}), 201

    @app.post("/api/worker/receive-task")
    def receive_task() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"})

    def _list_tasks_impl() -> Any:
        status = request.args.get("status")
        limit_raw = request.args.get("limit", "20")
        offset_raw = request.args.get("offset", "0")
        try:
            limit = max(1, min(200, int(limit_raw)))
            offset = max(0, int(offset_raw))
        except ValueError:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "invalid pagination params"}), 400

        try:
            payload = service.list_tasks(status=status, limit=limit, offset=offset)
        except ValueError as exc:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, **payload})

    def _create_task_impl() -> Any:
        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
        ok, task_id, error = service.submit(data)
        if not ok:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": error or "invalid task payload"}), 400
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task_id": task_id, "message": "task queued"}), 201

    @app.get("/api/worker/status")
    def worker_status() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/status")
    def status_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify(service.get_status())

    @app.get("/api/worker/resources")
    def worker_resources() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/resources")
    def resources_compat() -> Any:
        return jsonify({"success": True, "resources": service.get_resources()})

    @app.get("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_tasks() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.get("/api/tasks")
    def tasks_compat() -> Any:
        return _list_tasks_impl()

    @app.post("/api/worker/tasks")
    def worker_create_task() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.post("/api/tasks")
    def create_task_compat() -> Any:
        return _create_task_impl()

    @app.get("/api/worker/task/<task_id>")
    def worker_task(task_id: str) -> Any:
        task = service.get_task(task_id)
        if task is None:
            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "task not found"}), 404
        return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task})

    return app


def _run_http(app: Flask, host: str, port: int, logger: logging.Logger) -> None:
    try:
        from waitress import serve

        logger.info("serving with waitress on %s:%s", host, port)
        serve(app, host=host, port=port)
    except Exception:
        logger.info("waitress unavailable, fallback to flask builtin server on %s:%s", host, port)
        app.run(host=host, port=port, debug=False, use_reloader=False)


def main() -> int:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="CloneCut worker service")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=None, help="override service port")
    parser.add_argument("--host", type=str, default=None, help="override service host")
    parser.add_argument("--config", type=str, default="config/settings.yaml", help="config path")
    args = parser.parse_args()

    cfg = load_app_config(args.config)
    cfg.role = "worker"
    if args.port:
        cfg.port = args.port
    if args.host:
        cfg.host = args.host
    if cfg.redis_namespace == "clonecut_monitor:":
        cfg.redis_namespace = "clonecut_worker:"

    setup_logging(cfg.log_dir, cfg.role)
    logger = logging.getLogger("apps.worker")
    logger.info("worker booting")
    logger.info("env=%s role=%s host=%s port=%s", cfg.env, cfg.role, cfg.host, cfg.port)
    logger.info(
        "redis=%s:%s db=%s ns=%s",
        cfg.redis_host,
        cfg.redis_port,
        cfg.redis_db,
        cfg.redis_namespace,
    )

    service = WorkerService(config=cfg, logger=logger)
    service.start()
    app = create_app(service)

    _run_http(app=app, host=cfg.host, port=cfg.port, logger=logger)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import mimetypes
from pathlib import Path
import time
from typing import Any, Mapping

import requests


def _normalize_api_base(api_base: str) -> str:
    text = str(api_base or "").strip().rstrip("/")
    if not text:
        raise ValueError("api_base is required")
    return text


def _resolve_api_url(api_base: str, path: str) -> str:
    base = _normalize_api_base(api_base)
    suffix = str(path or "").strip()
    if not suffix:
        return base
    if not suffix.startswith("/"):
        suffix = "/" + suffix
    return base + suffix


def _build_auth_headers(api_token: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
    if not token:
        return {}
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}"}


def _response_json(response: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:
    try:
        payload = response.json()
    except Exception as exc:
        status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
        text = str(getattr(response, "text", "") or "").strip()
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned non-json response: status={status_code} body={text}") from exc
    if not isinstance(payload, dict):
        raise RuntimeError(f"api returned invalid payload type: {type(payload)!r}")
    return payload


def _ensure_success_payload(payload: Mapping[str, Any], response: Any, context: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    body = dict(payload or {})
    if bool(body.get("success")):
        return body
    status_code = getattr(response, "status_code", "unknown")
    error = str(body.get("error") or "").strip() or f"{context} failed"
    raise RuntimeError(f"{context} failed: status={status_code} error={error}")


def _coerce_form_value(value: Any) -> str:
    if isinstance(value, (dict, list)):
        return json.dumps(value, ensure_ascii=False)
    if value is None:
        return ""
    return str(value)


def submit_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "clonecut_task_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    file_path = Path(video_path).expanduser()
    if not file_path.exists() or not file_path.is_file():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"video file not found: {file_path}")

    form: dict[str, str] = {"source": source}
    if task_id:
        form["task_id"] = str(task_id).strip()
    if stage5_model_name:
        form["stage5_model_name"] = str(stage5_model_name).strip()
    for key, value in dict(extra_form or {}).items():
        text = _coerce_form_value(value)
        if text:
            form[str(key)] = text

    content_type = mimetypes.guess_type(file_path.name)[0] or "application/octet-stream"
    with file_path.open("rb") as file_handle:
        response = client.post(
            _resolve_api_url(api_base, "/api/tasks/video"),
            data=form,
            files={"file": (file_path.name, file_handle, content_type)},
            headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
            timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
        )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="submit video task")


def fetch_task_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    client = session or requests
    resolved_task_id = str(task_id or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise ValueError("task_id is required")

    response = client.get(
        _resolve_api_url(api_base, f"/api/tasks/{resolved_task_id}/result"),
        headers=_build_auth_headers(api_token),
        timeout=max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds)),
    )
    payload = _response_json(response)
    return _ensure_success_payload(payload, response, context="fetch task result")


def wait_for_task_result(
    api_base: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    deadline = time.time() + max(1.0, float(timeout_seconds))
    while True:
        payload = fetch_task_result(
            api_base=api_base,
            task_id=task_id,
            api_token=api_token,
            timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
            session=session,
        )
        result = payload.get("task_result") if isinstance(payload.get("task_result"), dict) else {}
        status = str(result.get("status") or "").strip().lower()
        if status in {"completed", "failed", "cancelled"}:
            return payload
        if time.time() >= deadline:
            raise TimeoutError(f"wait task result timed out: task_id={task_id} status={status or 'unknown'}")
        time.sleep(max(0.2, float(poll_interval_seconds)))


def run_video_task(
    api_base: str,
    video_path: str | Path,
    *,
    api_token: str = "",
    task_id: str = "",
    source: str = "clonecut_task_client",
    stage5_model_name: str = "",
    extra_form: Mapping[str, Any] | None = None,
    wait: bool = True,
    submit_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0,
    wait_timeout_seconds: float = 1800.0,
    poll_interval_seconds: float = 5.0,
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 15.0,
    session: Any = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    submitted = submit_video_task(
        api_base=api_base,
        video_path=video_path,
        api_token=api_token,
        task_id=task_id,
        source=source,
        stage5_model_name=stage5_model_name,
        extra_form=extra_form,
        timeout_seconds=submit_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    output = {"submit": submitted}
    if not wait:
        return output

    resolved_task_id = str(submitted.get("task_id") or "").strip()
    if not resolved_task_id:
        raise RuntimeError("submit response missing task_id")
    output["result"] = wait_for_task_result(
        api_base=api_base,
        task_id=resolved_task_id,
        api_token=api_token,
        timeout_seconds=wait_timeout_seconds,
        poll_interval_seconds=poll_interval_seconds,
        request_timeout_seconds=request_timeout_seconds,
        session=session,
    )
    return output


__all__ = [
    "fetch_task_result",
    "run_video_task",
    "submit_video_task",
    "wait_for_task_result",
]

Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-smoke-' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\n$configText = $configText -replace 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0', 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_smoke:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'sample.mp4'\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\n$envCommon = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\ntry {\n  $workerEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $workerEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $workerEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $apiEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $apiEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv['CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER'] = 'false'\n\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList '-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $workerEnv\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList '-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $apiEnv\n\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true } \n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  $clientOut = & $py (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py') --api-base (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2>&1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \"client failed: $clientOut\" }\n  $clientJson = $clientOut | Out-String\n  $payload = $clientJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id in client payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result in client payload' }\n\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\" -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  if ($apiProc -and -not $apiProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $apiProc.Id -Force }\n  if ($workerProc -and -not $workerProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $workerProc.Id -Force }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 180000
}

Start-Process иҝҷиҫ№зҡ„ PowerShell зүҲжң¬дёҚж”ҜжҢҒзӣҙжҺҘжіЁе…ҘзҺҜеўғеҸҳйҮҸпјҢжҲ‘жҚўжҲҗ ProcessStartInfo йҮҚи·‘пјҢдёҚж”№йӘҢиҜҒзӣ®ж ҮгҖӮ

Tool Call #502 shell_command call_VCUf0dPfGzOoe5WvMFIPFayf 11:05:02
shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-smoke-' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\n$configText = $configText -replace 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0', 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_smoke:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'sample.mp4'\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  foreach ($arg in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add([string]$arg) }\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.Environment['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.Environment['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.Environment[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) $apiLog @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  $clientOut = & $py (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py') --api-base (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2>&1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \"client failed: $clientOut\" }\n  $payload = ($clientOut | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id in client payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result in client payload' }\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\" -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 180000
}

{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-smoke-' + (Get-Date $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\n$configText = $configText -replace 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0', 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_smoke:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'sample.mp4'\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction Quote-Arg([string]$arg) {\n  if ($arg -match '[\\s\"]') { return '\"' + ($arg -replace '\"','\\\"') + '\"' }\n  return $arg\n}\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  $psi.Arguments = (($arguments | ForEach-Object { Quote-Arg ([string]$_) }) -join ' ')\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.EnvironmentVariables[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) $apiLog @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  $clientOut = & $py (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py') --api-base (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2>&1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \"client failed: $clientOut\" }\n  $payload = ($clientOut | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id in client payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result in client payload' }\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\" -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 180000
}

{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-smoke-debug-' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\n$configText = $configText -replace 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0', 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_smoke:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'sample.mp4'\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction Quote-Arg([string]$arg) { if ($arg -match '[\\s\"]') { return '\"' + ($arg -replace '\"','\\\"') + '\"' }; return $arg }\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  $psi.Arguments = (($arguments | ForEach-Object { Quote-Arg ([string]$_) }) -join ' ')\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.EnvironmentVariables[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200\n  return $proc\n}\n$workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n$apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) $apiLog @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\nStart-Sleep -Seconds 5\n$workerExited = $workerProc.HasExited\n$apiExited = $apiProc.HasExited\n$workerExitCode = if ($workerExited) { $workerProc.ExitCode } else { $null }\n$apiExitCode = if ($apiExited) { $apiProc.ExitCode } else { $null }\n$workerOut = if (Test-Path $workerLog) { Get-Content -Raw $workerLog } else { '' }\n$apiOut = if (Test-Path $apiLog) { Get-Content -Raw $apiLog } else { '' }\ntry { $workerHealth = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" -TimeoutSec 2 | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { $workerHealth = $_.Exception.Message }\ntry { $workerReady = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" -TimeoutSec 2 | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6 } catch { $workerReady = $_.Exception.Message }\ntry { $apiHealth = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" -TimeoutSec 2 | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } catch { $apiHealth = $_.Exception.Message }\n[pscustomobject]@{\n  temp_root = $tempRoot\n  worker_exited = $workerExited\n  worker_exit_code = $workerExitCode\n  api_exited = $apiExited\n  api_exit_code = $apiExitCode\n  worker_health = $workerHealth\n  worker_ready = $workerReady\n  api_health = $apiHealth\n  worker_log = $workerOut\n  api_log = $apiOut\n} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\nforeach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) { if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) { $p.Kill(); $p.WaitForExit() } }\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 180000
}

$tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\n$configText = $configText -replace 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0', 'internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_smoke:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19215\n$apiPort = 19110\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'sample.mp4'\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction Quote-Arg([string]$arg) { if ($arg -match '[\\s\"]') { return '\"' + ($arg -replace '\"','\\\"') + '\"' }; return $arg }\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  $psi.Arguments = (($arguments | ForEach-Object { Quote-Arg ([string]$_) }) -join ' ')\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.EnvironmentVariables[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi)\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $payloadText = & $py (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py') --api-base (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'client command failed' }\n  $payload = ($payloadText | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\" -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 180000
}

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir


def run_stage0_clean(input_video: str, output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage0 input missing")
    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(source))

    ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():

from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
import subprocess
from typing import Any

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, probe_duration_seconds, stage_artifact_path


def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
    return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None


def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    try:
        completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)
        if completed.returncode == 0:
            return True, ""
        return False, completed.stderr or completed.stdout or f"exit={completed.returncode}"
    except Exception as exc:
        return False, str(exc)


def _build_clip_ranges(
    *,
    subtitle_path: Path,
    video_duration: float,
    max_duration: float = 0.0,
    target_speaker: str = "",
) -> tuple[list[tuple[float, float]], str]:
    if not subtitle_path.exists():
        return ([(0.0, max(0.1, float(video_duration or 1.0)))], "merged=1 missing_subtitle")
    text = subtitle_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    # Minimal deterministic shape: split by subtitle blocks and create simple 1s ranges.
    blocks = [item for item in text.split("\n\n") if item.strip()]
    ranges: list[tuple[float, float]] = []
    matched = 0
    total = 0
    cursor = 0.0
    for block in blocks:
        lines = [line.strip() for line in block.splitlines() if line.strip()]
        if len(lines) < 3:
            continue
        total += 1
        content = " ".join(lines[2:]).strip()
        if target_speaker and f"[{target_speaker}]" not in content:
            continue
        matched += 1
        ranges.append((cursor, min(cursor + 1.0, float(video_duration or 1.0))))
        cursor += 1.5
    if not ranges:
        ranges = [(0.0, min(1.0, float(video_duration or 1.0)))]
    if max_duration and max_duration > 0:
        limited: list[tuple[float, float]] = []
        spent = 0.0
        for start, end in ranges:
            dur = max(0.0, end - start)
            if spent + dur <= max_duration:
                limited.append((start, end))
                spent += dur
                continue
            remain = max_duration - spent
            if remain > 0:
                limited.append((start, start + remain))
            break
        ranges = limited or ranges[:1]
    detail = f"merged={len(ranges)}"
    if target_speaker:
        detail += f" speaker_filter target={target_speaker} matched={matched}/{max(total,1)}"
    return ranges, detail


def _render_trim_seconds(source: Path, target: Path, target_seconds: float) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    codec = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_VIDEO_CODEC", "").strip() or os.getenv("CLONECUT_VIDEO_CODEC", "").strip()
    codec = codec or "libx264"
    cmd = ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-t", f"{target_seconds:.3f}", "-c:v", codec, str(target)]
    ok, err = run_ffmpeg(cmd)
    if ok:
        return True, ""
    if codec.endswith("_nvenc") and "nvenc" in err.lower():
        cmd = ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-t", f"{target_seconds:.3f}", "-c:v", "libx264", str(target)]
        return run_ffmpeg(cmd)
    return False, err


def _resolve_clip_text_input(output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
    env_path = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_CLIP_TEXT_PATH", "").strip()
    candidate_paths: list[Path] = []
    if env_path:
        candidate_paths.append(Path(env_path))
    candidate_paths.append(Path(output_dir) / task_id / "clip_text.txt")

    for path in candidate_paths:
        if not path.exists() or not path.is_file():
            continue
        try:
            return path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), str(path)
        except Exception:
            continue
    return "", ""


def run_stage6_clip(input_video: str, output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage6 input missing")

    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip_manifest", ".json")
    out_copy = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip_copy", ".mp4")
    strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    payload: dict[str, Any] = {
        "task_id": task_id,
        "method": "copy_fallback",
        "fallback_used": False,
        "strict_rejected": False,
        "detail": "",
    }

    guide_path = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_DURATION_GUIDE_PATH", "").strip()
    clip_text_match = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE6_CLIP_TEXT_MATCH", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    subtitle_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_subtitles", ".srt")
    stage4_manifest = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_manifest", ".json")
    target_speaker = ""
    if stage4_manifest.exists():
        try:
            target_speaker = str(json.loads(stage4_manifest.read_text(encoding="utf-8")).get("speaker", "")).strip()
        except Exception:
            target_speaker = ""

    if ffmpeg_exists():
        out_clip = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_clip", ".mp4")
        if guide_path:
            seconds = probe_duration_seconds(guide_path)
            ok, err = _render_trim_seconds(source=source, target=out_clip, target_seconds=max(0.1, seconds))
            if ok:
                payload["method"] = "duration_guide_trim"
                manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
                return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
            payload["error"] = err
        elif clip_text_match:
            clip_text, clip_text_source = _resolve_clip_text_input(output_dir=output_dir, task_id=task_id)
            payload["clip_text_used"] = bool(clip_text.strip())
            payload["clip_text_source"] = clip_text_source
            if not payload["clip_text_used"]:
                payload["fallback_used"] = True
                payload["detail"] = "clip_text_missing"
                if strict:
                    payload["method"] = "strict_rejected"
                    payload["strict_rejected"] = True
                    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
                    return StageResult(
                        success=False,
                        output_file=str(source),
                        error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage6 clip_text fallback",
                    )
                ranges, detail = _build_clip_ranges(
                    subtitle_path=subtitle_path,
                    video_duration=max(1.0, probe_duration_seconds(input_video)),
                    max_duration=0.0,
                    target_speaker=target_speaker,
                )
                payload["detail"] = f"{payload['detail']} {detail}".strip()
                ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
                if ok:
                    payload["method"] = "subtitle_concat"
                    payload["ranges"] = ranges
                    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
                    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
                payload["error"] = err
                payload["method"] = "copy_fallback"
            else:
                ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
                if ok:
                    payload["method"] = "subtitle_clip_text_concat"
                    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
                    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
                payload["error"] = err
        else:
            ranges, detail = _build_clip_ranges(
                subtitle_path=subtitle_path,
                video_duration=max(1.0, probe_duration_seconds(input_video)),
                max_duration=0.0,
                target_speaker=target_speaker,
            )
            payload["detail"] = detail
            ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-c", "copy", str(out_clip)])
            if ok:
                payload["method"] = "subtitle_concat" if target_speaker else "subtitle_concat"
                payload["ranges"] = ranges
                manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
                return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_clip))
            payload["error"] = err

    payload["fallback_used"] = True
    if strict:
        payload["method"] = "strict_rejected"
        payload["strict_rejected"] = True
        manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=str(source), error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage6 fallback")

    shutil.copyfile(source, out_copy)
    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(out_copy))


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage6_clip(*args, **kwargs)
Tool Result #542 shell_command call_0qMk1n7NNPo9LOPvb9stGxFJ exit 0 11:08:35
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: from __future__ import annotations import json import os from pathlib import Path import shutil import subprocess from typing import ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.4 seconds
Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
import shutil
import subprocess
from typing import Any

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path


def ffmpeg_exists() -> bool:
    return shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None


def run_ffmpeg(args: list[str], timeout_seconds: int = 1800) -> tuple[bool, str]:
    try:
        completed = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_seconds, check=False)
        if completed.returncode == 0:
            return True, ""
        return False, completed.stderr or completed.stdout or f"exit={completed.returncode}"
    except Exception as exc:
        return False, str(exc)


def _probe_video_resolution(_source: Path) -> tuple[int, int]:
    return (1280, 720)


def run_stage7_subtitle(input_video: str, output_dir: str, task_id: str) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage7_subtitle input missing")

    stage_dir = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle_manifest", ".json").parent
    subtitle_ass = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".ass")
    subtitle_srt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_correct_subtitles", ".srt")
    if not subtitle_srt.exists():
        subtitle_srt = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage6_5_resub_subtitles", ".srt")

    output = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle", ".mp4")
    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage7_subtitle_manifest", ".json")
    mode = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STAGE7_MODE", "auto").strip().lower()
    strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"

    method = "copy_fallback"
    fallback_used = False
    if ffmpeg_exists() and (mode in {"auto", "burn"}):
        vf_expr = ""
        if subtitle_ass.exists():
            vf_expr = f"ass={subtitle_ass}"
        else:
            _, h = _probe_video_resolution(source)
            font_size = max(24, int(round(h * 0.05)))
            vf_expr = f"subtitles={subtitle_srt}:force_style='Fontsize={font_size}'"
        ok, err = run_ffmpeg(["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", str(source), "-vf", vf_expr, str(output)])
        if ok and output.exists():
            method = "burn_subtitle"
            manifest_path.write_text(
                json.dumps({"task_id": task_id, "method": method, "vf_expr": vf_expr}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
                encoding="utf-8",
            )
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(output))
        fallback_used = True
    else:
        fallback_used = True

    if strict and fallback_used:
        manifest_path.write_text(
            json.dumps(
                {"task_id": task_id, "method": "strict_rejected", "fallback_used": True},
                ensure_ascii=False,
                indent=2,
            ),
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=str(source), error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage7 fallback")

    shutil.copyfile(source, output)
    manifest_path.write_text(
        json.dumps({"task_id": task_id, "method": method, "fallback_used": fallback_used}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )
    return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(output))


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage7_subtitle(*args, **kwargs)

Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP ('clonecut-hardcut-real-' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.real.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'real.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_hardcut_real:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 19225\n$apiPort = 19120\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\nfunction Quote-Arg([string]$arg) { if ($arg -match '[\\s\"]') { return '\"' + ($arg -replace '\"','\\\"') + '\"' }; return $arg }\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  $psi.Arguments = (($arguments | ForEach-Object { Quote-Arg ([string]$_) }) -join ' ')\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.EnvironmentVariables['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.EnvironmentVariables[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  return [System.Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi)\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 3\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\" 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  Wait-Json \"http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\" 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $payloadText = & $py (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py') --api-base (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 300 --poll-interval-seconds 2 --request-timeout-seconds 5\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'client command failed' }\n  $payload = ($payloadText | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\" -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n    last_stage = $workerTask.task.stage_checkpoint\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 360000
}

# йЎ№зӣ®зӣ®ж Ү v2

## е…ғдҝЎжҒҜ
- зүҲжң¬: v2
- еҲӣе»әж—Ҙжңҹ: 2026-03-25
- дёҠдёҖзүҲжң¬: v1

## еҢ—жһҒжҳҹзӣ®ж Ү
еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңүи§Ҷйў‘еҹҹж–ҮжЎЈдёҺе®һйҷ…д»Јз ҒпјҢжҳҺзЎ® `clonecut` жј”иҝӣеҲ°вҖңйҖҡиҝҮ OpenClaw дёҠдј и§Ҷйў‘пјҢе№¶йҖҡиҝҮиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖе®ҢжҲҗеүӘиҫ‘гҖҒе°ҒйқўгҖҒеӯ—е№•з”ҹжҲҗдёҺеӨҡиҪ®и°ғж•ҙвҖқзҡ„еҸҜжү§иЎҢи·Ҝзәҝпјӣдјҳе…ҲиЎҘйҪҗеҸҜдҫӣ skill и°ғз”Ёзҡ„е·ҘзЁӢеә•еә§пјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘжҠҠж—§дәӨдә’ејҸжөҒж°ҙзәҝеҢ…иЈ…жҲҗ skillгҖӮ

## иҢғеӣҙ
- йҳ…иҜ»е№¶еҜ№йҪҗи§Ҷйў‘еҹҹжһ¶жһ„гҖҒFunClip еҚҮзә§гҖҒйў„еӨ„зҗҶйҳ¶ж®өе®Ўи®ЎдёҺж•ҙдҪ“дјҳеҢ–ж–№жЎҲж–ҮжЎЈгҖӮ
- еӨҚж ё `apps/api`гҖҒ`apps/worker`гҖҒ`domain/video/funclip`гҖҒ`domain/video/pre`гҖҒ`domain/video/pipeline`гҖҒ`apps/gradio_ui` зӯүе…ій”®д»Јз Ғе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- еҲӨж–ӯе®һзҺ°иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеӨҡиҪ®зј–иҫ‘жүҖйңҖзҡ„еүҚзҪ®иғҪеҠӣгҖҒз»“жһ„еҢ–дёӯй—ҙдә§зү©дёҺжңҚеҠЎжҺҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- з»ҷеҮәеҲҶйҳ¶ж®өе®һж–ҪйЎәеәҸдёҺз¬¬дёҖжү№ејҖеҸ‘д»»еҠЎгҖӮ

## йӘҢж”¶дҝЎеҸ·
- жҳҺзЎ®еӣһзӯ”жҳҜеҗҰеә”вҖңе…ҲдјҳеҢ–йЎ№зӣ®пјҢеҶҚеҒҡ skillвҖқгҖӮ
- еҪўжҲҗдёҺд»Јз ҒзҺ°е®һдёҖиҮҙзҡ„еҲҶйҳ¶ж®өи·ҜзәҝеӣҫгҖӮ
- иҫ“еҮәеҸҜзӣҙжҺҘиҝӣе…ҘејҖеҸ‘жҺ’жңҹзҡ„з¬¬дёҖжӯҘд»»еҠЎжё…еҚ•гҖӮ
