### 6.5 е…је®№зҺ°жңү `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest`

еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өдёҚжҳҜжҠӣејғзҺ°жңүз»“жһңеҚҸи®®пјҢиҖҢжҳҜпјҡ

- еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңү `openclaw_result` дёҺ `render_manifest` йҖҗжӯҘиЎҘйҪҗ `schema_version`
- е°Ҷеӯ—ж®өеҗ«д№үеҶҷе®һгҖҒеҶҷжё…
- йҖҡиҝҮеҘ‘зәҰжөӢиҜ•дҝқжҠӨе…је®№жј”иҝӣ

жңҖдҪіе®һи·өиҰҒжұӮпјҡ

- еӨ–йғЁйҖӮй…ҚеұӮеңЁе…је®№жңҹеҶ…еҸҜд»Ҙз»§з»ӯиҜ»еҸ– `openclaw_result`
- ж–°еўһиғҪеҠӣдјҳе…Ҳж”¶ж•ӣеҲ°жӯЈејҸзүҲжң¬еҢ–еӯ—ж®ө
- дёҚе…Ғи®ёж–°е№іеҸ°з»§з»ӯдҫқиө–вҖңеҶ…йғЁж–Үд»¶еҗҚзҢңжөӢвҖқејҸзәҰе®ҡ

### 6.6 `confirmation_checkpoint`

### 8.5 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`

`ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫгҖӮ

дҪҶе®ғжҳҜеҗҰд»“еә“зә§еҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨпјҢдёҚеңЁжң¬и§„иҢғдёӯйҡҗеҗ«еҶіе®ҡпјҢиҖҢеә”дҪңдёәеҗҺз»ӯжё…зҗҶйҳ¶ж®өзҡ„жҳҫејҸиҝҒз§»еҶізӯ–пјҢе№¶еҗҢжӯҘз»ҷеҮәпјҡ

- й…ҚзҪ®иҝҒз§»иҜҙжҳҺ
- жҳҜеҗҰдҝқз•ҷе…је®№ејҖе…і
- еәҹејғи·Ҝеҫ„
- еӣһж”¶ж—¶зӮ№

## 9. дё»жөҒзЁӢдёҺдҝ®ж”№жөҒзЁӢ

### 9.1 йҰ–ж¬ЎжҸҗдәӨжөҒзЁӢ
Tool Result #727 shell_command call_2Sug88Ru9EubwupRsZ170JGI exit 0 11:19:13
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: ### 12.1 еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶ»з»“з»“и®ә еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶ»з»“еҰӮдёӢз»“и®әпјҡ 1. ж–№жЎҲ B зҡ„з”ҹдә§дё»й“ҫжҳҜ `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` 2. OpenClaw еҸӘжҳҜз¬¬дёҖеұӮ Skill йҖӮй…Қе№іеҸ°пјҢдёҚжҳҜзі»з»ҹе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё» ...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:

### 12.1 еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶ»з»“з»“и®ә

еҪ“еүҚе·ІеҶ»з»“еҰӮдёӢз»“и®әпјҡ

1. ж–№жЎҲ B зҡ„з”ҹдә§дё»й“ҫжҳҜ `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/`
2. OpenClaw еҸӘжҳҜз¬¬дёҖеұӮ Skill йҖӮй…Қе№іеҸ°пјҢдёҚжҳҜзі»з»ҹе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё»
3. жһ¶жһ„йҮҮз”ЁдёүеұӮз»“жһ„пјҡж ёеҝғиғҪеҠӣеұӮгҖҒAPI/CLI йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈеұӮгҖҒSkill/Wrapper йҖӮй…ҚеұӮ
4. зҰҒжӯўж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•пјҢдҪҶдҝқз•ҷжҳҫејҸеӨұиҙҘгҖҒstrict жӢ’з»қгҖҒmanifest з•ҷз—•е’Ң ready/health зӯүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҝқжҠӨ
5. `task_spec` жҳҜзӣ®ж Үжү§иЎҢзңҹзӣёпјҢдҪҶеә”еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңү API з»“жһңеҚҸи®®йҖҗжӯҘж”¶ж•ӣ
6. `Developer` жЁЎејҸдёҚиҝӣе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ V1 иҢғеӣҙ
7. `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеҗҰеҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨз•ҷеҫ…еҗҺз»ӯеҚ•зӢ¬еҶізӯ–

### 12.2 еҪ“еүҚд»Қеҫ…зЎ®и®Өй—®йўҳ

дёӢдёҖиҪ®е»әи®®йҮҚзӮ№зЎ®и®Өпјҡ

1. `task_spec` зҡ„жңҖе°Ҹеӯ—ж®өйӣҶе…Ҳж”¶еӨҡе°Ҹ
2. `progress_event` е…ҲйҮҮз”ЁиҪ®иҜўејҸж”¶ж•ӣиҝҳжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘиҝӣе…Ҙжӣҙејәзҡ„дәӢд»¶йҖҡйҒ“
3. `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest` зҡ„ schema/version еҰӮдҪ•жј”иҝӣ

иҝҷжҳҜдёҖжқЎвҖңж”¶ж•ӣеҲ°еҚ•дёҖеҶ…ж ёвҖқзҡ„и·ҜзәҝпјҢдёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷеҸҢиҪЁиҝҗиЎҢпјҢд№ҹдёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•ж–№жЎҲгҖӮ

## 2. жҲ‘д»¬зҡ„ж ёеҝғзӣ®зҡ„

ж ёеҝғзӣ®зҡ„еҸҜд»ҘжҳҺзЎ®жҲҗдёҖеҸҘиҜқпјҡ

> з”ЁжҲ·йҖҡиҝҮ OpenClaw жҸҗдәӨи§Ҷйў‘еҗҺпјҢCloneCut жҢүзҺ°жңүдёҡеҠЎи§„еҲҷе®ҢжҲҗвҖңеҺ»ж°”еҸЈ/еҒңйЎҝгҖҒеҲ йҷӨйҮҚеӨҚеҶ…е®№гҖҒйҮҚеүӘгҖҒйҮҚж–°з”ҹжҲҗеӯ—е№•гҖҒзғ§еҪ•еӯ—е№•гҖҒж·»еҠ е°ҒйқўгҖҒж•ҙзҗҶдә§зү©вҖқпјҢз„¶еҗҺжҠҠжҲҗзүҮе’Ңе…ій”®дёӯй—ҙдә§зү©зЁіе®ҡиҝ”еӣһз»ҷ OpenClawгҖӮ

д№ҹе°ұжҳҜиҜҙпјҢеҪ“еүҚзӣ®ж ҮдёҚжҳҜеҒҡдёҖдёӘвҖңд»»ж„ҸиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖи§Ҷйў‘зј–иҫ‘еҷЁвҖқпјҢиҖҢжҳҜе…ҲжҠҠе·Із»Ҹиў«дёҡеҠЎйӘҢиҜҒиҝҮзҡ„иҝҷжқЎдё“з”Ёз”ҹдә§й“ҫеҪ»еә•дә§е“ҒеҢ–гҖҒжңҚеҠЎеҢ–гҖҒеҸҜи§ӮжөӢеҢ–гҖӮ

еҜ№еә”еҪ“еүҚдёҡеҠЎдё»й“ҫпјҡ

1. жҺҘж”¶и§Ҷйў‘дёҺдёҠдёӢж–Ү
2. жё…зҗҶд»»еҠЎиҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•
3. иҪ¬з ҒдёҺеҺ»ж°”еҸЈ/еҒңйЎҝ
4. иҜӯйҹіиҜҶеҲ«з”ҹжҲҗеҺҹе§Ӣеӯ—е№•
5. дҫқжҚ®ж—ўе®ҡи§„еҲҷеҲ йҷӨеҒңйЎҝиҜҚдёҺйҮҚеӨҚеҶ…е®№
6. ж №жҚ®еӨ„зҗҶеҗҺзҡ„ж–Үжң¬еүӘиҫ‘жҲҗзүҮ
7. дёәжҲҗзүҮйҮҚж–°з”ҹжҲҗеӯ—е№•
8. ж ЎжӯЈе№¶зғ§еҪ•еӯ—е№•
9. ж·»еҠ е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳ
10. ж•ҙзҗҶе№¶еӣһдј жңҖз»Ҳдә§зү©

## 3. е№іеҸ°ж— е…ізӣ®ж Ү

ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„зӣ®ж ҮдёҚжҳҜвҖңи®© CloneCut дҫқиө– OpenClaw жүҚиғҪе·ҘдҪңвҖқпјҢиҖҢжҳҜпјҡ

> и®© CloneCut жҸҗдҫӣдёҖдёӘе№іеҸ°ж— е…ізҡ„и§Ҷйў‘еӨ„зҗҶиғҪеҠӣпјҢд»»дҪ•ж”ҜжҢҒ skillгҖҒtoolгҖҒshellгҖҒHTTP жҲ– MCP и°ғз”Ёзҡ„е№іеҸ°пјҢйғҪеҸҜд»ҘеӨҚз”ЁиҝҷеҘ—иғҪеҠӣгҖӮ

е»әи®®з»ҹдёҖиҗҪеңЁпјҡ

### 5.6 еј•ж“Һиҫ№з•ҢеҺҹеҲҷ

- `domain/video/pre/**` жҳҜиҝҒз§»жқҘжәҗпјҢдёҚжҳҜжңӘжқҘиҫ№з•Ң
- `domain/video/funclip/**` жҳҜйҳ¶ж®өеҶ…йғЁеҸҜжӣҝжҚўеј•ж“ҺпјҢдёҚжҳҜ OpenClaw зӣҙжҺҘдҫқиө–еҜ№иұЎ
- OpenClaw еҸӘдҫқиө–д»»еҠЎжҺҘеҸЈдёҺз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈпјҢдёҚдҫқиө–еҶ…йғЁи„ҡжң¬ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ

### 5.7 е№іеҸ°и§ЈиҖҰеҺҹеҲҷ

е№іеҸ°и§ЈиҖҰзҡ„ж ёеҝғиҰҒжұӮжҳҜпјҡ

- OpenClaw дёҚзӣҙжҺҘдҫқиө– `domain/video/*` еҶ…йғЁз»ҶиҠӮ
- skill дёҚзӣҙжҺҘдҫқиө–еҶ…йғЁ stage ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ
- skill дёҚзӣҙжҺҘжӢјиЈ…еҶ…йғЁзӣ®еҪ•з»“жһ„
- д»»дҪ•е№іеҸ°йғҪйҖҡиҝҮеҗҢдёҖдёӘйҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈи°ғз”Ё CloneCut

еӣ жӯӨдё»й“ҫеә”ж”¶ж•ӣжҲҗпјҡ

- е№іеҸ°дҫ§пјҡskill/tool/wrapper
- CloneCut дҫ§пјҡAPI/CLI
- еҶ…йғЁдҫ§пјҡworker/pipeline/stages

### 5.8 жү§иЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„ж”¶ж•ӣеҺҹеҲҷ

ж–№жЎҲBиҰҒж”¶ж•ӣзҡ„жҳҜ CloneCut зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„пјҢдёҚжҳҜдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§ж— иҜҙжҳҺең°еҲ йҷӨд»“еә“йҮҢжүҖжңүеҺҶеҸІжү§иЎҢе…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ

иҝҷйҮҢе…ҲжҳҺзЎ®дёӨеұӮиҫ№з•Ңпјҡ

- CloneCut зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡеҸӘе…Ғи®ёиө° `VideoPipeline`
- д»“еә“зә§еҺҶеҸІжү§иЎҢе…ҘеҸЈпјҡдҫӢеҰӮ `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`пјҢйңҖиҰҒеҚ•зӢ¬еЈ°жҳҺжҳҜвҖңиҝҒз§»жңҹе…је®№вҖқиҝҳжҳҜвҖңжӯЈејҸеәҹејғвҖқ

еҪ“еүҚжҺЁиҚҗеҸЈеҫ„жҳҜпјҡ

- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫ
- жҳҜеҗҰд»Һж•ҙдёӘд»“еә“е®Ңе…Ёз§»йҷӨпјҢдҪңдёәеҚ•зӢ¬иҝҒз§»еҶізӯ–еӨ„зҗҶ
- еҰӮжһңеҶіе®ҡеҪ»еә•еәҹејғпјҢеҝ…йЎ»еңЁж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒй…ҚзҪ®е’ҢеҸ‘еёғиҜҙжҳҺдёӯжҳҺзЎ®иҝҷжҳҜдёҖж¬Ўжңүж„Ҹзҡ„еҠҹиғҪж”¶зј©пјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜж— ж„ҸеӣһеҪ’

### 5.9 е№іеҸ°дёӯз«ӢеҺҹеҲҷ

Redis дёҚдёҺ Docker ејәз»‘е®ҡгҖӮ

иҖғиҷ‘еҲ°еҗҺз»ӯ OpenClaw еҸҜиғҪйғЁзҪІеңЁиӢ№жһңз”өи„‘дёҠпјҢж–№жЎҲBй»ҳи®ӨйҮҮз”ЁвҖңе®ҝдё»жңәжңҚеҠЎеҢ–дҫқиө–вҖқзҡ„жҖқи·Ҝпјҡ

- Redis дҪңдёәе®ҝдё»жңәжңҚеҠЎиҝҗиЎҢ
- CloneCut дёҺи°ғз”Ёе№іеҸ°еқҮйҖҡиҝҮй…ҚзҪ®иҝһжҺҘ Redis
- дёҚжҠҠ Redis е®№еҷЁеҢ–дҪңдёәжһ¶жһ„еүҚжҸҗ

## 6. ж–№жЎҲBзӣ®ж Үжһ¶жһ„

```text
ж”ҜжҢҒ skill/tool зҡ„е№іеҸ°пјҲOpenClaw / е…¶д»– agent / MCP и°ғз”Ёж–№пјү
  -> Skill / Wrapper / Tool Adapter
  -> CloneCut йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈпјҲHTTP API / CLIпјү
  -> apps/worker/service.py
  -> domain/video/pipeline.py
  -> domain/video/stages/stage0~stage9
  -> output/<task_id>/artifacts
  -> ж ҮеҮҶз»“жһңеҜ№иұЎпјҲopenclaw_result / render_manifest / schema_versionпјү
  -> и°ғз”Ёж–№иҜ»еҸ–ж ҮеҮҶз»“жһң
```

е»әи®®ж”¶ж•ӣеҗҺзҡ„иҒҢиҙЈеҲҶеұӮеҰӮдёӢпјҡ

### 6.1 API / CLI йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈеұӮ

жҺЁиҚҗйЎәеәҸжҳҜпјҡ

3. еҶҚз”ҹжҲҗ OpenClaw skill
4. еҶҚиЎҘе…¶д»–е№іеҸ° skill / MCP tool

## 8. ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„жү§иЎҢйЎәеәҸ

### йҳ¶ж®ө1пјҡжҒўеӨҚеҸҜеҜје…Ҙзҡ„еҶ…зҪ®жөҒж°ҙзәҝйӘЁжһ¶

зӣ®ж Үпјҡи®© `domain.video.pipeline` иғҪеҜје…ҘгҖҒжөӢиҜ•иғҪж”¶йӣҶгҖӮ

дә§еҮәпјҡ

- `domain/video/stages/` еҹәзЎҖзӣ®еҪ•
- `StageResult` дёҺйҖҡз”Ёе·Ҙе…·
- `__init__` еҜјеҮәеҮҪж•°дёҺжЁЎеқ—

### йҳ¶ж®ө2пјҡжҢүдёҡеҠЎдё»й“ҫиҝҒз§» stage е®һзҺ°

е»әи®®йЎәеәҸпјҡ

1. `stage0_clean`
2. `stage1_transcode`
3. `stage2_silence`
4. `stage4_asr`
5. `stage5_ai_text`
6. `stage6_clip`
7. `stage6_5_resub`
8. `stage7_correct`
9. `stage7_subtitle`
10. `stage8_cover`
11. `stage9_organize`
12. `stage3_repair` дҪңдёәз®—жі•еўһејәеҗҺзҪ®йЎ№иЎҘйҪҗпјҢдҪҶеңЁйӘЁжһ¶йҳ¶ж®өеҝ…йЎ»е…ҲжҸҗдҫӣжңҖе°ҸеҸҜиҝҗиЎҢе®һзҺ°

иҜҙжҳҺпјҡ`stage3` еҪ“еүҚе№¶дёҚжҳҜ OpenClaw дё»й“ҫе…ій”®и·Ҝеҫ„пјҢдјҳе…Ҳзә§дҪҺдәҺ 2/4/5/6/7/8/9гҖӮ

### йҳ¶ж®ө3пјҡз»ҹдёҖиө„жәҗз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹдёҺ ready жІ»зҗҶ

зӣ®ж ҮпјҡжҠҠйҮҚиө„жәҗйў„еҠ иҪҪгҖҒиө„жәҗжүҖжңүжқғгҖҒе№¶еҸ‘й”Ғе’Ң ready зҠ¶жҖҒеҒҡжҲҗ worker еҶ…йғЁиғҪеҠӣгҖӮ

е®һи·өж–№ејҸпјҡ

- еңЁ worker еҗҜеҠЁж—¶еҲқе§ӢеҢ–жЁЎеһӢдёҺе·Ҙе…·е®һдҫӢ
- йҖҡиҝҮдҫқиө–жіЁе…ҘжҲ–еҸ—жҺ§ registry жіЁе…ҘеҲ° stage
- и®ҫзҪ® pipeline зә§е№¶еҸ‘дёҠйҷҗдёҺ GPU иө„жәҗй”Ғ
- worker йў„зғӯе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺжүҚж¶Ҳиҙ№и§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎ
- еҸ–ж¶ҲзӢ¬з«Ӣ warm subprocess и·Ҝеҫ„

### йҳ¶ж®ө4пјҡworker еҲҮжҚўеҲ° `VideoPipeline`

зӣ®ж Үпјҡзңҹе®һд»»еҠЎдёҚеҶҚз»ҸиҝҮж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫгҖӮ

### йҳ¶ж®ө5пјҡе»әз«ӢйҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈдёҺз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰ

зӣ®ж Үпјҡи®© CloneCut еҸҜд»Ҙиў«д»»дҪ•еӨ–йғЁе№іеҸ°йҖҡиҝҮз»ҹдёҖе…ҘеҸЈи°ғз”ЁпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜеҸӘдёә OpenClaw жңҚеҠЎгҖӮ

еҢ…еҗ«пјҡ

- еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңү API ж”¶ж•ӣзЁіе®ҡ HTTP API
- еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңүи„ҡжң¬дёҺи°ғз”Ёж–№ејҸж”¶ж•ӣзЁіе®ҡ CLI е‘Ҫд»Ө
- з»“жһң schema_version
- з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰжөӢиҜ•

### йҳ¶ж®ө6пјҡSkill йҖӮй…ҚеұӮиҗҪең°

зӣ®ж Үпјҡе…ҲжҸҗдҫӣ OpenClaw skillпјҢеҶҚдёәе…¶д»–е№іеҸ°йў„з•ҷеӨҚз”Ёж–№ејҸгҖӮ

еҢ…еҗ«пјҡ

- OpenClaw skill
- shell wrapper
- еҗҺз»ӯ MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺ

### йҳ¶ж®ө7пјҡOpenClaw з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜеӨҚжөӢ

жөӢиҜ•еҜ№иұЎпјҡ`D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`

йӘҢж”¶йҮҚзӮ№пјҡ

- д»»еҠЎжҸҗдәӨжҲҗеҠҹ
- д»»еҠЎзҠ¶жҖҒеҸҜи·ҹиёӘ
- жңҖз»ҲжҲҗзүҮеҸҜдёӢиҪҪ
- еӯ—е№•гҖҒе°ҒйқўгҖҒи„ҡжң¬гҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—еҸҜзЁіе®ҡеӣһдј 
- еӣәе®ҡеҶ·еҗҜеҠЁж—¶й—ҙжҳҫи‘—дёӢйҷҚпјҢе№¶иў«ж‘Ҡй”ҖеҲ° worker еҗҜеҠЁйҳ¶ж®ө
- skill еҸӘи°ғз”ЁйҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈпјҢдёҚзӣҙжҺҘиҖҰеҗҲеҶ…йғЁе®һзҺ°

### йҳ¶ж®ө8пјҡз§»йҷӨж—§дё»й“ҫдҫқиө–

зӣ®ж Үпјҡ

- жё…зҗҶ worker еҜ№ж—§ `pre/main/pipeline.py` зҡ„иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–
- дёӢзәҝ `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дё»з”ЁйҖ”
- жӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈдёҺй…ҚзҪ®ж ·дҫӢ

## 9. ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„йӘҢж”¶ж ҮеҮҶ

ж–№жЎҲBе®ҢжҲҗж—¶пјҢиҮіе°‘ж»Ўи¶ід»ҘдёӢжқЎд»¶пјҡ

1. `import domain.video.pipeline` жҲҗеҠҹ
2. `tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py` еҸҜйҖҡиҝҮ
3. `tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py`гҖҒ`test_stage6_clip.py`гҖҒ`test_stage7_correct.py`гҖҒ`test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py` еҸҜйҖҡиҝҮ
4. `tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py`гҖҒ`tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py`гҖҒ`tests/unit/test_monitor_mock_e2e.py` еҸҜйҖҡиҝҮ
5. `apps/worker/service.py` зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„дёҚеҶҚдҫқиө–ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫ
6. CloneCut еӯҳеңЁзЁіе®ҡзҡ„ API/CLI йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈ
7. OpenClaw skill йҖҡиҝҮйҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈи°ғз”Ё CloneCutпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘдҫқиө–еҶ…йғЁе®һзҺ°
8. OpenClaw еҜ№ `test.mp4` иғҪзЁіе®ҡжӢҝеҲ°жҲҗзүҮе’Ңе…ій”® artifacts
9. жҜҸд»»еҠЎеӣәе®ҡеҗҜеҠЁејҖй”Җд»ҺвҖңйҮҚж–°иө·и§ЈйҮҠеҷЁе№¶йҮҚеҜје…ҘйҮҚйў„зғӯвҖқеҲҮжҚўдёәвҖңworker еҗҜеҠЁйҳ¶ж®өдёҖж¬ЎжҖ§йў„зғӯвҖқ
10. worker еӯҳеңЁжҳҺзЎ®зҡ„ ready дҝЎеҸ·пјҢдёҚдјҡеңЁйў„зғӯжңӘе®ҢжҲҗж—¶жҠўи·‘и§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎ

## 10. ж–№жЎҲBжҳҺзЎ®дёҚеҒҡзҡ„дәӢжғ…

жң¬ж–№жЎҲжҳҺзЎ®дёҚеҒҡпјҡ

- дёҚдҝқз•ҷж–°ж—§еҸҢжү§иЎҢеҶ…ж ёй•ҝжңҹе№¶еӯҳ
- дёҚеј•е…Ҙ `subprocess` е…ңеә•и·Ҝеҫ„
- дёҚжҠҠвҖңж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫеӨұиҙҘеҗҺеҲҮеӣһж—§и„ҡжң¬вҖқеҪ“жҲҗе…ңеә•зӯ–з•Ҙ
- дёҚеңЁиҝҷдёҖиҪ®е…ҲеҒҡиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖз»ҶзІ’еәҰзј–иҫ‘еҷЁ

- дёҚеңЁиҝҷдёҖиҪ®е…ҲеҒҡиҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖз»ҶзІ’еәҰзј–иҫ‘еҷЁ
- дёҚеңЁиҝҷдёҖиҪ®е…ҲжҠҠвҖңfast жЁЎејҸгҖҒе°ҒйқўејҖе…ігҖҒеӯ—е№•ејҖе…івҖқеҒҡжҲҗжңҖз»Ҳз”ЁжҲ·иЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
- дёҚжҠҠ OpenClaw skill зӣҙжҺҘеҒҡжҲҗе”ҜдёҖе…ҘеҸЈ
- дёҚжҠҠжҹҗдёҖдёӘе№іеҸ°зҡ„ skill ж јејҸеҶҷжӯ»иҝӣ CloneCut еҶ…ж ё

йңҖиҰҒйўқеӨ–иҜҙжҳҺпјҡ

- еҪ“еүҚжөӢиҜ•е·Ій”Ғе®ҡзҡ„ `strict_rejected`гҖҒ`timeline_fallback`гҖҒ`copy_fallback`гҖҒ`rule_based` зӯүиЎҢдёәпјҢеңЁзӯүд»·жӣҝд»ЈеҘ‘зәҰе»әз«ӢеүҚд»ҚжҢүжӯЈејҸиЎҢдёәеӨ„зҗҶ
- ж–№жЎҲBзҰҒжӯўзҡ„жҳҜж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•пјҢдёҚжҳҜзҰҒжӯўж–°дё»й“ҫе…·еӨҮжҳҺзЎ®еӨұиҙҘе’ҢеҸҜи§ӮжөӢдҝқжҠӨ

## 11. еҗҺзҪ®иғҪеҠӣеұӮи§„еҲ’

еңЁж–№жЎҲBдё»й“ҫзЁіе®ҡеҗҺпјҢеҶҚиҝӣе…Ҙд»ҘдёӢиғҪеҠӣпјҡ

1. `fast` / `standard` / `full` зӯүжү§иЎҢжЎЈдҪҚ
2. иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№зҡ„жҳ е°„
3. вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘гҖҒдёҚеҠ еӯ—е№•гҖҒдёҚеҠ е°ҒйқўвҖқзӯүз”ЁжҲ·еҸҜжҺ§иғҪеҠӣ
4. е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳз”ҹжҲҗзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
5. жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰзҡ„жҖ§иғҪзӣ‘жҺ§дёҺжү№йҮҸд»»еҠЎдјҳеҢ–

иҝҷдәӣйғҪдёҚеә”е…ҲдәҺдё»й“ҫж”¶ж•ӣе®һж–ҪгҖӮ

## 12. еҪ“еүҚз»“и®ә

ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„жӯЈзЎ®ж–№еҗ‘е·Із»ҸжҳҺзЎ®пјҡ

> дёҚжҳҜз»§з»ӯеҢ…ж—§й“ҫи·ҜпјҢд№ҹдёҚжҳҜжҠҠ OpenClaw еҪ“жҲҗе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё»пјҢиҖҢжҳҜжҠҠ `domain/video/pipeline.py + domain/video/stages/` зңҹжӯЈеҒҡжҲҗе№іеҸ°ж— е…ізҡ„е”ҜдёҖдё»й“ҫпјҢе№¶жҠҠеёёй©»еҶ…еӯҳйў„зғӯиғҪеҠӣж”¶ж•ӣеҲ° worker иҝӣзЁӢеҶ…йғЁгҖӮ

иҝҷжқЎи·ҜзәҝеҗҢж—¶ж»Ўи¶ідҪ жҸҗеҮәзҡ„дёүдёӘе…ій”®иҰҒжұӮпјҡ

- е…ҲжҠҠеүҚдёҖйҳ¶ж®өдҝ®ж”№зӢ¬з«ӢжҸҗдәӨ
- ж–°йҳ¶ж®өдёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ёе…ңеә•ж–№жЎҲ
- з”ЁжңҖдҪіе®һи·өи§ЈеҶіеӣәе®ҡеҶ·еҗҜеҠЁпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜз»§з»ӯеҠ еҢ…иЈ…еұӮ

 9. ж·»еҠ е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳ
 10. ж•ҙзҗҶе№¶еӣһдј жңҖз»Ҳдә§зү©
+
+### еҪ“еүҚзҠ¶жҖҒпјҲ2026-03-29пјү
+
+жҲӘиҮі 2026-03-29пјҢж–№жЎҲBдё»й“ҫж”¶еҸЈе·Іеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗпјҡ
+
+- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚпјҢ`VideoPipeline` е·ІжҲҗдёә worker зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„
+- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°пјҢ`/ready` зҡ„ `scope` е·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `video_pipeline`
+- CloneCut е·Іж”¶ж•ӣеҮә canonical API/CLI е…ҘеҸЈпјҡ`apps/api/task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+- еҜ№еӨ–зЁіе®ҡз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·ІеҲҮдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈеӣәе®ҡдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈпјҢж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper дёҺ `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·Ід»Һжҙ»еҠЁд»Јз ҒдёӯдёӢзәҝ
+- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` зҡ„ canonical CLI smoke дёҺ OpenClaw helper smoke еқҮе·ІйҖҡиҝҮ
+
+еӣ жӯӨпјҢеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өе·Із»ҸдёҚеҶҚжҳҜвҖңдё»й“ҫиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®© MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool йғҪжҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқгҖӮ
@@
 е»әи®®з»ҹдёҖиҗҪеңЁпјҡ
 
 - `StageResult`
 - `PipelineContext`
 - `PipelineArtifacts`
-- `render_manifest` / `openclaw_result`
+- `render_manifest` / `task_result`
@@
-иҝҷйҮҢе…ҲжҳҺзЎ®дёӨеұӮиҫ№з•Ңпјҡ
-
-- CloneCut зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡеҸӘе…Ғи®ёиө° `VideoPipeline`
-- д»“еә“зә§еҺҶеҸІжү§иЎҢе…ҘеҸЈпјҡдҫӢеҰӮ `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`пјҢйңҖиҰҒеҚ•зӢ¬еЈ°жҳҺжҳҜвҖңиҝҒз§»жңҹе…је®№вҖқиҝҳжҳҜвҖңжӯЈејҸеәҹејғвҖқ
-
-еҪ“еүҚжҺЁиҚҗеҸЈеҫ„жҳҜпјҡ
-
-- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫ
-- жҳҜеҗҰд»Һж•ҙдёӘд»“еә“е®Ңе…Ёз§»йҷӨпјҢдҪңдёәеҚ•зӢ¬иҝҒз§»еҶізӯ–еӨ„зҗҶ
-- еҰӮжһңеҶіе®ҡеҪ»еә•еәҹејғпјҢеҝ…йЎ»еңЁж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒй…ҚзҪ®е’ҢеҸ‘еёғиҜҙжҳҺдёӯжҳҺзЎ®иҝҷжҳҜдёҖж¬Ўжңүж„Ҹзҡ„еҠҹиғҪж”¶зј©пјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜж— ж„ҸеӣһеҪ’
+иҝҷйҮҢеҪ“еүҚе·Із»ҸжҳҺзЎ®дёәзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡ
+
+- CloneCut зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„пјҡеҸӘе…Ғи®ёиө° `VideoPipeline`
+- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` е·ІдёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫпјҢдё”зӣёе…і `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·Ід»Һжҙ»еҠЁд»Јз Ғдёӯз§»йҷӨ
+- ж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper е·ІдёӢзәҝпјҢеҪ“еүҚеҜ№еӨ– canonical е…ҘеҸЈеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_client` / `clonecut_task_client.py` / `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- дёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷвҖңиҝҒз§»жңҹе…је®№еҲ«еҗҚвҖқдҪңдёәеҪ“еүҚдё»и®ҫи®Ўзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶ
@@
   -> CloneCut йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈпјҲHTTP API / CLIпјү
   -> apps/worker/service.py
   -> domain/video/pipeline.py
   -> domain/video/stages/stage0~stage9
   -> output/<task_id>/artifacts
-  -> ж ҮеҮҶз»“жһңеҜ№иұЎпјҲopenclaw_result / render_manifest / schema_versionпјү
+  -> ж ҮеҮҶз»“жһңеҜ№иұЎпјҲtask_result / render_manifest / schema_versionпјү
   -> и°ғз”Ёж–№иҜ»еҸ–ж ҮеҮҶз»“жһң
 ```
@@
 ## 8. ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„жү§иЎҢйЎәеәҸ
+
+еҪ“еүҚзңҹе®һйҳ¶ж®өиҜҙжҳҺпјҡ
+
+- йҳ¶ж®ө1пҪһйҳ¶ж®ө8дёӯзҡ„дё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫйЎ№е·Із»Ҹеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗ
+- еҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷж ёеҝғе·ҘдҪңжҳҜйҳ¶ж®ө6дёӯзҡ„вҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢвҖқдёҺе°‘йҮҸиЎҘе……йӘҢиҜҒ
+- еҗҺз»ӯдёҚеҶҚеӣһеҲ°вҖңж—§й“ҫиғҪеҗҰз»§з»ӯе…ңеә•вҖқзҡ„и®Ёи®әпјҢй»ҳи®Өд»ҘеҪ“еүҚзЎ¬еҲҮеҗҺзҡ„ canonical е…ҘеҸЈе’Ңз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰдёәеҮҶ
 
 ### йҳ¶ж®ө1пјҡжҒўеӨҚеҸҜеҜје…Ҙзҡ„еҶ…зҪ®жөҒж°ҙзәҝйӘЁжһ¶
@@
 ### йҳ¶ж®ө8пјҡз§»йҷӨж—§дё»й“ҫдҫқиө–
 
 зӣ®ж Үпјҡ
 
 - жё…зҗҶ worker еҜ№ж—§ `pre/main/pipeline.py` зҡ„иҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–
 - дёӢзәҝ `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дё»з”ЁйҖ”
+- дёӢзәҝж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper дёҺ `adapters/video_pipeline/**`
 - жӣҙж–°ж–ҮжЎЈдёҺй…ҚзҪ®ж ·дҫӢ
@@
-## 12. еҪ“еүҚз»“и®ә
-
-ж–№жЎҲBзҡ„жӯЈзЎ®ж–№еҗ‘е·Із»ҸжҳҺзЎ®пјҡ
-
-> дёҚжҳҜз»§з»ӯеҢ…ж—§й“ҫи·ҜпјҢд№ҹдёҚжҳҜжҠҠ OpenClaw еҪ“жҲҗе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё»пјҢиҖҢжҳҜжҠҠ `domain/video/pipeline.py + domain/video/stages/` зңҹжӯЈеҒҡжҲҗе№іеҸ°ж— е…ізҡ„е”ҜдёҖдё»й“ҫпјҢе№¶жҠҠеёёй©»еҶ…еӯҳйў„зғӯиғҪеҠӣж”¶ж•ӣеҲ° worker иҝӣзЁӢеҶ…йғЁгҖӮ
-
-иҝҷжқЎи·ҜзәҝеҗҢж—¶ж»Ўи¶ідҪ жҸҗеҮәзҡ„дёүдёӘе…ій”®иҰҒжұӮпјҡ
-
-- е…ҲжҠҠеүҚдёҖйҳ¶ж®өдҝ®ж”№зӢ¬з«ӢжҸҗдәӨ
-- ж–°йҳ¶ж®өдёҚеҶҚдҪҝз”Ёе…ңеә•ж–№жЎҲ
-- з”ЁжңҖдҪіе®һи·өи§ЈеҶіеӣәе®ҡеҶ·еҗҜеҠЁпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜз»§з»ӯеҠ еҢ…иЈ…еұӮ
+## 12. еҪ“еүҚз»“и®ә
+
+жҲӘиҮі 2026-03-29пјҢж–№жЎҲBзҡ„ж ёеҝғз»“и®әе·Із»Ҹд»ҺвҖңж–№еҗ‘зЎ®и®ӨвҖқиҝӣе…ҘвҖңж”¶еҸЈзЎ®и®ӨвҖқпјҡ
+
+> `domain/video/pipeline.py + domain/video/stages/` е·Із»ҸжҲҗдёә CloneCut зҡ„е№іеҸ°ж— е…іе”ҜдёҖдё»й“ҫпјӣworker е·ІеҲҮеҲ°еҶ…зҪ®дё»й“ҫпјҢcanonical API/CLI дёҺ `task_result` еҘ‘зәҰе·ІиҗҪең°пјҢеҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷйҮҚзӮ№жҳҜиЎҘйҪҗе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜжҒўеӨҚд»»дҪ•ж—§й“ҫе…је®№еұӮгҖӮ
+
+еҪ“еүҚе·ІзЎ®и®Өе®ҢжҲҗпјҡ
+
+- `VideoPipeline` дё»й“ҫжү“йҖҡ
+- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶иҗҪең°
+- canonical API/CLI дёҺ `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result` иҗҪең°
+- OpenClaw ж”№дёәйҖҡиҝҮ canonical е…ҘеҸЈи°ғз”Ё
+- ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–дёҺж—§ adapter/client/wrapper дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІдёӢзәҝ
+- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` smoke е·ІйӘҢиҜҒйҖҡиҝҮ
+
+еҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷж ёеҝғд»»еҠЎпјҡ
+
+- жҠҠ MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool еҰӮдҪ•еӨҚз”ЁеҗҢдёҖе…ҘеҸЈеҶҷжё…жҘҡ
+- жҠҠеӨұиҙҘеҸҜи§ӮжөӢжҖ§дёҺе№іеҸ°дҫ§иҜ»еҸ–еҸЈеҫ„иЎҘиҝӣж–ҮжЎЈ
+- иЎҘи·‘е°‘йҮҸеү©дҪҷжөӢиҜ•е№¶жҢүд»Јз ҒгҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒMemory еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨ

*** Add File: docs/ж–№жЎҲBжү§иЎҢеҫ…еҠһжё…еҚ•.md
+# ж–№жЎҲBжү§иЎҢеҫ…еҠһжё…еҚ•
+
+## еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®ө
+
+- еҪ“еүҚе·ҘдҪңеҲҶж”Ҝпјҡ`feat/openclaw-pipeline-plan-b`
+- еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өе·Із»Ҹд»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқ
+- еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқзҡ„й—®йўҳпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠиҫ№з•ҢиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®©жӣҙеӨҡе№іеҸ°жҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқ
+- еҪ“еүҚз»§з»ӯйҮҮз”ЁзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡдёҚжҒўеӨҚ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚпјҢдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ adapter/runner еӣһеҲ°дё»и·Ҝеҫ„
+
+## еҪ“еүҚдәӢе®һеҹәзәҝ
+
+- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚпјҢ`VideoPipeline` е·ІжҲҗдёә worker зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„
+- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°пјҢ`/ready` зҡ„ `scope` е·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `video_pipeline`
+- canonical API/CLI е·ІиҗҪең°пјҡ
+  - `apps/api/task_client.py`
+  - `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
+  - `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+- canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈеӣәе®ҡдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈпјҢж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper дёҺ `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·ІдёӢзәҝ
+- ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–дёҺ `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дё»з”ЁйҖ”е·Ід»ҺйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„з§»йҷӨ
+- focused suite е·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ
+  - `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_monitor_mock_e2e.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py`
+  - `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
+  - `tests/integration/test_worker_api_contract.py`
+  - `tests/integration/test_worker_api_integration.py`
+- smoke йӘҢиҜҒе·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ
+  - canonical CLI е®һзғҹпјҡ`D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`
+  - OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹ
+  - `/ready` иҝ”еӣһ `ready=true` дё” `scope=video_pipeline`
+
+## йҮҢзЁӢзў‘зҠ¶жҖҒ
+
+- [x] M1пјҡж–№жЎҲBдё»ж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒжү§иЎҢжё…еҚ•гҖҒдёҠеұӮзј–жҺ’еӯҗи§„иҢғе»әз«Ӣ
+- [x] M2пјҡ`domain/video/stages/` йӘЁжһ¶жҒўеӨҚпјҢ`domain.video.pipeline` еҸҜеҜје…Ҙ
+- [x] M3пјҡдё»й“ҫ stage иҝҒз§»е®ҢжҲҗе№¶йҖҡиҝҮ focused suite
+- [x] M4пјҡworker иө„жәҗз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹгҖҒе№¶еҸ‘жІ»зҗҶдёҺ ready дҝЎеҸ·иҗҪең°
+- [x] M5пјҡworker йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„еҲҮеҲ° `VideoPipeline`
+- [x] M6пјҡcanonical API/CLI йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈдёҺз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰиҗҪең°
+- [x] M7пјҡOpenClaw skill / wrapper ж”№дёәйҖҡиҝҮйҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈи°ғз”Ё
+- [x] M8пјҡ`D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` з«ҜеҲ°з«Ҝи·‘йҖҡж–°дё»й“ҫ
+- [x] M9пјҡж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–дёӢзәҝ
+- [ ] M10пјҡе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢгҖҒеү©дҪҷжөӢиҜ•иЎҘи·‘гҖҒжҢүеҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨжҺЁйҖҒ
+
+## е·Іе®ҢжҲҗж”¶еҸЈ
+
+### Phase 0пјҡеҶ»з»“ж–№жЎҲBиҫ№з•Ң
+
+- [x] еӣәе®ҡеҚ•дёҖи·Ҝеҫ„гҖҒзҰҒжӯўж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•гҖҒworker еҶ…еёёй©»йў„зғӯзҡ„иҫ№з•Ң
+- [x] жҳҺзЎ® OpenClaw еҸӘжҳҜз¬¬дёҖеұӮйҖӮй…Қе№іеҸ°пјҢдёҚжҳҜзі»з»ҹе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё»
+- [x] жҳҺзЎ® Redis з»§з»ӯйҮҮз”Ёе®ҝдё»жңәжңҚеҠЎеҢ–ж–№ејҸ
+
+### Phase 1пјҡжҒўеӨҚ `domain/video/stages/`
+
+- [x] `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚ
+- [x] `domain.video.pipeline` е·ІеҸҜеҜје…Ҙе№¶иҝӣе…ҘжӯЈејҸиҝҗиЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„
+- [x] `StageResult` / manifest / stage artifacts еҹәзЎҖеҘ‘зәҰе·ІиҗҪең°
+
+### Phase 2пјҡиҝҒз§»дё»й“ҫ stages
+
+- [x] дё»й“ҫжүҖйңҖ stage е·ІиҝҒз§»еҲ°еҶ…зҪ®дё»й“ҫ
+- [x] `stage4_asr`гҖҒ`stage8_cover` зӯүе…ій”®еҘ‘зәҰе·ІеҜ№йҪҗ focused suite
+- [x] `task_result` / `render_manifest` жүҖйңҖ artifacts е·ІзЁіе®ҡиҫ“еҮә
+
+### Phase 3пјҡз»ҹдёҖ worker еҶ…еёёй©»иө„жәҗз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹ
+
+- [x] worker еҗҜеҠЁжңҹйў„зғӯе·ІиҗҪең°
+- [x] `/ready` е·Ід»Ҙ `video_pipeline` дёәдҪңз”ЁеҹҹжҡҙйңІ readiness
+- [x] йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫе·Іе…·еӨҮе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶дёҺиө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶ
+
+### Phase 4пјҡеҲҮжҚў worker дё»жү§иЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„
+
+- [x] worker зңҹе®һи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎзӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ё `VideoPipeline`
+- [x] йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫдёҚеҶҚи°ғз”Ёж—§ `pre/main/pipeline.py`
+- [x] `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дёҚеҶҚжүҝжӢ…дё»жү§иЎҢеҷЁиҒҢиҙЈ
+
+### Phase 5пјҡж”¶ж•ӣе№іеҸ°ж— е…ійҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈ
+
+- [x] HTTP API е·ІжҡҙйңІзЁіе®ҡ `task_result`
+- [x] CLI е·Іж”¶ж•ӣеҲ° `clonecut_task_client.py` / `clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
+- [x] `result_url` е·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [x] `task_result` / `render_manifest` е·ІеёҰ `schema_version=1.0`
+
+### Phase 6пјҡSkill / Wrapper йҖӮй…ҚеұӮ
+
+- [x] OpenClaw skill е·Іж”№дёәи°ғз”Ё canonical API/CLI
+- [x] shell wrapper е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical client
+- [ ] MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill зҡ„жӯЈејҸеӨҚз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺд»ҚйңҖиЎҘе®Ң
+
+### Phase 7пјҡOpenClaw з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜйӘҢиҜҒ
+
+- [x] canonical CLI еҜ№ `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` е®һзғҹйҖҡиҝҮ
+- [x] OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹйҖҡиҝҮ
+- [x] дё»жҲҗзүҮгҖҒеӯ—е№•гҖҒе°ҒйқўгҖҒи„ҡжң¬гҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—еӣһдј й“ҫи·Ҝе·ІйӘҢиҜҒ
+- [ ] е®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw smoke checklist еҰӮжңүйңҖиҰҒеҸҜеҶҚиЎҘи·‘дёҖиҪ®
+
+### Phase 8пјҡжё…зҗҶж—§дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–
+
+- [x] ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–е·Ід»Һдё»и·Ҝеҫ„з§»йҷӨ
+- [x] `apps/api/openclaw_client.py` е·ІдёӢзәҝ
+- [x] `scripts/openclaw_task_client.py` / `scripts/openclaw_run_clonecut_task.ps1` е·ІдёӢзәҝ
+- [x] `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·Із§»йҷӨ
+- [x] `config/settings.yaml.example` е·ІеҗҢжӯҘзЎ¬еҲҮеҗҺзҡ„й…ҚзҪ®еҸЈеҫ„
+
+## еҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷд»»еҠЎ
+
+### 1. е№іеҸ°еӨҚз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®Ң
+
+- [ ] еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯжҳҺзЎ® MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool еҰӮдҪ•еӨҚз”Ё canonical `task_client` дёҺ `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- [ ] жҳҺзЎ® Windows hostгҖҒDocker/Linux workspaceгҖҒmacOS host дёүзұ»и°ғз”Ёе»әи®®
+- [ ] жҳҺзЎ®вҖңж—§ `openclaw_result` / ж—§ wrapper е·ІйҖҖеңәпјҢеҪ“еүҚд»Ҙ `task_result` дёәеҮҶвҖқзҡ„зЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„
+
+### 2. еӨұиҙҘеҸҜи§ӮжөӢжҖ§иҜҙжҳҺиЎҘејә
+
+- [ ] еңЁе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺдёӯжҳҺзЎ®еӨұиҙҘж—¶дјҳе…ҲиҜ»еҸ– `task_result.status`
+- [ ] жҳҺзЎ®з»“еҗҲ `render_manifest`гҖҒ`failed_stage`гҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—еј•з”Ёе®ҡдҪҚеӨұиҙҘ stageпјҢиҖҢдёҚеҸӘжҳҜзңӢиҝӣзЁӢзә§еӨұиҙҘ
+
+### 3. еү©дҪҷйӘҢиҜҒ
+
+- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py -q`
+- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py -q`
+- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py -q`
+- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py -q`
+- [ ] еҰӮжңүйңҖиҰҒпјҢиЎҘе®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw + CloneCut smoke checklist
+
+### 4. жҸҗдәӨзӯ–з•Ҙ
+
+- [ ] жҢү `feat` / `docs` / `chore(memory)` еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨ
+- [ ] жҺЁйҖҒеҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜеҲ° GitHub
+
+## еҗҺзҪ®дјҳеҢ–еҫ…еҠһпјҲдё»й“ҫе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺеҶҚеҒҡпјү
+
+- [ ] `fast` / `standard` / `full`
+- [ ] иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№жҳ е°„
+- [ ] вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘ / еӯ—е№• / е°ҒйқўвҖқиғҪеҠӣиЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
+- [ ] е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
+- [ ] жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰжҖ§иғҪжҢҮж ҮдёҺжү№еӨ„зҗҶдјҳеҢ–
+
+## ж–№жЎҲBзәўзәҝ
+
+- [ ] дёҚж–°еўһд»»дҪ•ж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•жү§иЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„
+- [ ] дёҚйҮҚж–°еј•е…Ҙ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚдҪңдёәжӯЈејҸдё»еҘ‘зәҰ
+- [ ] дёҚй•ҝжңҹз»ҙжҢҒж–°ж—§еҸҢдё»й“ҫе№¶еӯҳ
+- [ ] дёҚжҠҠвҖңжҳҺзЎ®еӨұиҙҘгҖҒstrict жӢ’з»қгҖҒmanifest з•ҷз—•гҖҒready/health дҝЎеҸ·вҖқиҜҜеҲ жҲҗвҖңжІЎжңүдҝқжҠӨвҖқ
+- [ ] дёҚеңЁдё»й“ҫе·Іж”¶еҸЈеҗҺйҮҚж–°еӣһйҖҖеҲ°е№іеҸ°дё“еұһе…ҘеҸЈ
*** Update File: docs/и§Ҷйў‘еӨ„зҗҶSkillж··еҗҲзј–жҺ’ж–№жЎҲ.md
@@
 жҲӘиҮіеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өпјҢйЎ№зӣ®зҺ°е®һеҹәзәҝеҰӮдёӢпјҡ
 
-- еҪ“еүҚзңҹе®һе·Іи·‘йҖҡй“ҫи·Ҝд»Қз”ұж—§ `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py` й©ұеҠЁ
-- OpenClaw е·ІеҸҜйҖҡиҝҮзҺ°жңү API/worker дёҠдј и§Ҷйў‘гҖҒи§ҰеҸ‘ CloneCut еӨ„зҗҶе№¶еҸ–еӣһз»“жһң
-- еҪ“еүҚзӣ®ж Үжһ¶жһ„дёҚжҳҜз»§з»ӯеҢ…иЈ…ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫпјҢиҖҢжҳҜиҪ¬еҗ‘ `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/` зҡ„еҚ•дёҖз”ҹдә§дё»й“ҫ
-- `domain/video/stages/` еҪ“еүҚзјәеӨұпјҢ`VideoPipeline` иҝҳдёҚжҳҜеҸҜзӣҙжҺҘеҲҮжҚўзҡ„з”ҹдә§е®һзҺ°
+- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚпјҢworker йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІеҲҮеҲ° `domain/video/pipeline.py`
+- OpenClaw е·ІйҖҡиҝҮ canonical API/CLI и°ғз”Ё CloneCutпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзӣҙиҝһеҶ…йғЁе®һзҺ°
+- еҪ“еүҚзЁіе®ҡз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`
+- з»“жһңиҜ»еҸ–жҺҘеҸЈе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
+- ж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper дёҺ `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·ІдёӢзәҝ
 - Redis з»§з»ӯжҢүе®ҝдё»жңәжңҚеҠЎеҢ–ж–№ејҸиҝҗиЎҢпјҢдёҚд»Ҙ Docker дҪңдёәжңӘжқҘеүҚжҸҗ
@@
-### 6.5 е…је®№зҺ°жңү `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest`
+### 6.5 еҪ“еүҚ canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰпјҡ`task_result` / `render_manifest`
 
-еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өдёҚжҳҜжҠӣејғзҺ°жңүз»“жһңеҚҸи®®пјҢиҖҢжҳҜпјҡ
+еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өзҡ„жӯЈејҸеҸЈеҫ„жҳҜпјҡ
 
-- еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңү `openclaw_result` дёҺ `render_manifest` йҖҗжӯҘиЎҘйҪҗ `schema_version`
-- е°Ҷеӯ—ж®өеҗ«д№үеҶҷе®һгҖҒеҶҷжё…
-- йҖҡиҝҮеҘ‘зәҰжөӢиҜ•дҝқжҠӨе…је®№жј”иҝӣ
+- `task_result` жҳҜе№іеҸ°дҫ§иҜ»еҸ–д»»еҠЎз»“жһңзҡ„ canonical еҜ№иұЎ
+- `render_manifest` з»§з»ӯжүҝжӢ… artifacts дёҺйҳ¶ж®өз•ҷз—•зҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–з»“жһңи§’иүІ
+- дёӨиҖ…йғҪеә”дҝқжҢҒ `schema_version`
+- йҖҡиҝҮеҘ‘зәҰжөӢиҜ•дҝқжҠӨеӯ—ж®өдёҺе‘ҪеҗҚзЁіе®ҡ
 
 жңҖдҪіе®һи·өиҰҒжұӮпјҡ
 
-- еӨ–йғЁйҖӮй…ҚеұӮеңЁе…је®№жңҹеҶ…еҸҜд»Ҙз»§з»ӯиҜ»еҸ– `openclaw_result`
-- ж–°еўһиғҪеҠӣдјҳе…Ҳж”¶ж•ӣеҲ°жӯЈејҸзүҲжң¬еҢ–еӯ—ж®ө
+- еӨ–йғЁйҖӮй…ҚеұӮз»ҹдёҖиҜ»еҸ– `task_result`пјҢдёҚеҶҚд»Ҙ `openclaw_result` дҪңдёәжӯЈејҸзӣ®ж Ү
+- ж–°еўһиғҪеҠӣдјҳе…Ҳж”¶ж•ӣеҲ°жӯЈејҸзүҲжң¬еҢ–еӯ—ж®ө
 - дёҚе…Ғи®ёж–°е№іеҸ°з»§з»ӯдҫқиө–вҖңеҶ…йғЁж–Үд»¶еҗҚзҢңжөӢвҖқејҸзәҰе®ҡ
@@
 ### 8.5 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`
 
 `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫгҖӮ
 
-дҪҶе®ғжҳҜеҗҰд»“еә“зә§еҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨпјҢдёҚеңЁжң¬и§„иҢғдёӯйҡҗеҗ«еҶіе®ҡпјҢиҖҢеә”дҪңдёәеҗҺз»ӯжё…зҗҶйҳ¶ж®өзҡ„жҳҫејҸиҝҒз§»еҶізӯ–пјҢе№¶еҗҢжӯҘз»ҷеҮәпјҡ
-
-- й…ҚзҪ®иҝҒз§»иҜҙжҳҺ
-- жҳҜеҗҰдҝқз•ҷе…је®№ејҖе…і
-- еәҹејғи·Ҝеҫ„
-- еӣһж”¶ж—¶зӮ№
+еҪ“еүҚд»“еә“е·Із»ҸйҮҮз”ЁзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡ
+
+- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` зӣёе…і `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·Ід»Һжҙ»еҠЁд»Јз Ғдёӯз§»йҷӨ
+- ж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper е·ІеҗҢжӯҘдёӢзәҝ
+- е№іеҸ°дҫ§з»ҹдёҖеӨҚз”Ё canonical API/CLIпјҢдёҚеҶҚдҝқз•ҷиҝҷдёҖеұӮе…је®№е…ҘеҸЈ
@@
 1. ж–№жЎҲ B зҡ„з”ҹдә§дё»й“ҫжҳҜ `domain/video/pipeline.py` + `domain/video/stages/`
 2. OpenClaw еҸӘжҳҜз¬¬дёҖеұӮ Skill йҖӮй…Қе№іеҸ°пјҢдёҚжҳҜзі»з»ҹе”ҜдёҖе®ҝдё»
 3. жһ¶жһ„йҮҮз”ЁдёүеұӮз»“жһ„пјҡж ёеҝғиғҪеҠӣеұӮгҖҒAPI/CLI йҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈеұӮгҖҒSkill/Wrapper йҖӮй…ҚеұӮ
 4. зҰҒжӯўж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•пјҢдҪҶдҝқз•ҷжҳҫејҸеӨұиҙҘгҖҒstrict жӢ’з»қгҖҒmanifest з•ҷз—•е’Ң ready/health зӯүиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҝқжҠӨ
 5. `task_spec` жҳҜзӣ®ж Үжү§иЎҢзңҹзӣёпјҢдҪҶеә”еҹәдәҺзҺ°жңү API з»“жһңеҚҸи®®йҖҗжӯҘж”¶ж•ӣ
 6. `Developer` жЁЎејҸдёҚиҝӣе…ҘеҪ“еүҚ V1 иҢғеӣҙ
-7. `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫпјҢдҪҶжҳҜеҗҰеҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨз•ҷеҫ…еҗҺз»ӯеҚ•зӢ¬еҶізӯ–
+7. еҪ“еүҚ canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰжҳҜ `task_result` + `render_manifest`
+8. `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter`гҖҒж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper е·Ід»Һжҙ»еҠЁд»Јз Ғдёӯз§»йҷӨпјҢдёҚеҶҚдҪңдёәе…је®№е…ҘеҸЈдҝқз•ҷ
@@
 1. `task_spec` зҡ„жңҖе°Ҹеӯ—ж®өйӣҶе…Ҳж”¶еӨҡе°Ҹ
 2. `progress_event` е…ҲйҮҮз”ЁиҪ®иҜўејҸж”¶ж•ӣиҝҳжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘиҝӣе…Ҙжӣҙејәзҡ„дәӢд»¶йҖҡйҒ“
-3. `openclaw_result` / `render_manifest` зҡ„ schema/version еҰӮдҪ•жј”иҝӣ
+3. `task_result` / `render_manifest` зҡ„ schema/version еҰӮдҪ•жј”иҝӣ
 4. `Quick` жЁЎејҸдёӢе“ӘдәӣйЈҺйҷ©еҸӘжҸҗзӨәгҖҒе“ӘдәӣйЈҺйҷ©еҝ…йЎ»зӣҙжҺҘеӨұиҙҘ
 5. `Developer` жЁЎејҸжҳҜеҗҰжӢҶжҲҗеҚ•зӢ¬еҗҺз»ӯж–ҮжЎЈ
*** Add File: Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v4.md
+# йЎ№зӣ®еҫ…еҠһ
+
+## з»‘е®ҡдҝЎжҒҜ
+- зӣ®ж ҮзүҲжң¬: goal_v2
+- еҫ…еҠһзүҲжң¬: v2_4
+- еҲӣе»әж—Ҙжңҹ: 2026-03-29
+- зҠ¶жҖҒ: еҪ“еүҚз”ҹж•Ҳ
+
+## еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өз»“и®ә
+- дё»й“ҫж”¶еҸЈеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗпјҢеҪ“еүҚе·Ід»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқгҖӮ
+- еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠиҫ№з•ҢиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®©жӣҙеӨҡе№іеҸ°жҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өгҖӮ
+- ж–№жЎҲBз»§з»ӯдҝқжҢҒзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡдёҚжҒўеӨҚ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚпјҢдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ adapter/runner еӣһеҲ°дё»и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
+
+## е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ
+- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚгҖӮ
+- worker йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІеҲҮеҲ° `VideoPipeline`гҖӮ
+- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°гҖӮ
+- canonical API/CLI е·ІиҗҪең°пјҡ`apps/api/task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`гҖӮ
+- canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`гҖӮ
+- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
+- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` зҡ„ canonical CLI е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+- OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+- `/ready` е·ІжҳҺзЎ®дёә `scope=video_pipeline`гҖӮ
+- Phase 8 ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе·Іе®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ
+- `adapters/video_pipeline/`гҖҒ`apps/api/openclaw_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/openclaw_*` зӯүж—§е…ҘеҸЈе·ІдёӢзәҝгҖӮ
+- focused suite е·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҢдё»й“ҫдёҺз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·ІжңүзЁіе®ҡйӘҢиҜҒеҹәзәҝгҖӮ
+
+## еҪ“еүҚиҝӣиЎҢдёӯ
+- иЎҘе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺпјҢжҳҺзЎ® MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool еҰӮдҪ•еӨҚз”Ё canonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
+- жҢүд»Јз ҒгҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒMemory еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨе№¶жҺЁйҖҒеҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ
+
+## еҫ…е®ҢжҲҗ
+- еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯеҶҷжё… Windows hostгҖҒDocker/Linux workspaceгҖҒmacOS host дёүзұ»жҺҘе…Ҙе»әи®®гҖӮ
+- еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯеҶҷжё…еӨұиҙҘж—¶дјҳе…ҲиҜ»еҸ– `task_result`гҖҒ`render_manifest`гҖҒ`failed_stage` / ж—Ҙеҝ—еј•з”ЁгҖӮ
+- иЎҘи·‘еү©дҪҷжөӢиҜ•пјҡ
+  - `tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py`
+  - `tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py`
+- еҰӮжңүйңҖиҰҒпјҢиЎҘе®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw + CloneCut smoke checklistгҖӮ
+
+## еҗҺзҪ®дјҳеҢ–еҫ…еҠһ
+- `fast` / `standard` / `full`
+- иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№жҳ е°„
+- вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘ / еӯ—е№• / е°ҒйқўвҖқиғҪеҠӣиЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
+- е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
+- жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰжҖ§иғҪжҢҮж ҮдёҺжү№еӨ„зҗҶдјҳеҢ–
+
+## еҸҳжӣҙи®°еҪ•
+- 2026-03-29: ж–№жЎҲBдё»й“ҫе®ҢжҲҗзЎ¬еҲҮеҗҢжӯҘпјҢworkerгҖҒcanonical API/CLIгҖҒ`task_result` еҘ‘зәҰгҖҒOpenClaw жҺҘе…ҘдёҺж—§дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе…ЁйғЁеҜ№йҪҗпјӣеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өеҲҮжҚўдёәе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢгҖӮ
*** Add File: Memory/03_chat_logs/2026-03-29_191823.md
+# 2026-03-29 19:18:23 дјҡиҜқи®°еҪ•
+
+---
+ж—¶й—ҙ: 2026-03-29 19:18:23
+з”ЁжҲ·: иҰҒжұӮзЎ®и®Ө worktree зҡ„еҸҳжӣҙе·Із»ҸеҗҢжӯҘеӣһеҪ“еүҚдё»зӣ®еҪ•пјҢе№¶еңЁдҝқжҢҒеҸҜеӣһйҖҖзҡ„еүҚжҸҗдёӢжү§иЎҢзЎ¬еҲҮпјҢдёҚиҰҒе…је®№ж–№жЎҲпјӣйҡҸеҗҺиҰҒжұӮжҠҠж–ҮжЎЈе’Ң Memory еҗҢжӯҘеҲ°еҪ“еүҚзңҹе®һзҠ¶жҖҒпјҢе№¶жҠҠдҝ®ж”№жҢүзұ»еҲ«жҸҗдәӨеҲ° GitHubгҖӮ
+еҠ©жүӢ: е·ІзЎ®и®ӨеҪ“еүҚе·ҘдҪңзӣ®еҪ•дёә `D:\clonecut` зҡ„ `feat/openclaw-pipeline-plan-b` еҲҶж”ҜпјӣеҗҢжӯҘдәҶ worktree еҶ…зҡ„зЎ¬еҲҮд»Јз ҒеҲ°дё»зӣ®еҪ•пјҢеҲӣе»әеӣһйҖҖеҲҶж”Ҝ `rollback/hard-cut-task-result-sync-20260329-185116` дёҺж–Үд»¶еӨҮд»Ҫзӣ®еҪ•гҖӮе·ІйӘҢиҜҒ focused suiteгҖҒ`/ready`гҖҒcanonical CLIгҖҒ`D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` smoke дёҺ OpenClaw helper smokeпјҢзЎ®и®ӨеҪ“еүҚ canonical еҗҲзәҰдёә `task_result` + `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`пјҢж—§ `openclaw_*` / adapter дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІдёӢзәҝгҖӮйҡҸеҗҺеҗҢжӯҘ `docs/**`гҖҒ`Memory/02_todos/todo_goal_v2_v4.md` дёҺжң¬ж¬ЎдјҡиҜқи®°еҪ•пјҢдҪҝеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өжҳҺзЎ®дёәвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқпјҢе№¶еҮҶеӨҮжҢү `feat`гҖҒ`docs`гҖҒ`chore(memory)` еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨжҺЁйҖҒгҖӮ
*** End Patch

- еҪ“еүҚе·ҘдҪңеҲҶж”Ҝпјҡ`feat/openclaw-pipeline-plan-b`
- еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өе·Із»Ҹд»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқ
- еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқзҡ„й—®йўҳпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠиҫ№з•ҢиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®©жӣҙеӨҡе№іеҸ°жҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқ
- еҪ“еүҚз»§з»ӯйҮҮз”ЁзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡдёҚжҒўеӨҚ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚпјҢдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ adapter/runner еӣһеҲ°дё»и·Ҝеҫ„

## еҪ“еүҚдәӢе®һеҹәзәҝ

- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚпјҢ`VideoPipeline` е·ІжҲҗдёә worker зҡ„йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„
- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°пјҢ`/ready` зҡ„ `scope` е·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `video_pipeline`
- canonical API/CLI е·ІиҗҪең°пјҡ
  - `apps/api/task_client.py`
  - `scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`
  - `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`
- canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈеӣәе®ҡдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈпјҢж—§ `openclaw_*` client/wrapper дёҺ `adapters/video_pipeline/**` е·ІдёӢзәҝ
- ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–дёҺ `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дё»з”ЁйҖ”е·Ід»ҺйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„з§»йҷӨ
- focused suite е·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ
  - `tests/unit/test_task_client.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_video_pipeline.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_stage4_stage5.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_stage2_stage7_stage9.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_monitor_mock_e2e.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_worker_internal_pipeline_runner.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py`
  - `tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py`
  - `tests/integration/test_worker_api_contract.py`
  - `tests/integration/test_worker_api_integration.py`
- smoke йӘҢиҜҒе·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҡ
  - canonical CLI е®һзғҹпјҡ`D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`
  - OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹ
  - `/ready` иҝ”еӣһ `ready=true` дё” `scope=video_pipeline`

## е·Іе®ҢжҲҗж”¶еҸЈ

### Phase 0пјҡеҶ»з»“ж–№жЎҲBиҫ№з•Ң

- [x] еӣәе®ҡеҚ•дёҖи·Ҝеҫ„гҖҒзҰҒжӯўж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•гҖҒworker еҶ…еёёй©»йў„зғӯзҡ„иҫ№з•Ң

- [x] `domain.video.pipeline` е·ІеҸҜеҜје…Ҙе№¶иҝӣе…ҘжӯЈејҸиҝҗиЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„

- [x] `task_result` / `render_manifest` жүҖйңҖ artifacts е·ІзЁіе®ҡиҫ“еҮә

### Phase 3пјҡз»ҹдёҖ worker еҶ…еёёй©»иө„жәҗз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹ

- [x] worker еҗҜеҠЁжңҹйў„зғӯе·ІиҗҪең°

### Phase 4пјҡеҲҮжҚў worker дё»жү§иЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„

- [x] worker зңҹе®һи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎзӣҙжҺҘи°ғз”Ё `VideoPipeline`
- [x] йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫдёҚеҶҚи°ғз”Ёж—§ `pre/main/pipeline.py`
- [x] `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дёҚеҶҚжүҝжӢ…дё»жү§иЎҢеҷЁиҒҢиҙЈ

### Phase 5пјҡж”¶ж•ӣе№іеҸ°ж— е…ійҖҡз”Ёе…ҘеҸЈ

- [x] HTTP API е·ІжҡҙйңІзЁіе®ҡ `task_result`

- [x] `task_result` / `render_manifest` е·ІеёҰ `schema_version=1.0`

### Phase 6пјҡSkill / Wrapper йҖӮй…ҚеұӮ

- [x] OpenClaw skill е·Іж”№дёәи°ғз”Ё canonical API/CLI

- [ ] MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill зҡ„жӯЈејҸеӨҚз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺд»ҚйңҖиЎҘе®Ң

### Phase 7пјҡOpenClaw з«ҜеҲ°з«ҜйӘҢиҜҒ

## еҪ“еүҚеү©дҪҷд»»еҠЎ

### 1. е№іеҸ°еӨҚз”ЁиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®Ң

- [ ] еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯжҳҺзЎ® MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool еҰӮдҪ•еӨҚз”Ё canonical `task_client` дёҺ `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`
- [ ] жҳҺзЎ® Windows hostгҖҒDocker/Linux workspaceгҖҒmacOS host дёүзұ»и°ғз”Ёе»әи®®
- [ ] жҳҺзЎ®вҖңж—§ `openclaw_result` / ж—§ wrapper е·ІйҖҖеңәпјҢеҪ“еүҚд»Ҙ `task_result` дёәеҮҶвҖқзҡ„зЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„

### 2. еӨұиҙҘеҸҜи§ӮжөӢжҖ§иҜҙжҳҺиЎҘејә

- [ ] еңЁе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺдёӯжҳҺзЎ®еӨұиҙҘж—¶дјҳе…ҲиҜ»еҸ– `task_result.status`
- [ ] жҳҺзЎ®з»“еҗҲ `render_manifest`гҖҒ`failed_stage`гҖҒж—Ҙеҝ—еј•з”Ёе®ҡдҪҚеӨұиҙҘ stageпјҢиҖҢдёҚеҸӘжҳҜзңӢиҝӣзЁӢзә§еӨұиҙҘ

### 3. еү©дҪҷйӘҢиҜҒ

- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py -q`
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py -q`
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py -q`
- [ ] `pytest tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py -q`
- [ ] еҰӮжңүйңҖиҰҒпјҢиЎҘе®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw + CloneCut smoke checklist

### 4. жҸҗдәӨзӯ–з•Ҙ

- [ ] жҢү `feat` / `docs` / `chore(memory)` еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨ
- [ ] жҺЁйҖҒеҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜеҲ° GitHub

## еҗҺзҪ®дјҳеҢ–еҫ…еҠһпјҲдё»й“ҫе®ҢжҲҗеҗҺеҶҚеҒҡпјү

- [ ] `fast` / `standard` / `full`
- [ ] иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№жҳ е°„
- [ ] вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘ / еӯ—е№• / е°ҒйқўвҖқиғҪеҠӣиЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
- [ ] е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
- [ ] жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰжҖ§иғҪжҢҮж ҮдёҺжү№еӨ„зҗҶдјҳеҢ–

## ж–№жЎҲBзәўзәҝ

- [ ] дёҚж–°еўһд»»дҪ•ж—§жһ¶жһ„зә§е…ңеә•жү§иЎҢи·Ҝеҫ„
- [ ] дёҚйҮҚж–°еј•е…Ҙ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚдҪңдёәжӯЈејҸдё»еҘ‘зәҰ
- [ ] дёҚй•ҝжңҹз»ҙжҢҒж–°ж—§еҸҢдё»й“ҫе№¶еӯҳ
- [ ] дёҚжҠҠвҖңжҳҺзЎ®еӨұиҙҘгҖҒstrict жӢ’з»қгҖҒmanifest з•ҷз—•гҖҒready/health дҝЎеҸ·вҖқиҜҜеҲ жҲҗвҖңжІЎжңүдҝқжҠӨвҖқ
- [ ] дёҚеңЁдё»й“ҫе·Іж”¶еҸЈеҗҺйҮҚж–°еӣһйҖҖеҲ°е№іеҸ°дё“еұһе…ҘеҸЈ

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: # йЎ№зӣ®еҫ…еҠһ ## з»‘е®ҡдҝЎжҒҜ - зӣ®ж ҮзүҲжң¬: goal_v2 - еҫ…еҠһзүҲжң¬: v2_4 - еҲӣе»әж—Ҙжңҹ: 2026-03-29 - зҠ¶жҖҒ: еҪ“еүҚз”ҹж•Ҳ ## еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өз»“и®ә - дё»й“ҫж”¶еҸЈеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗпјҢеҪ“еүҚе·Ід»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқгҖӮ - еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘...

# йЎ№зӣ®еҫ…еҠһ

## з»‘е®ҡдҝЎжҒҜ
- зӣ®ж ҮзүҲжң¬: goal_v2
- еҫ…еҠһзүҲжң¬: v2_4
- еҲӣе»әж—Ҙжңҹ: 2026-03-29
- зҠ¶жҖҒ: еҪ“еүҚз”ҹж•Ҳ

## еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өз»“и®ә
- дё»й“ҫж”¶еҸЈеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗпјҢеҪ“еүҚе·Ід»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқгҖӮ
- еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠиҫ№з•ҢиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®©жӣҙеӨҡе№іеҸ°жҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өгҖӮ
- ж–№жЎҲBз»§з»ӯдҝқжҢҒзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡдёҚжҒўеӨҚ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚпјҢдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ adapter/runner еӣһеҲ°дё»и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ

## е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ
- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚгҖӮ
- worker йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІеҲҮеҲ° `VideoPipeline`гҖӮ
- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°гҖӮ
- canonical API/CLI е·ІиҗҪең°пјҡ`apps/api/task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`гҖӮ
- canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`гҖӮ
- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` зҡ„ canonical CLI е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
- OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
- `/ready` е·ІжҳҺзЎ®дёә `scope=video_pipeline`гҖӮ
- Phase 8 ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе·Іе®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ
- `adapters/video_pipeline/`гҖҒ`apps/api/openclaw_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/openclaw_*` зӯүж—§е…ҘеҸЈе·ІдёӢзәҝгҖӮ
- focused suite е·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҢдё»й“ҫдёҺз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·ІжңүзЁіе®ҡйӘҢиҜҒеҹәзәҝгҖӮ

## еҪ“еүҚиҝӣиЎҢдёӯ
- иЎҘе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺпјҢжҳҺзЎ® MCP / е…¶д»– agent skill / shell tool еҰӮдҪ•еӨҚз”Ё canonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
- жҢүд»Јз ҒгҖҒж–ҮжЎЈгҖҒMemory еҲҶзұ»жҸҗдәӨе№¶жҺЁйҖҒеҪ“еүҚеҲҶж”ҜгҖӮ

## еҫ…е®ҢжҲҗ
- еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯеҶҷжё… Windows hostгҖҒDocker/Linux workspaceгҖҒmacOS host дёүзұ»жҺҘе…Ҙе»әи®®гҖӮ
- еңЁж–ҮжЎЈдёӯеҶҷжё…еӨұиҙҘж—¶дјҳе…ҲиҜ»еҸ– `task_result`гҖҒ`render_manifest`гҖҒ`failed_stage` / ж—Ҙеҝ—еј•з”ЁгҖӮ
- иЎҘи·‘еү©дҪҷжөӢиҜ•пјҡ
  - `tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py`
  - `tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py`
- еҰӮжңүйңҖиҰҒпјҢиЎҘе®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw + CloneCut smoke checklistгҖӮ

## еҗҺзҪ®дјҳеҢ–еҫ…еҠһ
- `fast` / `standard` / `full`
- иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№жҳ е°„
- вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘ / еӯ—е№• / е°ҒйқўвҖқиғҪеҠӣиЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
- е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
- жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰжҖ§иғҪжҢҮж ҮдёҺжү№еӨ„зҗҶдјҳеҢ–

## еҸҳжӣҙи®°еҪ•
- 2026-03-29: ж–№жЎҲBдё»й“ҫе®ҢжҲҗзЎ¬еҲҮеҗҢжӯҘпјҢworkerгҖҒcanonical API/CLIгҖҒ`task_result` еҘ‘зәҰгҖҒOpenClaw жҺҘе…ҘдёҺж—§дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе…ЁйғЁеҜ№йҪҗпјӣеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өеҲҮжҚўдёәе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢгҖӮ

### 7.4 и®© worker еҲҮеҲ°еҶ…зҪ® pipeline

жңҖз»Ҳзӣ®ж ҮжҳҜпјҡ

- йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„дёҚеҶҚи°ғз”Ё `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py`
- йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„дёҚеҶҚдҫқиө– `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дҪңдёәдё»жү§иЎҢеҷЁ
- йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎзӣҙжҺҘд»Ҙ `VideoPipeline` жү§иЎҢ
- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫпјӣжҳҜеҗҰд»“еә“зә§еҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨпјҢдҪңдёәеҚ•зӢ¬жё…зҗҶеҶізӯ–жү§иЎҢ

### 7.5 ж”¶ж•ӣз»“жһңеҚҸи®®

OpenClaw еҸӘеә”иҜҘжӢҝеҲ°зЁіе®ҡзҡ„з»“жһ„еҢ–з»“жһңпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜзҢңжөӢеҶ…йғЁж–Үд»¶еҗҚгҖӮ

жңҖз»ҲеҜ№еӨ–зЁіе®ҡеҚҸи®®е»әи®®иҮіе°‘еҢ…еҗ«пјҡ

- дё»жҲҗзүҮ
- еӯ—е№•ж–Үд»¶

@@
 - йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„дёҚеҶҚи°ғз”Ё `domain/video/pre/main/pipeline.py`
 - йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎдё»и·Ҝеҫ„дёҚеҶҚдҫқиө– `InternalPipelineWarmRunner` дҪңдёәдё»жү§иЎҢеҷЁ
 - йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎзӣҙжҺҘд»Ҙ `VideoPipeline` жү§иЎҢ
-- `ExternalVideoCommandAdapter` дёҚеҶҚиҝӣе…ҘйҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫпјӣжҳҜеҗҰд»“еә“зә§еҪ»еә•з§»йҷӨпјҢдҪңдёәеҚ•зӢ¬жё…зҗҶеҶізӯ–жү§иЎҢ

*** End Patch

assistant #845 final_answer 11:46:38

зҺ°еңЁжңҖиҜҘеҒҡзҡ„еҸӘжңүдёӨд»¶дәӢпјҢиҖҢдё”йЎәеәҸеҫҲжҳҺзЎ®гҖӮ

з¬¬дёҖдјҳе…Ҳзә§пјҡжҠҠвҖңе№іеҸ°жҖҺд№ҲжҺҘе…ҘвҖқеҶҷжӯ»жҲҗж ҮеҮҶгҖӮ
зҺ°еңЁдё»й“ҫе·Із»Ҹж”¶еҸЈдәҶпјҢжңҖеӨ§еү©дҪҷйЈҺйҷ©дёҚжҳҜд»Јз Ғи·‘дёҚи·‘пјҢиҖҢжҳҜеҗҺйқўеҲ«дәәжҺҘ MCPгҖҒеҲ«зҡ„ agent skillгҖҒshell tool ж—¶еҗ„жҺҘеҗ„зҡ„гҖӮе»әи®®дёӢдёҖжӯҘзӣҙжҺҘиЎҘдёҖзүҲвҖңе№іеҸ°жҺҘе…ҘиҜҙжҳҺвҖқпјҢйҮҚзӮ№еҶҷжё…пјҡ
- з»ҹдёҖе…ҘеҸЈе°ұжҳҜ task_client / clonecut_task_client.py / /api/tasks/<task_id>/result
- WindowsгҖҒDocker/LinuxгҖҒmacOS дёүз§Қи°ғз”Ёж–№ејҸ
- е№іеҸ°дҫ§еӨұиҙҘж—¶е…ҲзңӢ task_result.statusпјҢеҶҚз»“еҗҲ render_manifest / failed_stage / ж—Ҙеҝ—е®ҡдҪҚ
- жҳҺзЎ®ж—§ openclaw_* е·ІйҖҖеңәпјҢдёҚеҶҚжҳҜжӯЈејҸеҸЈеҫ„

з¬¬дәҢдјҳе…Ҳзә§пјҡжҠҠеү©дёӢ 4 дёӘжөӢиҜ•иЎҘи·‘жҺүгҖӮ
е°ұжҳҜпјҡ
- tests/unit/test_asr_engine_factory.py
- tests/unit/test_stage6_clip.py
- tests/unit/test_stage6_5_resub.py
- tests/unit/test_stage7_correct.py

жҲ‘е…¬е…ҒеҲӨж–ӯдёҖдёӢпјҢеҪ“еүҚжңҖеҗҲзҗҶзҡ„жү§иЎҢйЎәеәҸжҳҜпјҡ
1. е…ҲиЎҘе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺ
2. з«ӢеҲ»иЎҘи·‘иҝҷ 4 дёӘжөӢиҜ•
3. еҰӮжһңйғҪз»ҝпјҢеҶҚеҶіе®ҡиҰҒдёҚиҰҒи·‘дёҖиҪ®е®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw smoke checklist
4. з„¶еҗҺжүҚиҝӣе…ҘеҗҺзҪ®еўһејәеҠҹиғҪ

еҰӮжһңдҪ еҗҢж„ҸпјҢжҲ‘дёӢдёҖжӯҘе°ұзӣҙжҺҘеҒҡз¬¬ 1 жӯҘе’Ңз¬¬ 2 жӯҘпјҢдёҚеҶҚеҒңгҖӮ

---
name: systematic-debugging
description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes
---

# Systematic Debugging

## Overview

Random fixes waste time and create new bugs. Quick patches mask underlying issues.

**Core principle:** ALWAYS find root cause before attempting fixes. Symptom fixes are failure.

**Violating the letter of this process is violating the spirit of debugging.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION FIRST
```

If you haven't completed Phase 1, you cannot propose fixes.

## When to Use

Use for ANY technical issue:
- Test failures
- Bugs in production
- Unexpected behavior
- Performance problems
- Build failures
- Integration issues

**Use this ESPECIALLY when:**
- Under time pressure (emergencies make guessing tempting)
- "Just one quick fix" seems obvious
- You've already tried multiple fixes
- Previous fix didn't work
- You don't fully understand the issue

**Don't skip when:**
- Issue seems simple (simple bugs have root causes too)
- You're in a hurry (rushing guarantees rework)
- Manager wants it fixed NOW (systematic is faster than thrashing)

## The Four Phases

You MUST complete each phase before proceeding to the next.

### Phase 1: Root Cause Investigation

**BEFORE attempting ANY fix:**

1. **Read Error Messages Carefully**
   - Don't skip past errors or warnings
   - They often contain the exact solution
   - Read stack traces completely
   - Note line numbers, file paths, error codes

2. **Reproduce Consistently**
   - Can you trigger it reliably?
   - What are the exact steps?
   - Does it happen every time?
   - If not reproducible йҲ«?gather more data, don't guess

3. **Check Recent Changes**
   - What changed that could cause this?
   - Git diff, recent commits
   - New dependencies, config changes
   - Environmental differences

4. **Gather Evidence in Multi-Component Systems**

   **WHEN system has multiple components (CI йҲ«?build йҲ«?signing, API йҲ«?service йҲ«?database):**

   **BEFORE proposing fixes, add diagnostic instrumentation:**
   ```
   For EACH component boundary:
     - Log what data enters component
     - Log what data exits component
     - Verify environment/config propagation
     - Check state at each layer

   Run once to gather evidence showing WHERE it breaks
   THEN analyze evidence to identify failing component
   THEN investigate that specific component
   ```

   **Example (multi-layer system):**
   ```bash
   # Layer 1: Workflow
   echo "=== Secrets available in workflow: ==="
   echo "IDENTITY: ${IDENTITY:+SET}${IDENTITY:-UNSET}"

   # Layer 2: Build script
   echo "=== Env vars in build script: ==="
   env | grep IDENTITY || echo "IDENTITY not in environment"

   # Layer 3: Signing script
   echo "=== Keychain state: ==="
   security list-keychains
   security find-identity -v

   # Layer 4: Actual signing
   codesign --sign "$IDENTITY" --verbose=4 "$APP"
   ```

   **This reveals:** Which layer fails (secrets йҲ«?workflow йүҒ? workflow йҲ«?build йүҒ?

5. **Trace Data Flow**

   **WHEN error is deep in call stack:**

   See `root-cause-tracing.md` in this directory for the complete backward tracing technique.

   **Quick version:**
   - Where does bad value originate?
   - What called this with bad value?
   - Keep tracing up until you find the source
   - Fix at source, not at symptom

### Phase 2: Pattern Analysis

**Find the pattern before fixing:**

1. **Find Working Examples**
   - Locate similar working code in same codebase
   - What works that's similar to what's broken?

2. **Compare Against References**
   - If implementing pattern, read reference implementation COMPLETELY
   - Don't skim - read every line
   - Understand the pattern fully before applying

3. **Identify Differences**
   - What's different between working and broken?
   - List every difference, however small
   - Don't assume "that can't matter"

4. **Understand Dependencies**
   - What other components does this need?
   - What settings, config, environment?
   - What assumptions does it make?

### Phase 3: Hypothesis and Testing

**Scientific method:**

1. **Form Single Hypothesis**
   - State clearly: "I think X is the root cause because Y"
   - Write it down
   - Be specific, not vague

2. **Test Minimally**
   - Make the SMALLEST possible change to test hypothesis
   - One variable at a time
   - Don't fix multiple things at once

3. **Verify Before Continuing**
   - Did it work? Yes йҲ«?Phase 4
   - Didn't work? Form NEW hypothesis
   - DON'T add more fixes on top

4. **When You Don't Know**
   - Say "I don't understand X"
   - Don't pretend to know
   - Ask for help
   - Research more

### Phase 4: Implementation

**Fix the root cause, not the symptom:**

1. **Create Failing Test Case**
   - Simplest possible reproduction
   - Automated test if possible
   - One-off test script if no framework
   - MUST have before fixing
   - Use the `superpowers:test-driven-development` skill for writing proper failing tests

2. **Implement Single Fix**
   - Address the root cause identified
   - ONE change at a time
   - No "while I'm here" improvements
   - No bundled refactoring

3. **Verify Fix**
   - Test passes now?
   - No other tests broken?
   - Issue actually resolved?

4. **If Fix Doesn't Work**
   - STOP
   - Count: How many fixes have you tried?
   - If < 3: Return to Phase 1, re-analyze with new information
   - **If йҲ®?3: STOP and question the architecture (step 5 below)**
   - DON'T attempt Fix #4 without architectural discussion

5. **If 3+ Fixes Failed: Question Architecture**

   **Pattern indicating architectural problem:**
   - Each fix reveals new shared state/coupling/problem in different place
   - Fixes require "massive refactoring" to implement
   - Each fix creates new symptoms elsewhere

   **STOP and question fundamentals:**
   - Is this pattern fundamentally sound?
   - Are we "sticking with it through sheer inertia"?
   - Should we refactor architecture vs. continue fixing symptoms?

   **Discuss with your human partner before attempting more fixes**

   This is NOT a failed hypothesis - this is a wrong architecture.

## Red Flags - STOP and Follow Process

If you catch yourself thinking:
- "Quick fix for now, investigate later"
- "Just try changing X and see if it works"
- "Add multiple changes, run tests"
- "Skip the test, I'll manually verify"
- "It's probably X, let me fix that"
- "I don't fully understand but this might work"
- "Pattern says X but I'll adapt it differently"
- "Here are the main problems: [lists fixes without investigation]"
- Proposing solutions before tracing data flow
- **"One more fix attempt" (when already tried 2+)**
- **Each fix reveals new problem in different place**

**ALL of these mean: STOP. Return to Phase 1.**

**If 3+ fixes failed:** Question the architecture (see Phase 4.5)

## your human partner's Signals You're Doing It Wrong

**Watch for these redirections:**
- "Is that not happening?" - You assumed without verifying
- "Will it show us...?" - You should have added evidence gathering
- "Stop guessing" - You're proposing fixes without understanding
- "Ultrathink this" - Question fundamentals, not just symptoms
- "We're stuck?" (frustrated) - Your approach isn't working

**When you see these:** STOP. Return to Phase 1.

## Common Rationalizations

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Issue is simple, don't need process" | Simple issues have root causes too. Process is fast for simple bugs. |
| "Emergency, no time for process" | Systematic debugging is FASTER than guess-and-check thrashing. |
| "Just try this first, then investigate" | First fix sets the pattern. Do it right from the start. |
| "I'll write test after confirming fix works" | Untested fixes don't stick. Test first proves it. |
| "Multiple fixes at once saves time" | Can't isolate what worked. Causes new bugs. |
| "Reference too long, I'll adapt the pattern" | Partial understanding guarantees bugs. Read it completely. |
| "I see the problem, let me fix it" | Seeing symptoms йҲ®?understanding root cause. |
| "One more fix attempt" (after 2+ failures) | 3+ failures = architectural problem. Question pattern, don't fix again. |

## Quick Reference

| Phase | Key Activities | Success Criteria |
|-------|---------------|------------------|
| **1. Root Cause** | Read errors, reproduce, check changes, gather evidence | Understand WHAT and WHY |
| **2. Pattern** | Find working examples, compare | Identify differences |
| **3. Hypothesis** | Form theory, test minimally | Confirmed or new hypothesis |
| **4. Implementation** | Create test, fix, verify | Bug resolved, tests pass |

## When Process Reveals "No Root Cause"

If systematic investigation reveals issue is truly environmental, timing-dependent, or external:

1. You've completed the process
2. Document what you investigated
3. Implement appropriate handling (retry, timeout, error message)
4. Add monitoring/logging for future investigation

**But:** 95% of "no root cause" cases are incomplete investigation.

## Supporting Techniques

These techniques are part of systematic debugging and available in this directory:

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from domain.video.asr.engine_factory import build_asr_engine
from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngineError


def _make_video(path: Path) -> Path:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    return path


def test_build_asr_engine_prefers_funasr_in_auto_mode(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class FakeFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            return [(0.0, 1.0, "hello")], "funasr-ok"

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=FakeFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
    )

    assert result.engine == "funasr"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert result.attempts[0].backend == "funasr"


def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_faster_whisper(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class BrokenFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([(0.0, 1.0, "fw")], "faster-whisper-ok"),
    )

    assert result.engine == "faster_whisper"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts[:2]] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper"]


def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_sidecar(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
    sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"
    sidecar.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000",
                "sidecar line",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    class BrokenFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([], "empty fw"),
    )

    assert result.engine == "sidecar_srt"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar"]


def test_build_asr_engine_sidecar_only_returns_timeline_fallback_when_missing(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=5.0,
        requested_backend="sidecar",
    )
    assert result.engine == "timeline_fallback"
    assert result.segments == []
    assert result.attempts and result.attempts[0].backend == "sidecar"

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional

from .base import StageResult
from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path


def _resolve_segments(**_kwargs: Any) -> tuple[list[dict], str, str, list[dict]]:
    # Compatibility shim for tests/consumers that monkeypatch this hook.
    return ([], "timeline_fallback", "skeleton resolver", [])


def run_stage4_asr(
    input_video: str,
    output_dir: str,
    task_id: str,
    *,
    forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
    hotwords: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    speaker: Optional[str] = None,
) -> StageResult:
    source = Path(input_video)
    stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
    if not source.exists():
        return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage4 input missing")

    srt_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_subtitles", ".srt")
    transcript_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_transcript", ".txt")
    manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage4_asr_manifest", ".json")
    info = forum_post_info or {}
    raw_hotwords = hotwords if hotwords is not None else info.get("hotwords", [])
    if not isinstance(raw_hotwords, list):
        raw_hotwords = []
    normalized_hotwords = [str(item).strip() for item in raw_hotwords if str(item).strip()]
    dedup_hotwords: list[str] = []
    seen: set[str] = set()
    for item in normalized_hotwords:
        if item.lower() in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(item.lower())
        dedup_hotwords.append(item)
    resolved_speaker = str(speaker or info.get("speaker", "")).strip()

    engine = "stub_asr"
    sidecar_backend = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "").strip().lower()
    prefer_sidecar = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_PREFER_SIDECAR", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    sidecar_hint = Path(f"{Path(input_video).with_suffix('')}.srt")
    sidecar_raw = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_SIDECAR_PATH", "").strip()
    sidecar_path = Path(sidecar_raw).expanduser() if sidecar_raw else sidecar_hint
    attempts: list[dict] = []

    use_sidecar = (sidecar_backend == "sidecar") or (sidecar_backend == "auto" and prefer_sidecar)
    if use_sidecar and sidecar_path.exists() and sidecar_path.is_file():
        attempts.append({"backend": "sidecar", "ok": True})
        srt_path.write_text(sidecar_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), encoding="utf-8")
        engine = "sidecar_srt"
    else:
        attempts.append({"backend": sidecar_backend or "stub", "ok": False})
        _, resolved_engine, _, _ = _resolve_segments(
            input_video=input_video,
            output_dir=output_dir,
            task_id=task_id,
            hotwords=dedup_hotwords,
            speaker=resolved_speaker,
        )
        engine = str(resolved_engine or "timeline_fallback")
        srt_path.write_text(
            "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nclonecut stage4 stub\n",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )

    transcript_path.write_text("clonecut stage4 transcript stub\n", encoding="utf-8")
    strict = os.getenv("CLONECUT_STRICT_EQUIVALENCE", "false").strip().lower() == "true"
    fallback_used = engine in {"timeline_fallback", "stub_asr"}
    strict_rejected = strict and fallback_used
    result_success = not strict_rejected
    payload: Dict[str, Any] = {
        "engine": engine,
        "task_id": task_id,
        "input_video": str(source),
        "subtitle_file": str(srt_path),
        "transcript_file": str(transcript_path),
        "hotwords": dedup_hotwords,
        "hotword_count": len(dedup_hotwords),
        "speaker": resolved_speaker,
        "forum_post_info": info,
        "attempts": attempts,
        "fallback_used": fallback_used,
        "strict_rejected": strict_rejected,
    }
    manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    return StageResult(
        success=result_success,
        output_file=str(source),
        error_message="strict equivalence rejected stage4 fallback" if strict_rejected else None,
        artifacts={
            "subtitle_file": str(srt_path),
            "transcript_file": str(transcript_path),
            "manifest_file": str(manifest_path),
        },
        metadata={"engine": engine},
    )


def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
    return run_stage4_asr(*args, **kwargs)

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

import pytest

from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngine, FunASREngineError


def _make_source(path: Path) -> Path:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    return path


def test_funasr_engine_extracts_sentence_segments_with_speaker_filter(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class FakeModel:
        def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            return [
                {
                    "sentence_info": [
                        {"start": 0, "end": 1000, "text": "first", "spk": "A"},
                        {"start": 1000, "end": 2200, "text": "second", "spk": "B"},
                    ]
                }
            ]

    engine = FunASREngine(model=FakeModel())
    segments, detail = engine.transcribe(source, hotwords=["йҚ–жӨҫеҗ«", "жҫ¶в•Ӯзҡө"], speaker="A")

    assert len(segments) == 1
    assert segments[0][0] == 0.0
    assert segments[0][1] == 1.0
    assert segments[0][2] == "first"
    assert "hotwords=2" in detail
    assert "speaker=A" in detail


def test_funasr_engine_fallback_to_text_segment(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class FakeModel:
        def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            return [{"text": "single text output"}]

    engine = FunASREngine(model=FakeModel())
    segments, _ = engine.transcribe(source)

    assert len(segments) == 1
    assert segments[0][0] == 0.0
    assert segments[0][1] > 0.0
    assert segments[0][2] == "single text output"


def test_funasr_engine_raises_when_no_usable_segment(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_source(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class EmptyModel:
        def generate(self, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            return [{}]

    engine = FunASREngine(model=EmptyModel())
    with pytest.raises(FunASREngineError):
        engine.transcribe(source)

from __future__ import annotations

from pathlib import Path

from domain.video.asr.engine_factory import build_asr_engine
from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngineError


def _make_video(path: Path) -> Path:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    path.write_bytes(b"fake-video")
    return path


def test_build_asr_engine_prefers_funasr_in_auto_mode(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class FakeFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            return [(0.0, 1.0, "hello")], "funasr-ok"

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=FakeFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
    )

    assert result.engine == "funasr"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert result.attempts[0].backend == "funasr"


def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_faster_whisper(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")

    class BrokenFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([(0.0, 1.0, "fw")], "faster-whisper-ok"),
    )

    assert result.engine == "faster_whisper"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts[:2]] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper"]


def test_build_asr_engine_fallback_to_sidecar(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
    sidecar = tmp_path / "input.srt"
    sidecar.write_text(
        "\n".join(
            [
                "1",
                "00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:02,000",
                "sidecar line",
                "",
            ]
        ),
        encoding="utf-8",
    )

    class BrokenFunASR:
        name = "funasr"

        def transcribe(self, _source: Path, **_: object):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            raise FunASREngineError("funasr failed")

    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=10.0,
        requested_backend="auto",
        funasr_engine=BrokenFunASR(),  # type: ignore[arg-type]
        faster_whisper_runner=lambda _source: ([], "empty fw"),
    )

    assert result.engine == "sidecar_srt"
    assert len(result.segments) == 1
    assert [item.backend for item in result.attempts] == ["funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar"]


def test_build_asr_engine_sidecar_only_returns_timeline_fallback_when_missing(tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
    source = _make_video(tmp_path / "input.mp4")
    result = build_asr_engine(
        source=source,
        duration_seconds=5.0,
        requested_backend="sidecar",
    )
    assert result.engine == "timeline_fallback"
    assert result.segments == []
    assert result.attempts and result.attempts[0].backend == "sidecar"

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
import os
from pathlib import Path
import re
from typing import Callable, List, Optional, Sequence, Tuple

from domain.video.asr.funasr_engine import FunASREngine, FunASREngineError, SrtSegment


_TIMECODE_RE = re.compile(r"(?P<h>\d{2}):(?P<m>\d{2}):(?P<s>\d{2})[,.](?P<ms>\d{3})")


@dataclass
class AsrAttempt:
    backend: str
    engine: str
    detail: str
    segment_count: int


@dataclass
class AsrFactoryResult:
    segments: List[SrtSegment]
    engine: str
    detail: str
    attempts: List[AsrAttempt]


def build_asr_engine(
    *,
    source: Path,
    duration_seconds: float,
    requested_backend: str = "auto",
    min_segments: int = 1,
    sidecar_path: str = "",
    hotwords: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None,
    speaker: Optional[str] = None,
    funasr_engine: Optional[FunASREngine] = None,
    faster_whisper_runner: Optional[Callable[[Path], tuple[List[SrtSegment], str]]] = None,
) -> AsrFactoryResult:
    backend = normalize_asr_backend(requested_backend)
    order = _backend_order(backend)
    attempts: List[AsrAttempt] = []
    runner = faster_whisper_runner or _transcribe_with_faster_whisper

    for candidate in order:
        if candidate == "funasr":
            engine = funasr_engine or FunASREngine()
            try:
                segments, detail = engine.transcribe(source, hotwords=hotwords, speaker=speaker)
                attempts.append(
                    AsrAttempt(
                        backend="funasr",
                        engine=engine.name,
                        detail=detail,
                        segment_count=len(segments),
                    )
                )
                if _segments_usable(segments, min_segments=min_segments):
                    return AsrFactoryResult(
                        segments=segments,
                        engine=engine.name,
                        detail=detail,
                        attempts=attempts,
                    )
            except FunASREngineError as exc:
                attempts.append(
                    AsrAttempt(
                        backend="funasr",
                        engine="funasr",
                        detail=str(exc),
                        segment_count=0,
                    )
                )
            continue

        if candidate == "faster_whisper":
            segments, detail = runner(source)
            attempts.append(
                AsrAttempt(
                    backend="faster_whisper",
                    engine="faster_whisper",
                    detail=detail,
                    segment_count=len(segments),
                )
            )
            if _segments_usable(segments, min_segments=min_segments):
                return AsrFactoryResult(
                    segments=segments,
                    engine="faster_whisper",
                    detail=detail,
                    attempts=attempts,
                )
            continue

        if candidate == "sidecar":
            segments, sidecar_engine, detail = _load_sidecar_segments(
                source=source,
                duration_seconds=duration_seconds,
                sidecar_path=sidecar_path,
            )
            attempts.append(
                AsrAttempt(
                    backend="sidecar",
                    engine=sidecar_engine,
                    detail=detail,
                    segment_count=len(segments),
                )
            )
            if _segments_usable(segments, min_segments=min_segments):
                return AsrFactoryResult(
                    segments=segments,
                    engine=sidecar_engine,
                    detail=detail,
                    attempts=attempts,
                )

    if attempts:
        return AsrFactoryResult(
            segments=[],
            engine="timeline_fallback",
            detail=attempts[-1].detail,
            attempts=attempts,
        )
    return AsrFactoryResult(
        segments=[],
        engine="timeline_fallback",
        detail="no asr backend enabled",
        attempts=[],
    )


def normalize_asr_backend(raw: str) -> str:
    backend = (raw or "").strip().lower()
    if backend in {"funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar", "auto"}:
        return backend
    return "auto"


def _backend_order(requested_backend: str) -> List[str]:
    if requested_backend == "funasr":
        return ["funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar"]
    if requested_backend == "faster_whisper":
        return ["faster_whisper", "sidecar"]
    if requested_backend == "sidecar":
        return ["sidecar"]
    return ["funasr", "faster_whisper", "sidecar"]


def _segments_usable(segments: List[SrtSegment], min_segments: int) -> bool:
    if len(segments) < max(1, int(min_segments)):
        return False
    return any(bool(str(text).strip()) for _, _, text in segments)


def _load_sidecar_segments(source: Path, duration_seconds: float, sidecar_path: str) -> Tuple[List[SrtSegment], str, str]:
    env_sidecar = (sidecar_path or os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_SIDECAR_PATH", "")).strip()
    candidates: List[Path] = []
    if env_sidecar:
        candidates.append(Path(env_sidecar))
    candidates.extend(
        [
            source.with_suffix(".srt"),
            source.with_suffix(".vtt"),
            source.with_suffix(".txt"),
        ]
    )

    for sidecar in candidates:
        if not sidecar.exists() or not sidecar.is_file():
            continue
        suffix = sidecar.suffix.lower()
        raw = sidecar.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
        if suffix in {".srt", ".vtt"}:
            segments = _parse_timed_subtitle(raw)
            if segments:
                return segments, f"sidecar_{suffix.lstrip('.')}", str(sidecar)
        if suffix == ".txt":
            segments = _build_segments_from_text(raw, duration_seconds)
            if segments:
                return segments, "sidecar_txt", str(sidecar)
    return [], "sidecar", "no sidecar transcript found"


def _transcribe_with_faster_whisper(source: Path) -> tuple[List[SrtSegment], str]:
    model_size = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_MODEL_SIZE", "small").strip() or "small"
    language = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_LANGUAGE", "").strip() or None
    device = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_DEVICE", "cpu").strip() or "cpu"
    compute_type = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_COMPUTE_TYPE", "int8").strip() or "int8"
    try:
        from faster_whisper import WhisperModel  # type: ignore
    except Exception as exc:
        return [], f"faster_whisper import failed: {exc}"

    try:
        model = WhisperModel(model_size, device=device, compute_type=compute_type)
        segment_iter, _ = model.transcribe(
            str(source),
            language=language,
            vad_filter=True,
            beam_size=5,
        )
        segments: List[SrtSegment] = []
        for seg in segment_iter:
            text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", str(getattr(seg, "text", "") or "")).strip()
            start = float(getattr(seg, "start", 0.0) or 0.0)
            end = float(getattr(seg, "end", start) or start)
            if not text:
                continue
            if end <= start:
                end = start + 0.2
            segments.append((start, end, text))
        if not segments:
            return [], "faster_whisper returned empty segments"
        return segments, f"model={model_size}, language={language or 'auto'}"
    except Exception as exc:
        return [], f"faster_whisper transcribe failed: {exc}"


def _parse_timed_subtitle(raw: str) -> List[SrtSegment]:
    lines = raw.splitlines()
    segments: List[SrtSegment] = []
    idx = 0
    while idx < len(lines):
        line = lines[idx].strip()
        idx += 1
        if not line:
            continue
        if line.upper().startswith("WEBVTT"):
            continue
        if line.isdigit() and idx < len(lines):
            line = lines[idx].strip()
            idx += 1
        if "-->" not in line:
            continue

        start_token, end_token = [part.strip() for part in line.split("-->", 1)]
        start = _parse_timecode(start_token.split(" ", 1)[0].strip())
        end = _parse_timecode(end_token.split(" ", 1)[0].strip())
        if start is None or end is None:
            continue
        if end <= start:
            end = start + 0.2

        text_lines: List[str] = []
        while idx < len(lines) and lines[idx].strip():
            text_lines.append(lines[idx].strip())
            idx += 1
        text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", " ".join(text_lines)).strip()
        if text:
            segments.append((start, end, text))
    return segments


def _parse_timecode(token: str) -> Optional[float]:
    match = _TIMECODE_RE.search(token)
    if match is None:
        return None
    h = int(match.group("h"))
    m = int(match.group("m"))
    s = int(match.group("s"))
    ms = int(match.group("ms"))
    return float(h * 3600 + m * 60 + s) + ms / 1000.0


def _build_segments_from_text(raw: str, duration_seconds: float) -> List[SrtSegment]:
    rows = [re.sub(r"\s+", " ", item).strip() for item in raw.splitlines() if item.strip()]
    if not rows:
        return []
    duration = max(1.0, float(duration_seconds or 0.0))
    step = max(1.5, duration / max(1, len(rows)))
    cursor = 0.0
    segments: List[SrtSegment] = []
    for row in rows:
        end = min(duration, cursor + step)
        if end <= cursor:
            end = cursor + 1.0
        segments.append((cursor, end, row))
        cursor = end
    return segments


__all__ = [
    "AsrAttempt",
    "AsrFactoryResult",
    "build_asr_engine",
    "normalize_asr_backend",
]

Output:
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass
import os
from pathlib import Path
import re
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Sequence, Tuple


SrtSegment = Tuple[float, float, str]


@dataclass
class FunASRConfig:
    model_asr: str = "iic/speech_seaco_paraformer_large_asr_nat-zh-cn-16k-common-vocab8404-pytorch"
    model_vad: str = "damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch"
    model_punc: str = "damo/punc_ct-transformer_zh-cn-common-vocab272727-pytorch"
    model_spk: str = "damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common"
    device: str = "cpu"
    batch_size_s: int = 300

    @classmethod
    def from_env(cls) -> "FunASRConfig":
        return cls(
            model_asr=os.getenv("CLONECUT_FUNASR_MODEL_ASR", cls.model_asr).strip() or cls.model_asr,
            model_vad=os.getenv("CLONECUT_FUNASR_MODEL_VAD", cls.model_vad).strip() or cls.model_vad,
            model_punc=os.getenv("CLONECUT_FUNASR_MODEL_PUNC", cls.model_punc).strip() or cls.model_punc,
            model_spk=os.getenv("CLONECUT_FUNASR_MODEL_SPK", cls.model_spk).strip() or cls.model_spk,
            device=os.getenv("CLONECUT_FUNASR_DEVICE", cls.device).strip() or cls.device,
            batch_size_s=_env_int("CLONECUT_FUNASR_BATCH_SIZE_S", default=cls.batch_size_s, min_value=1),
        )


class FunASREngineError(RuntimeError):
    """Raised when FunASR engine cannot transcribe the input."""


class FunASREngine:
    def __init__(self, config: Optional[FunASRConfig] = None, model: Any = None) -> None:
        self.config = config or FunASRConfig.from_env()
        self._model = model

    @property
    def name(self) -> str:
        return "funasr"

    def transcribe(
        self,
        source: Path,
        *,
        hotwords: Optional[Sequence[str]] = None,
        speaker: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> tuple[List[SrtSegment], str]:
        if not source.exists():
            raise FunASREngineError(f"input not found: {source}")

        model = self._ensure_model()
        kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "input": str(source),
            "batch_size_s": self.config.batch_size_s,
        }
        hotword_text = _join_hotwords(hotwords)
        if hotword_text:
            kwargs["hotword"] = hotword_text

        try:
            payload = model.generate(**kwargs)
        except Exception as exc:
            raise FunASREngineError(f"generate failed: {exc}") from exc

        segments = _extract_segments(payload, speaker=speaker)
        if not segments:
            raise FunASREngineError("no usable segments")
        detail = f"model={self.config.model_asr}"
        if hotword_text:
            detail += f", hotwords={len(hotword_text.split())}"
        if speaker:
            detail += f", speaker={speaker}"
        return segments, detail

    def _ensure_model(self) -> Any:
        if self._model is not None:
            return self._model

        try:
            from funasr import AutoModel  # type: ignore
        except Exception as exc:
            raise FunASREngineError(f"funasr import failed: {exc}") from exc

        model_kwargs: Dict[str, Any] = {
            "model": self.config.model_asr,
            "vad_model": self.config.model_vad,
            "punc_model": self.config.model_punc,
            "spk_model": self.config.model_spk,
            "device": self.config.device,
        }
        try:
            self._model = AutoModel(**model_kwargs)
            return self._model
        except Exception as exc:
            raise FunASREngineError(f"AutoModel init failed: {exc}") from exc


def _extract_segments(payload: Any, speaker: Optional[str]) -> List[SrtSegment]:
    speaker_filter = str(speaker or "").strip()
    entries = _normalize_payload_entries(payload)
    segments: List[SrtSegment] = []

    for entry in entries:
        sentence_rows = _extract_sentence_rows(entry)
        for row in sentence_rows:
            text = _normalize_text(str(row.get("text", "")))
            if not text:
                continue
            row_speaker = str(row.get("spk") or row.get("speaker") or row.get("spk_id") or "").strip()
            if speaker_filter and row_speaker and row_speaker != speaker_filter:
                continue
            start = _to_seconds(row.get("start") or row.get("start_time") or row.get("begin_time") or 0.0)
            end = _to_seconds(row.get("end") or row.get("end_time") or row.get("stop_time") or start)
            if end <= start:
                end = start + 0.2
            segments.append((start, end, text))

    if segments:
        return segments

    # Fallback: use coarse text output as a single segment.
    fallback_texts = [_normalize_text(str(item.get("text", ""))) for item in entries]
    fallback_texts = [item for item in fallback_texts if item]
    if not fallback_texts:
        return []
    merged = " ".join(fallback_texts).strip()
    if not merged:
        return []
    return [(0.0, max(0.2, min(30.0, len(merged) / 5.0)), merged)]


def _normalize_payload_entries(payload: Any) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    if isinstance(payload, dict):
        return [payload]
    if isinstance(payload, list):
        items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        for obj in payload:
            if isinstance(obj, dict):
                items.append(obj)
        return items
    return []


def _extract_sentence_rows(entry: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    for key in ("sentence_info", "sentences", "segments"):
        value = entry.get(key)
        if not isinstance(value, list):
            continue
        rows: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        for item in value:
            if isinstance(item, dict):
                rows.append(item)
        if rows:
            return rows
    return []


def _join_hotwords(hotwords: Optional[Sequence[str]]) -> str:
    if not hotwords:
        return ""
    normalized = [re.sub(r"\s+", "", str(item)).strip() for item in hotwords]
    normalized = [item for item in normalized if item]
    return " ".join(normalized)


def _to_seconds(value: Any) -> float:
    try:
        raw = float(value)
    except Exception:
        return 0.0
    if raw < 0:
        return 0.0
    if raw >= 1000.0:
        return raw / 1000.0
    return raw


def _normalize_text(text: str) -> str:
    return re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text or "").strip()


def _env_int(name: str, default: int, min_value: int = 0) -> int:
    raw = os.getenv(name)
    if raw is None:
        return max(min_value, int(default))
    try:
        return max(min_value, int(raw))
    except Exception:
        return max(min_value, int(default))


__all__ = ["FunASRConfig", "FunASREngine", "FunASREngineError", "SrtSegment"]

+            end = _to_seconds(row.get("end") or row.get("end_time") or row.get("stop_time") or start)
+            if end <= start:
+                end = start + 0.2
+            segments.append((start, end, text))
+
+    if segments:
+        return segments
+
+    fallback_texts = [_normalize_text(str(item.get("text", ""))) for item in entries]
+    fallback_texts = [item for item in fallback_texts if item]
+    if not fallback_texts:
+        return []
+    merged = " ".join(fallback_texts).strip()
+    if not merged:
+        return []
+    return [(0.0, max(0.2, min(30.0, len(merged) / 5.0)), merged)]
+
+
+def _normalize_payload_entries(payload: Any) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
+    if isinstance(payload, dict):
+        return [payload]
+    if isinstance(payload, list):
+        items: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
+        for obj in payload:
+            if isinstance(obj, dict):

+        return items
+    return []

+    for key in ("sentence_info", "sentences", "segments"):

+

+def _join_hotwords(hotwords: Optional[Sequence[str]]) -> str:

+        return ""

+    try:
