  578:     service = WorkerService(cfg)
  579: 
  580:     task_id = "render-manifest-stage-named-task"
  581:     task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task_id
  582:     task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  583:     stage_dir = task_dir / "_stages"
  584:     stage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  585: 
  586:     final_video = task_dir / "и®әеқӣж ·жң¬_final.mp4"
  587:     final_video.write_bytes(b"final-video")
  588:     (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage4_asr_subtitles.srt").write_text(
  589:         "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nasr subtitle\n",
  590:         encoding="utf-8",
  591:     )
  592:     (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt").write_text(
  593:         "1\n00:00:00,000 --> 00:00:01,000\nfinal subtitle\n",
  594:         encoding="utf-8",
  595:     )
  596:     (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass").write_text(
  597:         "[Script Info]\nTitle: stage6_5 ass\n",
  598:         encoding="utf-8",
  599:     )
  600:     (stage_dir / f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_overlay.png").write_bytes(b"overlay")
  601:     (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").write_text("иЈҒеүӘж–Үжң¬", encoding="utf-8")
  602:     state_file = task_dir / "state.json"
  603:     state_file.write_text(
  604:         json.dumps(
  605:             {
  606:                 "last_completed_step": 9,
  607:                 "last_completed_step_name": "stage9_organize",
  608:                 "output_file": str(final_video),
  609:             },
  610:             ensure_ascii=False,
  611:         ),
  612:         encoding="utf-8",
  613:     )
  614: 
  615:     task = UnifiedTask(
  616:         task_id=task_id,
  617:         task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
  618:         source="unit",
  619:         source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
  620:     )
  621:     Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")
  622: 
  623:     result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
  624:         task,
  625:         {
  626:             "success": True,
  627:             "request_type": "video",
  628:             "engine": "internal_pipeline",
  629:             "output_path": str(final_video),
  630:         },
  631:     )
  632: 
  633:     artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
  634:     roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
  635:     assert "subtitle_srt" in roles
  636:     assert "subtitle_ass" in roles
  637:     assert "cover_image" in roles
  638:     assert roles["subtitle_srt"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage7_correct_subtitles.srt"
  639:     assert roles["subtitle_ass"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage6_5_resub_subtitles.ass"
  640:     assert roles["cover_image"].get("filename") == f"{task_id}_stage8_cover_overlay.png"
  641: 
  642:     render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
  643:     subtitles = render_manifest.get("subtitles") or {}
  644:     assert subtitles.get("srt") == roles["subtitle_srt"].get("artifact_id")
  645:     assert subtitles.get("ass") == roles["subtitle_ass"].get("artifact_id")
  646:     cover = render_manifest.get("cover") or {}
  647:     assert cover.get("image") == roles["cover_image"].get("artifact_id")

  650: def test_attach_video_render_manifest_keeps_stable_empty_sections_and_artifact_shape(
  651:     monkeypatch, tmp_path
  652: ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]

  655:     service = WorkerService(cfg)
  656: 
  657:     task_id = "render-manifest-contract-task"
  658:     task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task_id
  659:     task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  660:     final_video = task_dir / "contract_final.mp4"
  661:     final_video.write_bytes(b"final-video")

  663:     task = UnifiedTask(
  664:         task_id=task_id,
  665:         task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
  666:         source="unit",
  667:         source_path=str(tmp_path / "source.mp4"),
  668:     )
  669:     Path(str(task.source_path)).write_bytes(b"source-video")

  671:     result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(
  672:         task,
  673:         {
  674:             "success": True,
  675:             "request_type": "video",
  676:             "engine": "internal_pipeline",
  677:             "output_path": str(final_video),
  678:         },
  679:     )
  680: 
  681:     artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
  682:     assert len(artifacts) == 1
  683:     final_artifact = artifacts[0]
  684:     assert final_artifact == {
  685:         "artifact_id": "final_video",
  686:         "kind": "video",
  687:         "role": "final_video",
  688:         "filename": "contract_final.mp4",
  689:         "path": str(final_video),
  690:         "relative_path": "contract_final.mp4",
  691:         "size_bytes": len(b"final-video"),
  692:         "is_primary": True,
  693:     }
  694: 
  695:     render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
  696:     assert render_manifest == {
  697:         "schema_version": "1.0",
  698:         "task_id": task_id,
  699:         "artifact_count": 1,
  700:         "primary_artifact_id": "final_video",
  701:         "primary_output_path": str(final_video),
  702:         "videos": {"primary": "final_video"},
  703:         "subtitles": {},
  704:         "texts": {},
  705:         "context": {},
  706:         "cover": {},
  707:         "logs": {},
  708:         "pipeline_state": {},
  709:     }

  712: def test_internal_pipeline_context_keeps_only_forum_snapshot_and_clip_text(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  713:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_context.db"))
  714:     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
  715:     service = WorkerService(cfg)
  716:     task_dir = Path(cfg.output_dir) / "context-task"
  717:     task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
  718:     source = tmp_path / "context-source.mp4"
  719:     source.write_bytes(b"video-content")
  720:     user_clip_text = tmp_path / "user-clip-text.txt"
  721:     user_clip_text.write_text("user clip text", encoding="utf-8")
  722: 
  723:     task = UnifiedTask(
  724:         task_id="context-task",
  725:         task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
  726:         source="unit",
  727:         source_path=str(source),
  728:         payload={
  729:             "clip_text_file": str(user_clip_text),
  730:             "stage5_model_name": "yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4",
  731:             "file_encoding": "utf-8",
  732:             "stage5_use_preprocessor": True,
  733:         },
  734:         metadata={
  735:             "source": "unit",
  736:             "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"},
  737:             "openai_backend_model": "legacy-model-id",
  738:         },
  739:     )
  740: 
  741:     options = service._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)
  742: 
  743:     assert "forum_post_info_json" in options
  744:     assert "clip_text_file" in options
  745:     assert "model" not in options
  746:     assert "openai_backend_model" not in options
  747:     assert "file_encoding" not in options
  748:     assert "stage5_use_preprocessor" not in options
  749:     assert options.get("clip_text_file") == str(task_dir / "clip_text.txt")
  750:     assert (task_dir / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == "user clip text"
  751:

    1: from __future__ import annotations
    2: 
    3: import json
    4: import shutil
    5: from pathlib import Path
    6: from typing import Optional
    7: from typing import Any
    8: 
    9: from .base import StageResult
   10: from .utils import ensure_stage_dir, stage_artifact_path
   11: 
   12: 
   13: def run_stage9_organize(
   14:     input_video: str,
   15:     *,
   16:     output_dir: str,
   17:     task_id: str,
   18:     keep_intermediate_files: bool,
   19:     forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
   20:     original_filename: str = "",
   21: ) -> StageResult:
   22:     source = Path(input_video)
   23:     stage_dir = ensure_stage_dir(output_dir, task_id)
   24:     if not source.exists():
   25:         return StageResult(success=False, output_file=input_video, error_message="stage9 input missing")
   26: 
   27:     info = forum_post_info or {}
   28:     candidate_name = str(original_filename or info.get("original_filename", "")).strip()
   29:     preferred_stem = Path(candidate_name).stem.strip() if candidate_name else ""
   30:     final_dir_name = preferred_stem or task_id
   31: 
   32:     task_root = Path(output_dir) / final_dir_name
   33:     task_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   34:     final_output = task_root / f"{final_dir_name}_final.mp4"
   35:     legacy_output = task_root / f"{task_id}.mp4"
   36: 
   37:     if source.resolve() != final_output.resolve():
   38:         shutil.copyfile(source, final_output)
   39:     if source.resolve() != legacy_output.resolve():
   40:         shutil.copyfile(source, legacy_output)
   41: 
   42:     archive_dir = task_root / f"{task_id}_artifacts"
   43:     logs_dir = task_root / "logs"
   44:     archive_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   45:     logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   46:     if keep_intermediate_files:
   47:         if stage_dir.exists():
   48:             archive_stages = archive_dir / "_stages"
   49:             logs_stages = logs_dir / "_stages"
   50:             if archive_stages.exists():
   51:                 shutil.rmtree(archive_stages)
   52:             if logs_stages.exists():
   53:                 shutil.rmtree(logs_stages)
   54:             shutil.copytree(stage_dir, archive_stages, dirs_exist_ok=True)
   55:             shutil.copytree(stage_dir, logs_stages, dirs_exist_ok=True)
   56: 
   57:     manifest_path = stage_artifact_path(output_dir, task_id, "stage9_organize_manifest", ".json")
   58:     payload = {
   59:         "task_id": task_id,
   60:         "final_output": str(final_output),
   61:         "legacy_output": str(legacy_output),
   62:         "keep_intermediate_files": bool(keep_intermediate_files),
   63:         "original_filename": str(original_filename or ""),
   64:         "forum_post_info": forum_post_info or {},
   65:         "archive_dir": str(archive_dir),
   66:         "final_output_dir": str(task_root),
   67:     }
   68:     manifest_path.write_text(json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
   69:     return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output), artifacts={"manifest_file": str(manifest_path)})
   70: 
   71: 
   72: def run(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> StageResult:
   73:     return run_stage9_organize(*args, **kwargs)

    1: from __future__ import annotations

    9: from typing import Optional
   10: 
   11: 
   12: # ANSI color codes
   13: _COLORS = {
   14:     "DEBUG": "\033[36m",     # cyan
   15:     "INFO": "\033[32m",      # green
   16:     "WARNING": "\033[33m",   # yellow
   17:     "ERROR": "\033[31m",     # red
   18:     "CRITICAL": "\033[35m",  # magenta
   19:     "RESET": "\033[0m",
   20: }
   21: 
   22: 
   23: class JsonFormatter(logging.Formatter):
   24:     """JSON ж јејҸеҢ–еҷЁпјҢйҖӮеҗҲз”ҹдә§зҺҜеўғж—Ҙеҝ—йҮҮйӣҶ"""
   25: 
   26:     def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:
   27:         doc = {
   28:             "ts": self.formatTime(record, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
   29:             "level": record.levelname,
   30:             "logger": record.name,
   31:             "msg": record.getMessage(),
   32:         }
   33:         if record.exc_info:
   34:             doc["exc"] = self.formatException(record.exc_info)
   35:         if hasattr(record, "extra"):
   36:             doc.update(record.extra)  # type: ignore[arg-type]
   37:         return json.dumps(doc, ensure_ascii=False)
   38: 
   39: 
   40: class ColoredFormatter(logging.Formatter):
   41:     """еёҰ ANSI йўңиүІзҡ„жҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°ж јејҸеҢ–еҷЁ"""
   42: 
   43:     _FMT = "%(asctime)s | {color}%(levelname)-8s{reset} | %(name)s | %(message)s"
   44: 
   45:     def format(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> str:
   46:         color = _COLORS.get(record.levelname, "")
   47:         reset = _COLORS["RESET"]
   48:         fmt = self._FMT.format(color=color, reset=reset)
   49:         formatter = logging.Formatter(fmt, datefmt="%H:%M:%S")
   50:         return formatter.format(record)
   51: 
   52: 
   53: def _cleanup_old_logs(log_dir: str, role: str, keep: int = 7) -> None:
   54:     """дҝқз•ҷжңҖиҝ‘ keep дёӘж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶пјҢеҲ йҷӨжӣҙж—§зҡ„"""
   55:     pattern = str(Path(log_dir) / f"{role}_*.log")
   56:     files = sorted(glob.glob(pattern))
   57:     for old in files[:-keep]:
   58:         try:
   59:             os.remove(old)
   60:         except OSError:
   61:             pass
   62: 
   63: 
   64: def setup_logging(
   65:     log_dir: str,
   66:     role: str,
   67:     level: int = logging.INFO,
   68:     json_mode: bool = False,
   69:     console: bool = True,
   70:     keep_logs: int = 7,
   71: ) -> None:
   72:     """
   73:     еҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж—Ҙеҝ—зі»з»ҹгҖӮ
   74: 
   75:     Args:
   76:         log_dir:    ж—Ҙеҝ—зӣ®еҪ•
   77:         role:       жңҚеҠЎи§’иүІеҗҚпјҲз”ЁдәҺж–Үд»¶еҗҚпјү
   78:         level:      ж—Ҙеҝ—зә§еҲ«
   79:         json_mode:  True вҶ’ ж–Үд»¶дҪҝз”Ё JSON ж јејҸпјӣFalse вҶ’ жҷ®йҖҡж–Үжң¬
   80:         console:    жҳҜеҗҰиҫ“еҮәеҲ°жҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°пјҲеёҰйўңиүІпјү
   81:         keep_logs:  дҝқз•ҷжңҖиҝ‘ N дёӘж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶
   82:     """
   83:     Path(log_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   84: 
   85:     # еёҰж—¶й—ҙжҲізҡ„ж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶еҗҚпјҢйҒҝе…ҚиҰҶзӣ–
   86:     ts = time.strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
   87:     log_file = Path(log_dir) / f"{role}_{ts}.log"
   88: 
   89:     # жё…зҗҶж—§ж—Ҙеҝ—
   90:     _cleanup_old_logs(log_dir, role, keep=keep_logs)
   91: 
   92:     handlers: list[logging.Handler] = []
   93: 
   94:     # ж–Үд»¶ handler
   95:     file_handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file, encoding="utf-8")
   96:     if json_mode:
   97:         file_handler.setFormatter(JsonFormatter())
   98:     else:
   99:         file_handler.setFormatter(
  100:             logging.Formatter(
  101:                 "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
  102:                 datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
  103:             )
  104:         )
  105:     handlers.append(file_handler)
  106: 
  107:     # жҺ§еҲ¶еҸ° handler
  108:     if console:
  109:         console_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
  110:         console_handler.setFormatter(ColoredFormatter())
  111:         handlers.append(console_handler)
  112: 
  113:     logging.basicConfig(level=level, handlers=handlers, force=True)
  114:     logging.getLogger("clonecut").setLevel(level)

   10: from domain.video.config import VideoPipelineConfig
   11: from domain.video.stages import (
   12:     run_stage0_clean,
   13:     run_stage1_transcode,
   14:     run_stage2_silence,

   25: from domain.video.stages.base import StageResult
   26: from domain.video.stages.utils import probe_duration_seconds
   27: 
   28: 
   29: @dataclass
   30: class PipelineResult:
   31:     success: bool
   32:     output_file: Optional[str] = None
   33:     error_message: Optional[str] = None
   34:     executed_stages: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
   35:     performance_summary: str = ""
   36:     current_stage: int = 0
   37:     last_stage: Optional[str] = None
   38:     failed_stage: Optional[str] = None
   39:     performance_report: Optional[Any] = None
   40: 
   41: 
   42: class VideoPipeline:
   43:     """Internal multi-stage video pipeline."""
   44: 
   45:     @staticmethod
   46:     def warm_resources(
   47:         config: VideoPipelineConfig,
   48:         logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
   49:     ) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]:
   50:         resolved_logger = logger or logging.getLogger("clonecut.domain.video.pipeline")
   51:         ffmpeg_ready = shutil.which("ffmpeg") is not None
   52:         asr_backend = os.getenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "").strip().lower() or "stub_asr"
   53:         resources = {
   54:             "stage4_asr": {
   55:                 "ready": True,
   56:                 "backend": asr_backend,
   57:             },
   58:             "stage6_clip": {
   59:                 "ready": True,
   60:                 "ffmpeg_available": ffmpeg_ready,
   61:             },
   62:             "stage7_subtitle": {
   63:                 "ready": True,
   64:                 "ffmpeg_available": ffmpeg_ready,
   65:             },
   66:             "stage8_cover": {
   67:                 "ready": True,
   68:                 "ffmpeg_available": ffmpeg_ready,
   69:             },
   70:         }
   71:         resolved_logger.info(
   72:             "video pipeline resources warmed: output_dir=%s asr_backend=%s ffmpeg=%s",
   73:             config.output_dir,
   74:             asr_backend,
   75:             ffmpeg_ready,
   76:         )
   77:         return resources
   78: 
   79:     def __init__(
   80:         self,
   81:         config: VideoPipelineConfig,
   82:         logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
   83:         performance_tracker: Any = None,
   84:         resource_monitor: Any = None,
   85:     ) -> None:
   86:         self.config = config
   87:         self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger("clonecut.domain.video.pipeline")
   88:         self.performance_tracker = performance_tracker
   89:         self.resource_monitor = resource_monitor
   90:         self._stages: List[tuple[str, Callable[..., StageResult]]] = [
   91:             ("stage0_clean", self._stage0),
   92:             ("stage1_transcode", self._stage1),
   93:             ("stage2_silence", self._stage2),
   94:             ("stage3_repair", self._stage3),
   95:             ("stage4_asr", self._stage4),
   96:             ("stage5_ai_text", self._stage5),
   97:             ("stage6_clip", self._stage6),
   98:             ("stage6_5_resub", self._stage6_5),
   99:             ("stage7_correct", self._stage7_correct),
  100:             ("stage7_subtitle", self._stage7),
  101:             ("stage8_cover", self._stage8),
  102:             ("stage9_organize", self._stage9),
  103:         ]
  104: 
  105:     def run(
  106:         self,
  107:         input_video: str,
  108:         task_id: str,
  109:         start_from_stage: int = 0,
  110:         forum_post_info: Optional[dict] = None,
  111:     ) -> PipelineResult:
  112:         current = input_video
  113:         executed: List[str] = []
  114:         stage_start = max(0, int(start_from_stage))
  115:         context: Dict[str, Any] = {"forum_post_info": _normalize_forum_post_info(forum_post_info)}
  116:         last_stage_index = max(0, min(stage_start, len(self._stages) - 1 if self._stages else 0))
  117:         last_stage_name: Optional[str] = None
  118:         gpu_stage_indexes = {1, 2, 4, 6}
  119:         tracking_started = False
  120: 
  121:         if self.performance_tracker is not None:
  122:             try:
  123:                 path = Path(input_video)
  124:                 file_size_mb = 0.0
  125:                 if path.exists():
  126:                     file_size_mb = path.stat().st_size / (1024 * 1024)
  127:                 duration_seconds = probe_duration_seconds(input_video)
  128:                 self.performance_tracker.start_video_processing(
  129:                     task_id=task_id,
  130:                     video_filename=path.name,
  131:                     original_filename=path.name,
  132:                     file_size_mb=file_size_mb,
  133:                     video_duration_seconds=duration_seconds,
  134:                 )
  135:                 tracking_started = True
  136:             except Exception as exc:
  137:                 self.logger.warning("start performance tracking failed: task=%s err=%s", task_id, exc)
  138: 
  139:         for idx, (stage_name, handler) in enumerate(self._stages):
  140:             if idx < stage_start:
  141:                 continue
  142: 
  143:             if self.resource_monitor is not None:
  144:                 try:
  145:                     self.resource_monitor.record_step_resource(
  146:                         step_num=idx,
  147:                         step_name=stage_name,
  148:                         task_id=task_id,
  149:                     )
  150:                 except Exception as exc:
  151:                     self.logger.debug("resource snapshot failed: task=%s stage=%s err=%s", task_id, stage_name, exc)
  152:             if self.performance_tracker is not None:
  153:                 try:
  154:                     self.performance_tracker.start_stage(
  155:                         task_id=task_id,
  156:                         stage_name=stage_name,
  157:                         gpu_accelerated=(idx in gpu_stage_indexes),
  158:                     )
  159:                 except Exception:
  160:                     pass
  161:             try:
  162:                 result = handler(current, task_id=task_id, stage_name=stage_name, context=context)
  163:             except Exception as exc:
  164:                 if self.performance_tracker is not None:
  165:                     try:
  166:                         self.performance_tracker.end_stage(
  167:                             task_id=task_id,
  168:                             stage_name=stage_name,
  169:                             success=False,
  170:                             error_message=str(exc),
  171:                         )
  172:                         self.performance_tracker.add_error(task_id, str(exc))
  173:                     except Exception:
  174:                         pass
  175:                 perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
  176:                 return PipelineResult(
  177:                     success=False,
  178:                     output_file=current,
  179:                     error_message=f"{stage_name} exception: {exc}",
  180:                     executed_stages=executed,
  181:                     current_stage=idx,
  182:                     last_stage=last_stage_name,
  183:                     failed_stage=stage_name,
  184:                     performance_report=perf_report,
  185:                 )
  186: 
  187:             executed.append(stage_name)
  188:             last_stage_index = idx
  189:             last_stage_name = stage_name
  190:             if not result.success:
  191:                 if self.performance_tracker is not None:
  192:                     try:
  193:                         self.performance_tracker.end_stage(
  194:                             task_id=task_id,
  195:                             stage_name=stage_name,
  196:                             success=False,
  197:                             error_message=str(result.error_message or ""),
  198:                         )
  199:                         self.performance_tracker.add_error(
  200:                             task_id,
  201:                             str(result.error_message or f"{stage_name} failed"),
  202:                         )
  203:                     except Exception:
  204:                         pass
  205:                 perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
  206:                 return PipelineResult(
  207:                     success=False,
  208:                     output_file=current,
  209:                     error_message=result.error_message or f"{stage_name} failed",
  210:                     executed_stages=executed,
  211:                     current_stage=idx,
  212:                     last_stage=last_stage_name,
  213:                     failed_stage=stage_name,
  214:                     performance_report=perf_report,
  215:                 )
  216:             if self.performance_tracker is not None:
  217:                 try:
  218:                     self.performance_tracker.end_stage(
  219:                         task_id=task_id,
  220:                         stage_name=stage_name,
  221:                         success=True,
  222:                     )
  223:                 except Exception:
  224:                     pass
  225:             if result.output_file:
  226:                 current = result.output_file
  227: 
  228:         perf_report = self._finish_tracking(task_id, tracking_started)
  229:         summary = f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)}"
  230:         if perf_report is not None:
  231:             try:
  232:                 ratio = float(getattr(perf_report, "processing_speed_ratio", 0.0))
  233:                 if ratio > 0:
  234:                     summary = f"internal pipeline executed stages={len(executed)} speed={ratio:.2f}x"
  235:             except Exception:
  236:                 pass
  237:         return PipelineResult(
  238:             success=True,
  239:             output_file=current,
  240:             executed_stages=executed,

   80: class WorkerService:
   81:     def __init__(self, config: Any, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None) -> None:
   82:         self.config = config
   83:         self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger("clonecut.worker.service")
   84:         self.booted_at = time.time()
   85:         self.redis_client = build_redis_client(
   86:             host=str(getattr(config, "redis_host", "127.0.0.1")),
   87:             port=int(getattr(config, "redis_port", 6379)),
   88:             db=int(getattr(config, "redis_db", 0)),
   89:             password=str(getattr(config, "redis_password", "")),
   90:             logger=self.logger,

   96:         )
   97:         self.dedup_ttl_seconds = max(60, int(self._get_queue_cfg("dedup_ttl_seconds", 24 * 3600)))
   98:         self.queue_adapter = RedisQueueAdapter(

  100:             namespace=str(getattr(config, "redis_namespace", "clonecut_worker:")),

   28: # и®ҫзҪ®ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•
   29: def setup_logging():
   30:     """и®ҫзҪ®ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•й…ҚзҪ®"""
   31:     # зЎ®дҝқlogsзӣ®еҪ•еӯҳеңЁ

   35:     root_logger = logging.getLogger()

   37:     # жё…йҷӨжүҖжңүзҺ°жңүеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁпјҢйҒҝе…ҚйҮҚеӨҚиҫ“еҮә
   38:     if root_logger.handlers:
   39:         root_logger.handlers.clear()
   40:     
   41:     # еҲӣе»әеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁ
   42:     file_handler = logging.FileHandler(
   43:         "logs/video_pipeline.log", 
   44:         encoding='utf-8',
   45:         errors='replace'
   46:     )
   47:     console_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
   48:     
   49:     # еҲӣе»әж јејҸеҢ–еҷЁ
   50:     formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
   51:     file_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
   52:     console_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
   53:     
   54:     # й…ҚзҪ®ж №ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•еҷЁ
   55:     root_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
   56:     root_logger.addHandler(file_handler)
   57:     root_logger.addHandler(console_handler)
   58:     
   59:     return logging
   60: 
   61: # еҲқе§ӢеҢ–ж—Ҙеҝ—
   62: logging = setup_logging()
   63: 
   64: # еёҰи¶…ж—¶зҡ„иҫ“е…ҘеҮҪж•°
   65: def input_with_timeout(prompt, timeout=None, default="", skip_timeout=False):
   66:     """еёҰи¶…ж—¶зҡ„иҫ“е…ҘеҮҪж•°
   67:     
   68:     еҸӮж•°:
   69:         prompt: жҸҗзӨәдҝЎжҒҜ
   70:         timeout: и¶…ж—¶ж—¶й—ҙпјҲз§’пјүпјҢеҰӮжһңдёәNoneеҲҷд»Һй…ҚзҪ®иҜ»еҸ–
   71:         default: и¶…ж—¶еҗҺиҝ”еӣһзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҖј
   72:         skip_timeout: жҳҜеҗҰи·іиҝҮи¶…ж—¶зӯүеҫ…зӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһй»ҳи®ӨеҖј
   73:         
   74:     иҝ”еӣһ:
   75:         з”ЁжҲ·иҫ“е…ҘжҲ–и¶…ж—¶еҗҺзҡ„й»ҳи®ӨеҖј
   76:     """
   77:     # еҰӮжһңжңӘжҢҮе®ҡи¶…ж—¶ж—¶й—ҙпјҢд»Һй…ҚзҪ®иҜ»еҸ–
   78:     if timeout is None:
   79:         try:
   80:             from pre.stage.config import get_config
   81:             config = get_config()
   82:             timeout = config.get("input_wait_time", 5)
   83:         except:
   84:             # еҰӮжһңж— жі•иҺ·еҸ–й…ҚзҪ®пјҢдҪҝз”Ёй»ҳи®ӨеҖј5з§’
   85:             timeout = 5
   86:             
   87:     # еҰӮжһңи·іиҝҮи¶…ж—¶зӯүеҫ…пјҢзӣҙжҺҘиҝ”еӣһй»ҳи®ӨеҖј
   88:     if skip_timeout:
   89:         print(f"{prompt}")
   90:         return default

   11: 
   12: import os
   13: import logging
   14: import datetime
   15: 
   16: 
   17: def setup_logger(output_dir):
   18:     """
   19:     и®ҫзҪ®ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•еҷЁ
   20:     
   21:     Args:
   22:         output_dir: иҫ“еҮәзӣ®еҪ•
   23:         
   24:     Returns:
   25:         logging.Logger: й…ҚзҪ®еҘҪзҡ„ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•еҷЁ
   26:     """
   27:     # еҲӣе»әж—Ҙеҝ—зӣ®еҪ•
   28:     log_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "logs")
   29:     os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)
   30:     
   31:     # з”ҹжҲҗеёҰж—¶й—ҙжҲізҡ„ж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶еҗҚ
   32:     timestamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
   33:     log_file = os.path.join(log_dir, f"funclip_{timestamp}.log")
   34:     
   35:     # й…ҚзҪ®ж №ж—Ҙеҝ—и®°еҪ•еҷЁ
   36:     logger = logging.getLogger()
   37:     logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
   38:     
   39:     # йҒҝе…ҚйҮҚеӨҚеӨ„зҗҶзЁӢеәҸ
   40:     if logger.handlers:
   41:         for handler in list(logger.handlers):
   42:             logger.removeHandler(handler)
   43:     
   44:     # ж–Үд»¶еӨ„зҗҶзЁӢеәҸ
   45:     file_handler = logging.FileHandler(log_file, encoding="utf-8")
   46:     file_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
   47:     
   48:     # жҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°еӨ„зҗҶзЁӢеәҸ
   49:     console_handler = logging.StreamHandler()
   50:     console_handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)  # жҺ§еҲ¶еҸ°зҺ°еңЁжҳҫзӨәINFOзә§еҲ«еҸҠд»ҘдёҠ
   51:     
   52:     # еҲӣе»әж јејҸеҢ–еҷЁ
   53:     formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
   54:     file_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
   55:     console_handler.setFormatter(formatter)
   56:     
   57:     # ж·»еҠ еӨ„зҗҶзЁӢеәҸеҲ°и®°еҪ•еҷЁ
   58:     logger.addHandler(file_handler)
   59:     logger.addHandler(console_handler)
   60:     
   61:     funclip_logger = logging.getLogger("FunClip")
   62:     # и®°еҪ•еҲқе§ӢеҢ–дҝЎжҒҜ
   63:     funclip_logger.info("ж—Ҙеҝ—зі»з»ҹеҲқе§ӢеҢ–е®ҢжҲҗ")
   64:     funclip_logger.info(f"ж—Ҙеҝ—ж–Үд»¶: {log_file}")
   65:     
   66:     return funclip_logger
   67: 
   68: 
   69: def log_step_start(step_number, step_name, input_file):
   70:     """
   71:     и®°еҪ•жӯҘйӘӨејҖе§Ӣ
   72:     
   73:     Args:
   74:         step_number: жӯҘйӘӨзј–еҸ·
   75:         step_name: жӯҘйӘӨеҗҚз§°
   76:         input_file: иҫ“е…Ҙж–Үд»¶и·Ҝеҫ„
   77:     """
   78:     logger = logging.getLogger("FunClip")
   79:     logger.info(f"ејҖе§ӢжӯҘйӘӨ{step_number}: {step_name}")
   80:     logger.info(f"иҫ“е…Ҙж–Үд»¶: {input_file}")
   81: 
   82: 
   83: def log_step_end(step_number, step_name, success, duration, output_file=None):
   84:     """
   85:     и®°еҪ•жӯҘйӘӨз»“жқҹ
   86:     
   87:     Args:
   88:         step_number: жӯҘйӘӨзј–еҸ·
   89:         step_name: жӯҘйӘӨеҗҚз§°
   90:         success: жҳҜеҗҰжҲҗеҠҹ
   91:         duration: з”Ёж—¶
   92:         output_file: иҫ“еҮәж–Үд»¶и·Ҝеҫ„
   93:     """
   94:     logger = logging.getLogger("FunClip")
   95:     
   96:     status = "жҲҗеҠҹ" if success else "еӨұиҙҘ"
   97:     logger.info(f"жӯҘйӘӨ{step_number}: {step_name} {status} - з”Ёж—¶: {duration}")
   98:     
   99:     if output_file and success:
  100:         logger.info(f"иҫ“еҮәж–Үд»¶: {output_file}")
  101:         
  102:     # и®°еҪ•еҲҶйҡ”з¬ҰпјҢдҫҝдәҺж—Ҙеҝ—йҳ…иҜ»
  103:     logger.info("-" * 40)

   18: @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
   19: def _set_fast_pipeline_env(monkeypatch) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
   20:     # Keep stage execution deterministic in CI/local without heavyweight ASR inference.
   21:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_ASR_BACKEND", "sidecar")

   23: 
   24: 
   25: def _build_config(tmp_path) -> SimpleNamespace:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
   26:     ns_hash = hashlib.md5(str(tmp_path).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
   27:     namespace = f"clonecut_worker_unit_{ns_hash}:"
   28:     return SimpleNamespace(
   29:         redis_host="127.0.0.1",
   30:         redis_port=6379,
   31:         redis_db=0,
   32:         redis_password="",
   33:         redis_namespace=namespace,
   34:         input_dir=str(tmp_path / "input"),
   35:         output_dir=str(tmp_path / "output"),
   36:         log_dir=str(tmp_path / "logs"),
   37:         raw={
   38:             "queue": {
   39:                 "max_retries": 2,
   40:                 "retry_backoff_seconds": [1, 1, 1],
   41:             },
   42:             "worker": {
   43:                 "max_download_workers": 1,
   44:                 "max_process_workers": 1,
   45:                 "max_upload_workers": 1,
   46:                 "download_timeout_seconds": 30,
   47:                 "download_chunk_size": 4096,
   48:                 "tts_enable": True,
   49:                 "tts_engine": "local",
   50:                 "retry_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
   51:                 "zombie_timeout_seconds": 1,
   52:                 "zombie_check_interval_seconds": 0.2,
   53:             },
   54:         },
   55:     )
   56: 
   57: 
   58: def test_video_task_flows_download_process_upload(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
   59:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut.db"))
   60:     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
   61:     service = WorkerService(cfg)
   62: 
   63:     source = tmp_path / "source.mp4"
   64:     source.write_bytes(b"video-content")
   65: 
   66:     service.start()
   67:     try:
   68:         ok, task_id, error = service.submit(
   69:             {
   70:                 "task_type": "video",
   71:                 "source_url": str(source),
   72:                 "metadata": {"source": "unit"},
   73:             }
   74:         )
   75:         assert ok
   76:         assert not error
   77:         assert task_id
   78: 
   79:         deadline = time.time() + 10
   80:         final_task = None
   81:         while time.time() < deadline:
   82:             final_task = service.get_task(task_id)
   83:             if final_task and final_task.get("status") == "completed":
   84:                 break
   85:             time.sleep(0.05)
   86: 
   87:         assert isinstance(final_task, dict)
   88:         assert final_task.get("status") == "completed"
   89:         assert Path(str(final_task.get("source_path"))).exists()
   90: 
   91:         result = final_task.get("result")
   92:         assert isinstance(result, dict)
   93:         assert result.get("engine") == "internal_pipeline"
   94:         upload = result.get("upload")
   95:         assert isinstance(upload, dict)
   96:         uploaded_path = upload.get("uploaded_path")
   97:         assert isinstance(uploaded_path, str) and uploaded_path
   98:         assert Path(uploaded_path).exists()
   99:     finally:
  100:         service.stop()
  101: 
  102: 
  103: def test_failed_task_auto_retries_until_success(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  104:     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_retry.db"))
  105:     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
  106:     service = WorkerService(cfg)
  107:     source = tmp_path / "retry-source.mp4"
  108:     source.write_bytes(b"video-content")
  109:

  111:     attempts = {"count": 0}
  112: 
  113:     def flaky_process(task):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
  114:         attempts["count"] += 1
  115:         if attempts["count"] == 1:
  116:             raise RuntimeError("inject process failure")
  117:         return original(task)

  119:     service._process_video_like = flaky_process  # type: ignore[method-assign]

  125:                 "task_type": "video",

  131:         assert not error

  134:         final_task = None

  138:                 break
  139:             time.sleep(0.1)
  140:

@@
 def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_stage6(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_real_pipeline.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
@@
     assert (Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "clip_text.txt").read_text(encoding="utf-8") == (
         "user supplied clip text"
     )
 
 
+def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(source),
+        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
+    )
+
+    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
+
+    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = output_dir
+        _ = task_id
+        _ = args
+        _ = kwargs
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def finalize_stage9(
+        input_video,
+        *,
+        output_dir,
+        task_id,
+        keep_intermediate_files=False,
+        forum_post_info=None,
+        original_filename="",
+    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = input_video
+        _ = keep_intermediate_files
+        _ = forum_post_info
+        _ = original_filename
+        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
+
+    raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
+    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
+
+    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
+    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
+    assert "processing_log" in roles
+    processing_log = roles["processing_log"]
+    assert str(processing_log.get("relative_path") or "").startswith("logs/")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").startswith("funclip_")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").endswith(".log")
+
+    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
+    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
+    assert logs.get("processing") == processing_log.get("artifact_id")
+
+    log_text = Path(str(processing_log.get("path"))).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    assert "internal video pipeline started" in log_text
+    assert task.task_id in log_text
+    assert "stage9_organize" in log_text
+
+
 def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
     service = WorkerService(cfg)
*** End Patch

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-206/test_internal_pipeline_real_vi0')

    def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
        monkeypatch, tmp_path
    ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
    
        source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
        source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
        task = UnifiedTask(
            task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
            task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
            source="unit",
            source_path=str(source),
            metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
        )
    
        final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
    
        def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = output_dir
            _ = task_id
            _ = args
            _ = kwargs
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
    
        def finalize_stage9(
            input_video,
            *,
            output_dir,
            task_id,
            keep_intermediate_files=False,
            forum_post_info=None,
            original_filename="",
        ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = keep_intermediate_files
            _ = forum_post_info
            _ = original_filename
            final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
    
        raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
        result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
    
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []

Tool Call #1383 apply_patch call_MDHaaezvt6QGocroGsAcskPI 12:59:33
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: d:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py @@ -from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread +from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thr...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: d:\clonecut\apps\worker\service.py
@@
-from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread
+from threading import Event, RLock, Semaphore, Thread, get_ident
@@
 INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE: dict[str, tuple[int, str]] = {
@@
 }
 
 
+class _TaskThreadLogFilter(logging.Filter):
+    def __init__(self, *, task_id: str, thread_id: int) -> None:
+        super().__init__()
+        self.task_id = task_id
+        self.thread_id = thread_id
+
+    def filter(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> bool:
+        record.clonecut_task_id = self.task_id
+        return int(getattr(record, "thread", -1)) == self.thread_id
+
+
 class WorkerService:
@@
     def _get_video_pipeline_runtime(self) -> Optional[VideoPipeline]:
         with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
             return self._video_pipeline_runtime
 
+    def _start_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        task: UnifiedTask,
+        task_dir: Path,
+    ) -> Tuple[Path, logging.Handler, List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]]]:
+        logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
+        logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
+        log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}.log"
+        counter = 1
+        while log_path.exists():
+            log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}_{counter}.log"
+            counter += 1
+
+        handler = logging.FileHandler(log_path, encoding="utf-8")
+        handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+        handler.addFilter(_TaskThreadLogFilter(task_id=task.task_id, thread_id=get_ident()))
+        handler.setFormatter(
+            logging.Formatter(
+                "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | task=%(clonecut_task_id)s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
+                datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
+            )
+        )
+
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]] = []
+        for logger_name in ("", "clonecut"):
+            target_logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
+            previous_level = int(target_logger.level)
+            logger_states.append((target_logger, previous_level))
+            if previous_level == logging.NOTSET or previous_level > logging.INFO:
+                target_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+        logging.getLogger().addHandler(handler)
+        return log_path, handler, logger_states
+
+    def _stop_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        handler: Optional[logging.Handler],
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]],
+    ) -> None:
+        if handler is not None:
+            root_logger = logging.getLogger()
+            try:
+                root_logger.removeHandler(handler)
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+            try:
+                handler.close()
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+
+        for target_logger, previous_level in reversed(logger_states):
+            try:
+                target_logger.setLevel(previous_level)
+            except Exception:
+                continue
+
     def _run_internal_video_pipeline(self, task: UnifiedTask, source_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
         task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
         source = Path(source_path)
-        if not source.exists():
-            task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
-            task.current_stage = 0
-            raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")

-        start_from_stage = 0

-                source=source,
-                task_dir=task_dir,
-                stage_names=stage_names,
-                start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
-                reason="migration fallback: tiny input",
-            )
-        if not self._ensure_video_pipeline_runtime_ready(wait=True):
-            raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime not ready")

-            with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
-                self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs += 1
-            try:
-                pipeline_result = pipeline.run(
-                    input_video=str(source),
-                    task_id=task.task_id,
-                    start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
-                    forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
-                    if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
-                    else {},
-                )
-            except Exception as exc:
-                self._clear_video_pipeline_runtime_state(last_error=str(exc))
-                raise
-            finally:
-                with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
-                    self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs = max(
-                        0,
-                        self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs - 1,
-                    )
-        elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
-
-        last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
-        failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
-        checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
-        if checkpoint:
-            task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
-        task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
-        succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))
-
-        output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()
-        self._write_internal_pipeline_state(
-            task_dir=task_dir,
-            output_path=output_path,
-            stage_name=checkpoint,
-            current_stage=task.current_stage,
-            failed_stage=failed_stage,
-            succeeded=succeeded,
-        )
-
-        if not succeeded:
-            error_message = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "error_message", "") or "").strip()
-            raise RuntimeError(error_message or "video pipeline failed")
-
-        return {
-            "success": True,
-            "request_type": task.task_type.value,
-            "output_path": output_path,
-            "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
-            "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",
-            "performance_summary": (
-                str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
-                or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
-            ),
-        }
+        log_path, log_handler, logger_states = self._start_task_processing_log(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)
+        try:
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline started: task_id=%s source=%s log_path=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(source),
+                str(log_path),
+            )
+            if not source.exists():
+                task.stage_checkpoint = "stage0_clean"
+                task.current_stage = 0
+                raise RuntimeError(f"source file not found: {source}")
+            stage_names = list(INTERNAL_PIPELINE_STAGE_ORDER)
+            start_from_stage = 0
+            self._prepare_internal_pipeline_context(task=task, task_dir=task_dir)
+
+            if self._should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(source):
+                self.logger.info(
+                    "internal video pipeline using fallback copy: task_id=%s reason=%s",
+                    task.task_id,
+                    "migration fallback: tiny input",
+                )
+                return self._run_internal_video_pipeline_fallback_copy(
+                    task=task,
+                    source=source,
+                    task_dir=task_dir,
+                    stage_names=stage_names,
+                    start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
+                    reason="migration fallback: tiny input",
+                )
+            if not self._ensure_video_pipeline_runtime_ready(wait=True):
+                raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime not ready")
+            pipeline = self._get_video_pipeline_runtime()
+            if pipeline is None:
+                raise RuntimeError("video pipeline runtime unavailable")
+            started = time.perf_counter()
+            with self._video_pipeline_run_semaphore:
+                with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
+                    self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs += 1
+                try:
+                    pipeline_result = pipeline.run(
+                        input_video=str(source),
+                        task_id=task.task_id,
+                        start_from_stage=start_from_stage,
+                        forum_post_info=dict(task.metadata.get("forum_post_info") or {})
+                        if isinstance(task.metadata, dict)
+                        else {},
+                    )
+                except Exception as exc:
+                    self._clear_video_pipeline_runtime_state(last_error=str(exc))
+                    raise
+                finally:
+                    with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
+                        self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs = max(
+                            0,
+                            self._video_pipeline_runtime_active_runs - 1,
+                        )
+            elapsed_ms = int(max(0.0, (time.perf_counter() - started) * 1000))
+
+            last_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "last_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            failed_stage = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "failed_stage", "") or "").strip()
+            checkpoint = str(last_stage or failed_stage).strip()
+            if checkpoint:
+                task.stage_checkpoint = checkpoint
+            task.current_stage = int(getattr(pipeline_result, "current_stage", start_from_stage))
+            succeeded = bool(getattr(pipeline_result, "success", False))
+
+            output_path = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "output_file", "") or "").strip()
+            self._write_internal_pipeline_state(
+                task_dir=task_dir,
+                output_path=output_path,
+                stage_name=checkpoint,
+                current_stage=task.current_stage,
+                failed_stage=failed_stage,
+                succeeded=succeeded,
+            )
+
+            if not succeeded:
+                error_message = str(getattr(pipeline_result, "error_message", "") or "").strip()
+                raise RuntimeError(error_message or "video pipeline failed")
+
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline completed: task_id=%s output_path=%s duration_ms=%s checkpoint=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                output_path,
+                elapsed_ms,
+                checkpoint or "stage9_organize",
+            )
+            return {
+                "success": True,
+                "request_type": task.task_type.value,
+                "output_path": output_path,
+                "executed_stages": list(getattr(pipeline_result, "executed_stages", []) or []),
+                "executed_mode": "video_pipeline",
+                "performance_summary": (
+                    str(getattr(pipeline_result, "performance_summary", "") or "").strip()
+                    or f"video pipeline executed duration_ms={elapsed_ms}"
+                ),
+            }
+        except Exception:
+            self.logger.exception(
+                "internal video pipeline failed: task_id=%s checkpoint=%s current_stage=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(task.stage_checkpoint or ""),
+                int(getattr(task, "current_stage", 0) or 0),
+            )
+            raise
+        finally:
+            self.logger.info(
+                "internal video pipeline log finalized: task_id=%s log_path=%s",
+                task.task_id,
+                str(log_path),
+            )
+            self._stop_task_processing_log(handler=log_handler, logger_states=logger_states)
 
     def _should_use_internal_pipeline_migration_fallback(self, source: Path) -> bool:
*** End Patch

tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/ai/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-ai/pytest-207/test_internal_pipeline_real_vi0')

    def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
        monkeypatch, tmp_path
    ) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
        monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
        cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
        cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
        service = WorkerService(cfg)
    
        source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
        source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
        task = UnifiedTask(
            task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
            task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
            source="unit",
            source_path=str(source),
            metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
        )
    
        final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
    
        def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = output_dir
            _ = task_id
            _ = args
            _ = kwargs
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
    
        def finalize_stage9(
            input_video,
            *,
            output_dir,
            task_id,
            keep_intermediate_files=False,
            forum_post_info=None,
            original_filename="",
        ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
            _ = input_video
            _ = keep_intermediate_files
            _ = forum_post_info
            _ = original_filename
            final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
            return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
    
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
        monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
    
        raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
        result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
    
        artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
        roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
        assert "processing_log" in roles
        processing_log = roles["processing_log"]

   15: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path (Join-Path $PSScriptRoot "..")).Path
   16: $clientScript = Join-Path $repoRoot "scripts\clonecut_task_client.py"
   17: $pythonCandidates = @(
   18:     (Join-Path $repoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe")
   19: )
   20: 
   21: try {
   22:     $gitCommonDir = (& git -C $repoRoot rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir 2>$null).Trim()
   23:     if ($gitCommonDir) {
   24:         $sharedRepoRoot = Split-Path -Parent $gitCommonDir
   25:         $sharedPython = Join-Path $sharedRepoRoot ".venv-p310\Scripts\python.exe"
   26:         if ($sharedPython -notin $pythonCandidates) {
   27:             $pythonCandidates += $sharedPython
   28:         }
   29:     }
   30: } catch {
   31: }
   32: 
   33: $pythonBin = $pythonCandidates | Where-Object { Test-Path -LiteralPath $_ } | Select-Object -First 1
   34: 
   35: if (-not $pythonBin) {
   36:     throw "missing python runtime: expected one of $($pythonCandidates -join ', ')"
   37: }
   38: 
   39: if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $clientScript)) {
   40:     throw "missing client script: $clientScript"
   41: }
   42: 
   43: $args = @(
   44:     $clientScript,
   45:     "--api-base", $ApiBase,
   46:     "--file", $VideoPath,
   47:     "--source", $Source
   48: )
   49: 
   50: if ($ApiToken) { $args += @("--api-token", $ApiToken) }
   51: if ($TaskId) { $args += @("--task-id", $TaskId) }
   52: if ($Stage5ModelName) { $args += @("--stage5-model-name", $Stage5ModelName) }
   53: if ($ClipText) { $args += @("--clip-text", $ClipText) }
   54: if ($PostUrl) { $args += @("--post-url", $PostUrl) }
   55: if ($NoWait) { $args += "--no-wait" }
   56: if ($OutputJson) { $args += @("--output-json", $OutputJson) }
   57: 
   58: & $pythonBin @args
   59: exit $LASTEXITCODE

    1: #!/usr/bin/env node
    2: 
    3: import { access, readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
    4: import { constants as fsConstants, existsSync, openAsBlob } from "node:fs";
    5: import path from "node:path";
    6: 
    7: async function isLikelyContainerRuntime() {
    8:   if (process.platform !== "linux") {
    9:     return false;
   10:   }
   11:   if (existsSync("/.dockerenv")) {
   12:     return true;
   13:   }
   14:   try {
   15:     const cgroup = await readFile("/proc/1/cgroup", "utf8");
   16:     return /(docker|containerd|kubepods|podman)/i.test(cgroup);
   17:   } catch {
   18:     return false;
   19:   }
   20: }
   21: 
   22: async function resolveDefaultApiBase() {
   23:   if (process.platform === "win32" || process.platform === "darwin") {
   24:     return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
   25:   }
   26:   if (await isLikelyContainerRuntime()) {
   27:     return "http://host.docker.internal:18100";
   28:   }
   29:   return "http://127.0.0.1:18100";
   30: }
   31: 
   32: async function parseArgs(argv) {
   33:   const options = {
   34:     apiBase: await resolveDefaultApiBase(),
   35:     file: "",
   36:     apiToken: "",
   37:     apiTokenEnv: "CLONECUT_API_TOKEN",
   38:     taskId: "",
   39:     source: "clonecut_skill",
   40:     stage5ModelName: "",
   41:     clipText: "",
   42:     postUrl: "",
   43:     wait: true,
   44:     submitTimeoutSeconds: 30,
   45:     waitTimeoutSeconds: 1800,
   46:     pollIntervalSeconds: 5,
   47:     requestTimeoutSeconds: 15,
   48:     outputJson: "",
   49:   };
   50: 
   51:   for (let index = 0; index < argv.length; index += 1) {
   52:     const arg = String(argv[index] ?? "").trim();
   53:     const nextValue = () => {
   54:       index += 1;
   55:       if (index >= argv.length) {
   56:         throw new Error(`missing value for ${arg}`);
   57:       }
   58:       return String(argv[index] ?? "");
   59:     };
   60:     switch (arg) {
   61:       case "--api-base":
   62:         options.apiBase = nextValue();
   63:         break;
   64:       case "--file":
   65:         options.file = nextValue();
   66:         break;
   67:       case "--api-token":
   68:         options.apiToken = nextValue();
   69:         break;
   70:       case "--api-token-env":
   71:         options.apiTokenEnv = nextValue();
   72:         break;
   73:       case "--task-id":
   74:         options.taskId = nextValue();
   75:         break;
   76:       case "--source":
   77:         options.source = nextValue();
   78:         break;
   79:       case "--stage5-model-name":
   80:         options.stage5ModelName = nextValue();
   81:         break;
   82:       case "--clip-text":
   83:         options.clipText = nextValue();
   84:         break;
   85:       case "--post-url":
   86:         options.postUrl = nextValue();
   87:         break;
   88:       case "--no-wait":
   89:         options.wait = false;
   90:         break;
   91:       case "--submit-timeout-seconds":
   92:         options.submitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   93:         break;
   94:       case "--wait-timeout-seconds":
   95:         options.waitTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   96:         break;
   97:       case "--poll-interval-seconds":
   98:         options.pollIntervalSeconds = Number(nextValue());
   99:         break;
  100:       case "--request-timeout-seconds":
  101:         options.requestTimeoutSeconds = Number(nextValue());
  102:         break;
  103:       case "--output-json":
  104:         options.outputJson = nextValue();
  105:         break;
  106:       case "--help":
  107:       case "-h":
  108:         printHelp();
  109:         process.exit(0);
  110:         break;
  111:       default:
  112:         throw new Error(`unknown argument: ${arg}`);
  113:     }
  114:   }
  115: 
  116:   if (!options.file) {
  117:     throw new Error("--file is required");
  118:   }
  119:   return options;
  120: }
  121: 
  122: function printHelp() {
  123:   const lines = [
  124:     "Usage: node run_clonecut_task.mjs --file <video> [options]",
  125:     "",
  126:     "Options:",
  127:     "  --api-base <url>                 CloneCut API base URL",
  128:     "  --file <path>                    Local video path to upload",
  129:     "  --api-token <token>              Optional CloneCut API token",
  130:     "  --api-token-env <name>           Optional env var for api token",
  131:     "  --task-id <id>                   Explicit task id",
  132:     "  --source <text>                  Task source marker",
  133:     "  --stage5-model-name <name>       Stage5 model/backend model id",
  134:     "  --clip-text <text>               Explicit clip text override",
  135:     "  --post-url <url>                 Optional forum post url",
  136:     "  --no-wait                        Submit without polling result",
  137:     "  --submit-timeout-seconds <n>     Submit request timeout",
  138:     "  --wait-timeout-seconds <n>       Total polling timeout",
  139:     "  --poll-interval-seconds <n>      Poll interval",
  140:     "  --request-timeout-seconds <n>    Single polling request timeout",
  141:     "  --output-json <path>             Persist final JSON payload",
  142:   ];
  143:   console.log(lines.join("\n"));
  144: }
  145: 
  146: function normalizeApiBase(apiBase) {
  147:   const text = String(apiBase ?? "").trim().replace(/\/+$/, "");
  148:   if (!text) {
  149:     throw new Error("apiBase is required");
  150:   }
  151:   return text;
  152: }
  153: 
  154: function resolveApiUrl(apiBase, suffix) {
  155:   const base = normalizeApiBase(apiBase);
  156:   const pathSuffix = String(suffix ?? "").trim();
  157:   if (!pathSuffix) {
  158:     return base;
  159:   }
  160:   return pathSuffix.startsWith("/") ? `${base}${pathSuffix}` : `${base}/${pathSuffix}`;
  161: }
  162: 
  163: function buildHeaders(apiToken) {
  164:   const token = String(apiToken ?? "").trim();
  165:   return token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {};
  166: }
  167: 
  168: async function ensureFileExists(filePath) {
  169:   await access(filePath, fsConstants.R_OK);
  170: }
  171: 
  172: async function parseJsonResponse(response, context) {
  173:   const text = await response.text();
  174:   let payload;
  175:   try {
  176:     payload = JSON.parse(text);
  177:   } catch (error) {
  178:     throw new Error(
  179:       `${context} returned non-JSON response: status=${response.status} body=${text}`,
  180:       { cause: error },
  181:     );
  182:   }
  183:   if (!payload || typeof payload !== "object" || Array.isArray(payload)) {
  184:     throw new Error(`${context} returned invalid payload type`);
  185:   }
  186:   if (!payload.success) {
  187:     const error = String(payload.error ?? "").trim() || `${context} failed`;
  188:     throw new Error(`${context} failed: status=${response.status} error=${error}`);
  189:   }
  190:   return payload;
  191: }
  192: 
  193: async function fetchJson(url, init, context, timeoutSeconds) {
  194:   const controller = new AbortController();
  195:   const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), Math.max(1, timeoutSeconds) * 1000);
  196:   try {
  197:     const response = await fetch(url, { ...init, signal: controller.signal });
  198:     return await parseJsonResponse(response, context);
  199:   } finally {
  200:     clearTimeout(timer);
  201:   }
  202: }
  203: 
  204: async function submitTask(options) {
  205:   const filePath = path.resolve(options.file);
  206:   await ensureFileExists(filePath);
  207: 
  208:   const form = new FormData();
  209:   form.set("source", String(options.source));
  210:   if (options.taskId) {
  211:     form.set("task_id", String(options.taskId));
  212:   }
  213:   if (options.stage5ModelName) {
  214:     form.set("stage5_model_name", String(options.stage5ModelName));
  215:   }
  216:   if (options.clipText) {
  217:     form.set("clip_text", String(options.clipText));
  218:   }
  219:   if (options.postUrl) {
  220:     form.set("post_url", String(options.postUrl));
  221:   }
  222: 
  223:   const blob = await openAsBlob(filePath);
  224:   const file = new File([blob], path.basename(filePath), {
  225:     type: filePath.toLowerCase().endsWith(".mp4") ? "video/mp4" : "application/octet-stream",
  226:   });
  227:   form.set("file", file, file.name);
  228: 
  229:   return fetchJson(
  230:     resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, "/api/tasks/video"),
  231:     {
  232:       method: "POST",
  233:       headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
  234:       body: form,
  235:     },
  236:     "submit video task",
  237:     options.submitTimeoutSeconds,
  238:   );
  239: }
  240: 
  241: async function fetchTaskResult(options, taskId) {
  242:   return fetchJson(
  243:     resolveApiUrl(options.apiBase, `/api/tasks/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}/result`),
  244:     {
  245:       method: "GET",
  246:       headers: buildHeaders(options.apiToken),
  247:     },
  248:     "fetch task result",
  249:     options.requestTimeoutSeconds,
  250:   );
  251: }
  252: 
  253: async function waitForResult(options, taskId) {
  254:   const deadline = Date.now() + Math.max(1, options.waitTimeoutSeconds) * 1000;
  255:   while (true) {
  256:     const payload = await fetchTaskResult(options, taskId);
  257:     const result =
  258:       payload.task_result && typeof payload.task_result === "object"
  259:         ? payload.task_result
  260:         : {};

Memory/03_chat_logs\2026-03-29_203444.md:6:еҠ©жүӢ: еҗҜеҠЁдәҶдёҖз»„йҡ”зҰ»зҡ„ API/worker иҝӣзЁӢпјҢдҪҝз”ЁзӢ¬з«Ӣ Redis namespace `clonecut_openclaw_smoke_20260329_1:` дёҺдёҙж—¶ DB и·‘зңҹе®һиҒ”и°ғгҖӮе…ҲйӘҢиҜҒ `/health` дёҺ `/ready`пјҢзЎ®и®Ө `scope=video_pipeline` дё” `ready=true`пјӣйҡҸеҗҺеҲҶеҲ«йҖҡиҝҮ `scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1` е’Ң `skills/clonecut-video-pipeline/run_clonecut_task.mjs` жҸҗдәӨ `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4`пјҢдёӨжқЎй“ҫи·ҜйғҪиҝ”еӣһ `task_result.status=completed`гҖҒ`schema_version=1.0`гҖҒ`executed_mode=video_pipeline`пјҢе№¶дә§еҮә `final_video`гҖҒ`subtitle_srt`гҖҒ`cover_image`гҖҒ`clip_text`гҖҒ`script_text` зӯүзЁіе®ҡ artifactsгҖӮд№ӢеҗҺз»§з»ӯйӘҢиҜҒ `/api/tasks/<task_id>`гҖҒ`/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts`гҖҒд»ҘеҸҠжҲҗзүҮ/еӯ—е№•/е°ҒйқўдёӢиҪҪжҺҘеҸЈпјҢзЎ®и®Өе№іеҸ°дҫ§иҜ»еҸ–дёҺдёӢиҪҪй“ҫи·ҜеҸҜз”ЁпјҢжңҖеҗҺе…ій—ӯдёҙж—¶ API/worker иҝӣзЁӢе№¶е°ҶеҪ“еүҚ todo жӣҙж–°дёәвҖңдё»й“ҫдёҺ smoke checklist е·Іж”¶еҸЈпјҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘиҝӣе…ҘеҗҺзҪ®еўһејәеҠҹиғҪвҖқгҖӮ
