Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20717:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576&#39;\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;smoke.db&#39;\n$ns = &#39;clonecut_hardcut_smoke:&#39; + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString(&#39;N&#39;).Substring(0,8) + &#39;:&#39;\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;worker.log&#39;\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;api.log&#39;\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;sample.mp4&#39;\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\n$envCommon = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = &#39;false&#39;\n  PYTHONUTF8 = &#39;1&#39;\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp\n      if (&amp; $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \&quot;timeout waiting for $url last=$last\&quot;\n}\ntry {\n  $workerEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $workerEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $workerEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv = [System.Collections.Hashtable]::Synchronized(@{})\n  Get-ChildItem Env: | ForEach-Object { $apiEnv[$_.Name] = $_.Value }\n  foreach ($k in $envCommon.Keys) { $apiEnv[$k] = $envCommon[$k] }\n  $apiEnv[&#39;CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER&#39;] = &#39;false&#39;\n\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList &#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.worker.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$workerPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $workerEnv\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList &#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.api.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$apiPort -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $apiEnv\n\n  Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true } \n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; }\n\n  $clientOut = &amp; $py (Join-Path $root &#39;scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py&#39;) --api-base (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}\&quot; -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2&gt;&amp;1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \&quot;client failed: $clientOut\&quot; }\n  $clientJson = $clientOut | Out-String\n  $payload = $clientJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw &#39;missing task_id in client payload&#39; }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw &#39;missing task_result in client payload&#39; }\n\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  if ($apiProc -and -not $apiProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $apiProc.Id -Force }\n  if ($workerProc -and -not $workerProc.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $workerProc.Id -Force }\n}\n&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20812:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 1048576&#39;\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;smoke.db&#39;\n$ns = &#39;clonecut_hardcut_smoke:&#39; + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString(&#39;N&#39;).Substring(0,8) + &#39;:&#39;\n$workerPort = 19205\n$apiPort = 19100\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;worker.log&#39;\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;api.log&#39;\n$videoPath = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;sample.mp4&#39;\n[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($videoPath, [byte[]](1..16))\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  foreach ($arg in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add([string]$arg) }\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;REDIS_NAMESPACE&#39;] = $ns\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = $dbPath\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE&#39;] = &#39;false&#39;\n  $psi.Environment[&#39;PYTHONUTF8&#39;] = &#39;1&#39;\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.Environment[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 2\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6\n      if (&amp; $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400\n  }\n  throw \&quot;timeout waiting for $url last=$last\&quot;\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @(&#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.worker.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @(&#39;-m&#39;,&#39;apps.api.main&#39;,&#39;--config&#39;,$configDst,&#39;--host&#39;,&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,&#39;--port&#39;,$apiPort) $apiLog @{ &#39;CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER&#39; = &#39;false&#39; }\n  Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$workerPort/ready\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json \&quot;http://127.0.0.1:$apiPort/health\&quot; 30 { param($r) $r.status -eq &#39;ok&#39; }\n\n  $clientOut = &amp; $py (Join-Path $root &#39;scripts\\clonecut_task_client.py&#39;) --api-base (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}\&quot; -f $apiPort) --file $videoPath --wait-timeout-seconds 60 --poll-interval-seconds 1 --request-timeout-seconds 3 2&gt;&amp;1\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw \&quot;client failed: $clientOut\&quot; }\n  $payload = ($clientOut | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw &#39;missing task_id in client payload&#39; }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw &#39;missing task_result in client payload&#39; }\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    task_result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d3916-07ec-74d3-9d3e-624387fd19e5__e3f42e23.html:20907:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$ErrorActionPreference = &#39;Stop&#39;\n$root = &#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;\n$py = Join-Path $root &#39;.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe&#39;\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $env:TEMP (&#39;clonecut-hardcut-smoke-&#39; + (Get-Date -Format &#39;yyyyMMdd-HHmmss&#39;))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;input&#39;\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;output&#39;\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;logs&#39;\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root &#39;config\\settings.yaml.example&#39;\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot &#39;settings.smoke.yaml&#39;\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;input_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;input_dir: &#39; + ($inputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;output_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;output_dir: &#39; + ($outputDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;log_dir: .*&#39;, (&#39;log_dir: &#39; + ($logDir -replace &#39;\\\\&#39;,&#39;/&#39;))\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;forum_upload_enabled: true&#39;, &#39;forum_upload_enabled: false&#39;\n$configText = $configText -replace &#39;internal_pipeline_migration_fallback_max_bytes: 0&#39;, &#39;internal_pipeline_mвҖҰ252144 tokens truncatedвҖҰ3\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw &#39;client command failed&#39; }\n  $payload = ($payloadText | Out-String) | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  $workerTask = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\&quot;http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/worker/task/{1}\&quot; -f $workerPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 5\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    task_schema = $taskResult.schema_version\n    result_url = $payload.submit.result_url\n    final_video_filename = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.filename\n    final_video_path = $taskResult.outputs.final_video.path\n    worker_task_status = $workerTask.task.status\n    worker_task_engine = $workerTask.task.result.engine\n    worker_task_mode = $workerTask.task.result.executed_mode\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n&quot;,

Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d2453-7532-7590-8372-89da46658aee__737907ef.html:50742:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$env:CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED=&#39;false&#39;; @&#39;\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom types import SimpleNamespace\n\nfrom apps.api.main import create_app\nfrom apps.worker.service import WorkerService\n\nrepo = Path(r&#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;)\ntest_video = repo / &#39;input&#39; / &#39;test.mp4&#39;\nif not test_video.exists():\n    raise SystemExit(f&#39;missing test video: {test_video}&#39;)\n\ntmp_root = repo / &#39;.tmp_openclaw_api_smoke&#39;\nif tmp_root.exists():\n    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)\n(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\nos.environ[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = str(tmp_root / &#39;smoke.db&#39;)\n\ncfg = SimpleNamespace(\n    redis_host=&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;,\n    redis_port=6379,\n    redis_db=0,\n    redis_password=&#39;&#39;,\n    redis_namespace=f\&quot;clonecut_openclaw_smoke_{int(time.time())}:\&quot;,\n    input_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;),\n    output_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;),\n    log_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;),\n    raw={\n        &#39;queue&#39;: {\n            &#39;max_retries&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;retry_backoff_seconds&#39;: [1],\n        },\n        &#39;worker&#39;: {\n            &#39;max_download_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;max_process_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;max_upload_workers&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;download_timeout_seconds&#39;: 30,\n            &#39;download_chunk_size&#39;: 4096,\n            &#39;use_internal_pipeline&#39;: True,\n            &#39;video_command_template&#39;: &#39;&#39;,\n            &#39;retry_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 0.2,\n            &#39;zombie_timeout_seconds&#39;: 60,\n            &#39;zombie_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 1,\n            &#39;forum_upload_enabled&#39;: False,\n        },\n    },\n)\n\nservice = WorkerService(cfg)\nservice.start()\napp = create_app(service)\nclient = app.test_client()\n\nsummary = {}\ntry:\n    with test_video.open(&#39;rb&#39;) as f:\n        response = client.post(\n            &#39;/api/tasks/upload-video&#39;,\n            data={\n                &#39;file&#39;: (f, &#39;test.mp4&#39;),\n                &#39;task_type&#39;: &#39;video&#39;,\n                &#39;clip_text&#39;: &#39;еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ&#39;,\n                &#39;stage5_model_name&#39;: &#39;yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4&#39;,\n            },\n            content_type=&#39;multipart/form-data&#39;,\n        )\n    upload_payload = response.get_json() or {}\n    if response.status_code != 201:\n        raise SystemExit(json.dumps({&#39;upload_status&#39;: response.status_code, &#39;payload&#39;: upload_payload}, ensure_ascii=False))\n\n    task_id = str(upload_payload.get(&#39;task_id&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()\n    if not task_id:\n        raise SystemExit(&#39;missing task_id from upload response&#39;)\n\n    final_task = {}\n    deadline = time.time() + 120\n    while time.time() &lt; deadline:\n        detail_resp = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}&#39;)\n        detail_payload = detail_resp.get_json() or {}\n        final_task = detail_payload.get(&#39;task&#39;) or {}\n        status = str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip().lower()\n        if status in {&#39;completed&#39;, &#39;failed&#39;, &#39;cancelled&#39;}:\n            break\n        time.sleep(0.2)\n\n    status = str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip().lower()\n    download_info = {}\n    if status == &#39;completed&#39;:\n        download_resp = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}/download&#39;)\n        download_path = tmp_root / &#39;downloaded_result.mp4&#39;\n        download_path.write_bytes(download_resp.data)\n        download_info = {\n            &#39;status_code&#39;: download_resp.status_code,\n            &#39;size_bytes&#39;: len(download_resp.data),\n            &#39;saved_to&#39;: str(download_path),\n        }\n    else:\n        download_info = {&#39;status_code&#39;: None, &#39;size_bytes&#39;: 0, &#39;saved_to&#39;: &#39;&#39;}\n\n    result = final_task.get(&#39;result&#39;) or {}\n    upload_result = result.get(&#39;upload&#39;) or {}\n    uploaded_path = str(upload_result.get(&#39;uploaded_path&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).strip()\n    uploaded_exists = Path(uploaded_path).exists() if uploaded_path else False\n\n    stage_dir = tmp_root / &#39;output&#39; / task_id / &#39;_stages&#39;\n    artifacts = []\n    if stage_dir.exists():\n        artifacts = sorted(str(p.relative_to(tmp_root)) for p in stage_dir.rglob(&#39;*&#39;) if p.is_file())\n\n    summary = {\n        &#39;task_id&#39;: task_id,\n        &#39;upload_response&#39;: upload_payload,\n        &#39;final_status&#39;: status,\n        &#39;error_message&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;error_message&#39;),\n        &#39;engine&#39;: result.get(&#39;engine&#39;),\n        &#39;executed_mode&#39;: result.get(&#39;executed_mode&#39;),\n        &#39;output_path&#39;: result.get(&#39;output_path&#39;),\n        &#39;named_output_path&#39;: result.get(&#39;named_output_path&#39;),\n        &#39;uploaded_path&#39;: uploaded_path,\n        &#39;uploaded_exists&#39;: uploaded_exists,\n        &#39;download&#39;: download_info,\n        &#39;artifacts&#39;: artifacts,\n    }\n    print(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\nfinally:\n    service.stop()\n&#39;@ | .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -&quot;,
Memory/07_reports\transcripts\codex\019d2453-7532-7590-8372-89da46658aee__737907ef.html:53106:  &quot;command&quot;: &quot;$env:CLONECUT_FORUM_UPLOAD_ENABLED=&#39;false&#39;; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL=&#39;http://127.0.0.1:18789/v1&#39;; $env:OPENAI_MODEL=&#39;openclaw&#39;; $env:OPENAI_BACKEND_MODEL=&#39;yunyi-codex/gpt-5.4&#39;; $env:OPENAI_API_KEY=(Get-Content D:\\openclaw_docker_state\\gateway_token.txt -Raw).Trim(); @&#39;\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport os\nimport shutil\nimport time\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom types import SimpleNamespace\n\nfrom apps.api.main import create_app\nfrom apps.worker.service import WorkerService\n\nrepo = Path(r&#39;D:\\clonecut&#39;)\ntest_video = repo / &#39;input&#39; / &#39;test.mp4&#39;\ntmp_root = repo / &#39;.tmp_openclaw_api_smoke_realtry&#39;\nif tmp_root.exists():\n    shutil.rmtree(tmp_root)\n(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nos.environ[&#39;CLONECUT_DB_PATH&#39;] = str(tmp_root / &#39;smoke.db&#39;)\n\ncfg = SimpleNamespace(\n    redis_host=&#39;127.0.0.1&#39;, redis_port=6379, redis_db=0, redis_password=&#39;&#39;,\n    redis_namespace=f\&quot;clonecut_openclaw_realtry_{int(time.time())}:\&quot;,\n    input_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;input&#39;), output_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;output&#39;), log_dir=str(tmp_root / &#39;logs&#39;),\n    raw={&#39;queue&#39;: {&#39;max_retries&#39;: 0, &#39;retry_backoff_seconds&#39;: [1]}, &#39;worker&#39;: {\n        &#39;max_download_workers&#39;: 1, &#39;max_process_workers&#39;: 1, &#39;max_upload_workers&#39;: 1,\n        &#39;use_internal_pipeline&#39;: True, &#39;forum_upload_enabled&#39;: False,\n        &#39;retry_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 0.2, &#39;zombie_timeout_seconds&#39;: 120, &#39;zombie_check_interval_seconds&#39;: 1,\n    }}\n)\nservice = WorkerService(cfg)\nservice.start()\napp = create_app(service)\nclient = app.test_client()\ntry:\n    with test_video.open(&#39;rb&#39;) as f:\n        resp = client.post(&#39;/api/tasks/upload-video&#39;, data={&#39;file&#39;: (f, &#39;test.mp4&#39;), &#39;task_type&#39;: &#39;video&#39;, &#39;clip_text&#39;: &#39;еҲ йҷӨйҮҚеӨҚе’ҢеҒңйЎҝ&#39;}, content_type=&#39;multipart/form-data&#39;)\n    payload = resp.get_json() or {}\n    task_id = payload[&#39;task_id&#39;]\n    deadline = time.time() + 300\n    final_task = {}\n    while time.time() &lt; deadline:\n        detail = client.get(f&#39;/api/tasks/{task_id}&#39;)\n        final_task = (detail.get_json() or {}).get(&#39;task&#39;) or {}\n        if str(final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;) or &#39;&#39;).lower() in {&#39;completed&#39;, &#39;failed&#39;, &#39;cancelled&#39;}:\n            break\n        time.sleep(0.2)\n    print(json.dumps({\n        &#39;task_id&#39;: task_id,\n        &#39;status&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;status&#39;),\n        &#39;error_message&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;error_message&#39;),\n        &#39;result&#39;: final_task.get(&#39;result&#39;),\n    }, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\nfinally:\n    service.stop()\n&#39;@ | .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -&quot;,

   13:     repo_root_text = str(repo_root)

   21: from apps.api.task_client import run_video_task
   22: 
   23: 
   24: def _parse_args(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> argparse.Namespace:
   25:     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Submit CloneCut video task and fetch canonical task_result payload")
   26:     parser.add_argument("--api-base", default="http://127.0.0.1:18100", help="CloneCut API base URL")
   27:     parser.add_argument("--file", required=True, help="Local video path to upload")
   28:     parser.add_argument("--api-token", default="", help="CloneCut API token, optional")
   29:     parser.add_argument("--api-token-env", default="CLONECUT_API_TOKEN", help="fallback env name for api token")
   30:     parser.add_argument("--task-id", default="", help="optional explicit task id")
   31:     parser.add_argument("--source", default="clonecut_task_client", help="task source marker")
   32:     parser.add_argument("--stage5-model-name", default="", help="stage5 model name or backend model id")
   33:     parser.add_argument("--clip-text", default="", help="optional explicit clip text override")
   34:     parser.add_argument("--post-url", default="", help="optional forum post url")
   35:     parser.add_argument("--no-wait", action="store_true", help="only submit task without polling result")
   36:     parser.add_argument("--submit-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=30.0, help="submit request timeout")
   37:     parser.add_argument("--wait-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=1800.0, help="poll total timeout")
   38:     parser.add_argument("--poll-interval-seconds", type=float, default=5.0, help="poll interval")
   39:     parser.add_argument("--request-timeout-seconds", type=float, default=15.0, help="single polling request timeout")
   40:     parser.add_argument("--output-json", default="", help="optional path to persist final json result")
   41:     return parser.parse_args(list(argv) if argv is not None else None)
   42: 
   43: 
   44: def main(argv: Iterable[str] | None = None) -> int:
   45:     args = _parse_args(argv)
   46:     api_token = str(args.api_token or "").strip() or str(os.getenv(args.api_token_env, "") or "").strip()
   47: 
   48:     extra_form: dict[str, str] = {}
   49:     if args.clip_text:
   50:         extra_form["clip_text"] = str(args.clip_text)
   51:     if args.post_url:
   52:         extra_form["post_url"] = str(args.post_url)
   53: 
   54:     payload = run_video_task(
   55:         api_base=args.api_base,
   56:         video_path=args.file,
   57:         api_token=api_token,
   58:         task_id=args.task_id,
   59:         source=args.source,
   60:         stage5_model_name=args.stage5_model_name,
   61:         extra_form=extra_form,
   62:         wait=not bool(args.no_wait),
   63:         submit_timeout_seconds=float(args.submit_timeout_seconds),
   64:         wait_timeout_seconds=float(args.wait_timeout_seconds),
   65:         poll_interval_seconds=float(args.poll_interval_seconds),
   66:         request_timeout_seconds=float(args.request_timeout_seconds),
   67:     )
   68:     text = json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   69:     print(text)
   70: 
   71:     output_json = str(args.output_json or "").strip()
   72:     if output_json:
   73:         output_path = Path(output_json).expanduser()
   74:         output_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
   75:         output_path.write_text(text, encoding="utf-8")
   76:     return 0
   77: 
   78: 
   79: if __name__ == "__main__":
   80:     raise SystemExit(main())

shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (G...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18125\n$apiPort = 18120\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction New-Proc($arguments, $stdoutLog, $extraEnv) {\n  $psi = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo\n  $psi.FileName = $py\n  foreach ($arg in $arguments) { [void]$psi.ArgumentList.Add([string]$arg) }\n  $psi.WorkingDirectory = $root\n  $psi.RedirectStandardOutput = $true\n  $psi.RedirectStandardError = $true\n  $psi.UseShellExecute = $false\n  $psi.CreateNoWindow = $true\n  foreach ($entry in [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariables().GetEnumerator()) {\n    $psi.Environment[[string]$entry.Key] = [string]$entry.Value\n  }\n  $psi.Environment['REDIS_NAMESPACE'] = $ns\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_DB_PATH'] = $dbPath\n  $psi.Environment['CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE'] = 'false'\n  $psi.Environment['PYTHONUTF8'] = '1'\n  foreach ($k in $extraEnv.Keys) { $psi.Environment[$k] = [string]$extraEnv[$k] }\n  $proc = New-Object System.Diagnostics.Process\n  $proc.StartInfo = $psi\n  $handler = {\n    param($sender, $eventArgs)\n    if ($eventArgs.Data) { Add-Content -LiteralPath $stdoutLog -Value $eventArgs.Data }\n  }\n  $proc.add_OutputDataReceived($handler)\n  $proc.add_ErrorDataReceived($handler)\n  [void]$proc.Start()\n  $proc.BeginOutputReadLine()\n  $proc.BeginErrorReadLine()\n  return $proc\n}\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) $workerLog @{}\n  $apiProc = New-Proc @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) $apiLog @{ 'CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER' = 'false' }\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText 'еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      $p.Kill()\n      $p.WaitForExit()\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

зңҹе®һ smoke з¬¬дёҖж¬ЎеҚЎеңЁеҗҜеҠЁи„ҡжң¬е…је®№жҖ§дёҠдәҶпјҢдёҚжҳҜдёҡеҠЎеӨұиҙҘпјҢжҳҜ PowerShell иҝҷиҫ№ ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList еңЁеҪ“еүҚзҺҜеўғйҮҢдёҚеҸҜз”ЁгҖӮжҲ‘жҚўеӣһд№ӢеүҚе·Із»Ҹи·‘йҖҡиҝҮзҡ„ Start-Process -Environment ж–№жЎҲз»§з»ӯеҒҡиҒ”и°ғпјҢдёҡеҠЎйӘҢиҜҒиҝҳеңЁжҺЁиҝӣгҖӮ

shell_command input={"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (G...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18125\n$apiPort = 18120\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$workerEnv = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n}\n$apiEnv = @{\n  REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n}\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $workerEnv\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -Environment $apiEnv\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText 'еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

{

'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18125\n$apiPort = 18120\n$workerLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.log'\n$apiLog = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$oldRedisNs = $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE\n$oldDbPath = $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH\n$oldTts = $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE\n$oldUtf8 = $env:PYTHONUTF8\n$oldApiStartWorker = $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  $env:PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerLog -RedirectStandardError $workerLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiLog -RedirectStandardError $apiLog -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText 'еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

{

$tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$oldRedisNs = $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE\n$oldDbPath = $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH\n$oldTts = $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE\n$oldUtf8 = $env:PYTHONUTF8\n$oldApiStartWorker = $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  $env:PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  $ready = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true }\n  $apiHealth = Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' }\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText 'еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  if (-not $taskId) { throw 'missing task_id from wrapper payload' }\n  $taskResult = $payload.result.task_result\n  if (-not $taskResult) { throw 'missing task_result from wrapper payload' }\n  $processingLog = $taskResult.outputs.processing_log\n  if (-not $processingLog) { throw 'processing_log missing from task_result.outputs' }\n\n  $resultPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/result\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $artifactsPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}/artifacts\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  $processingArtifact = $artifactsPayload.artifacts | Where-Object { $_.role -eq 'processing_log' } | Select-Object -First 1\n  if (-not $processingArtifact) { throw 'processing_log artifact missing from /artifacts' }\n  $downloadUrl = 'http://127.0.0.1:{0}{1}' -f $apiPort, [string]$processingArtifact.download_url\n  $downloadPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'downloaded_processing.log'\n  Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $downloadUrl -OutFile $downloadPath -UseBasicParsing\n  $logPreview = ((Get-Content -LiteralPath $downloadPath -TotalCount 12) -join \"`n\")\n\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    temp_root = $tempRoot\n    worker_ready = $ready.ready\n    worker_scope = $ready.scope\n    api_health = $apiHealth.service\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $taskResult.status\n    schema_version = $taskResult.schema_version\n    executed_mode = $taskResult.executed_mode\n    processing_log_filename = $processingLog.filename\n    processing_log_path = $processingLog.path\n    processing_log_relative_path = $processingLog.relative_path\n    render_manifest_processing = $resultPayload.task_result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    artifact_processing_id = $processingArtifact.artifact_id\n    log_download_bytes = (Get-Item -LiteralPath $downloadPath).Length\n    log_preview = $logPreview\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$root = 'D:\\clonecut'\n$py = Join-Path $root '.venv-p310\\Scripts\\python.exe'\n$tempRoot = Join-Path $root ('.tmp_log_smoke_detail_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $tempRoot -Force | Out-Null\n$inputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'input'\n$outputDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'output'\n$logDir = Join-Path $tempRoot 'logs'\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $inputDir,$outputDir,$logDir -Force | Out-Null\n$configSrc = Join-Path $root 'config\\settings.yaml.example'\n$configDst = Join-Path $tempRoot 'settings.smoke.yaml'\n$configText = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $configSrc\n$configText = $configText -replace 'input_dir: .*', ('input_dir: ' + ($inputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'output_dir: .*', ('output_dir: ' + ($outputDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'log_dir: .*', ('log_dir: ' + ($logDir -replace '\\\\','/'))\n$configText = $configText -replace 'forum_upload_enabled: true', 'forum_upload_enabled: false'\nSet-Content -LiteralPath $configDst -Value $configText -Encoding UTF8\n$dbPath = Join-Path $tempRoot 'smoke.db'\n$ns = 'clonecut_log_smoke_detail_20260329:' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N').Substring(0,8) + ':'\n$workerPort = 18127\n$apiPort = 18122\n$workerOut = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.out.log'\n$workerErr = Join-Path $tempRoot 'worker.err.log'\n$apiOut = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.out.log'\n$apiErr = Join-Path $tempRoot 'api.err.log'\n$videoPath = 'D:\\clonecut\\input\\test.mp4'\n$outputJson = Join-Path $tempRoot 'task_result.json'\nfunction Wait-Json($url, $timeoutSec, $predicate) {\n  $deadline = (Get-Date).AddSeconds($timeoutSec)\n  $last = $null\n  while ((Get-Date) -lt $deadline) {\n    try {\n      $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url -TimeoutSec 5\n      $last = $resp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 8\n      if (& $predicate $resp) { return $resp }\n    } catch {\n      $last = $_.Exception.Message\n    }\n    Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500\n  }\n  throw \"timeout waiting for $url last=$last\"\n}\n$oldRedisNs = $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE\n$oldDbPath = $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH\n$oldTts = $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE\n$oldUtf8 = $env:PYTHONUTF8\n$oldApiStartWorker = $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER\n$workerProc = $null\n$apiProc = $null\ntry {\n  $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $ns\n  $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $dbPath\n  $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = 'false'\n  $env:PYTHONUTF8 = '1'\n  Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n  $workerProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.worker.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$workerPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $workerOut -RedirectStandardError $workerErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n  $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = 'false'\n  $apiProc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList @('-m','apps.api.main','--config',$configDst,'--host','127.0.0.1','--port',$apiPort) -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $apiOut -RedirectStandardError $apiErr -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden\n\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/ready\" -f $workerPort) 60 { param($r) $r.ready -eq $true } | Out-Null\n  Wait-Json (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/health\" -f $apiPort) 60 { param($r) $r.status -eq 'ok' } | Out-Null\n\n  & (Join-Path $root 'scripts\\clonecut_run_video_task.ps1') -VideoPath $videoPath -ApiBase (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}\" -f $apiPort) -ClipText 'еҲ йҷӨеҸЈеӨҙзҰ…гҖҒйҮҚеӨҚзүҮж®өпјҢдҝқз•ҷдё»е№ІиЎЁиҫҫ' -OutputJson $outputJson\n  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'wrapper command failed' }\n\n  $payload = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $outputJson | ConvertFrom-Json\n  $taskId = [string]$payload.submit.task_id\n  $detailPayload = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri (\"http://127.0.0.1:{0}/api/tasks/{1}\" -f $apiPort, $taskId) -TimeoutSec 10\n  [pscustomobject]@{\n    task_id = $taskId\n    task_status = $detailPayload.task.status\n    manifest_log_processing = $detailPayload.task.result.render_manifest.logs.processing\n    outputs_processing_log_filename = $payload.result.task_result.outputs.processing_log.filename\n    outputs_processing_log_path = $payload.result.task_result.outputs.processing_log.path\n  } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8\n}\nfinally {\n  foreach ($p in @($apiProc, $workerProc)) {\n    if ($p -and -not $p.HasExited) {\n      Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force\n    }\n  }\n  if ($null -ne $oldRedisNs) { $env:REDIS_NAMESPACE = $oldRedisNs } else { Remove-Item Env:REDIS_NAMESPACE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldDbPath) { $env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH = $oldDbPath } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_DB_PATH -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldTts) { $env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE = $oldTts } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_TTS_ENABLE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldUtf8) { $env:PYTHONUTF8 = $oldUtf8 } else { Remove-Item Env:PYTHONUTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n  if ($null -ne $oldApiStartWorker) { $env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER = $oldApiStartWorker } else { Remove-Item Env:CLONECUT_API_START_WORKER -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }\n}\n",
  "workdir": "d:\\clonecut",
  "timeout_ms": 1800000
}

Tool Result #1500 shell_command call_88SAtFfHS0LHwcKOhaQenl6j exit 0 13:17:04
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: --- name: verification-before-completion description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing ...

Output:
---
name: verification-before-completion
description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always
---

# Verification Before Completion

## Overview

Claiming work is complete without verification is dishonesty, not efficiency.

**Core principle:** Evidence before claims, always.

**Violating the letter of this rule is violating the spirit of this rule.**

## The Iron Law

```
NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
```

If you haven't run the verification command in this message, you cannot claim it passes.

## The Gate Function

```
BEFORE claiming any status or expressing satisfaction:

1. IDENTIFY: What command proves this claim?
2. RUN: Execute the FULL command (fresh, complete)
3. READ: Full output, check exit code, count failures
4. VERIFY: Does output confirm the claim?
   - If NO: State actual status with evidence
   - If YES: State claim WITH evidence
5. ONLY THEN: Make the claim

Skip any step = lying, not verifying
```

## Common Failures

| Claim | Requires | Not Sufficient |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| Tests pass | Test command output: 0 failures | Previous run, "should pass" |
| Linter clean | Linter output: 0 errors | Partial check, extrapolation |
| Build succeeds | Build command: exit 0 | Linter passing, logs look good |
| Bug fixed | Test original symptom: passes | Code changed, assumed fixed |
| Regression test works | Red-green cycle verified | Test passes once |
| Agent completed | VCS diff shows changes | Agent reports "success" |
| Requirements met | Line-by-line checklist | Tests passing |

## Red Flags - STOP

- Using "should", "probably", "seems to"
- Expressing satisfaction before verification ("Great!", "Perfect!", "Done!", etc.)
- About to commit/push/PR without verification
- Trusting agent success reports
- Relying on partial verification
- Thinking "just this once"
- Tired and wanting work over
- **ANY wording implying success without having run verification**

## Rationalization Prevention

| Excuse | Reality |
|--------|---------|
| "Should work now" | RUN the verification |
| "I'm confident" | Confidence йҲ®?evidence |
| "Just this once" | No exceptions |
| "Linter passed" | Linter йҲ®?compiler |
| "Agent said success" | Verify independently |
| "I'm tired" | Exhaustion йҲ®?excuse |
| "Partial check is enough" | Partial proves nothing |
| "Different words so rule doesn't apply" | Spirit over letter |

## Key Patterns

**Tests:**
```
йүҒ?[Run test command] [See: 34/34 pass] "All tests pass"
йүӮ?"Should pass now" / "Looks correct"
```

**Regression tests (TDD Red-Green):**
```
йүҒ?Write йҲ«?Run (pass) йҲ«?Revert fix йҲ«?Run (MUST FAIL) йҲ«?Restore йҲ«?Run (pass)
йүӮ?"I've written a regression test" (without red-green verification)
```

**Build:**
```
йүҒ?[Run build] [See: exit 0] "Build passes"
йүӮ?"Linter passed" (linter doesn't check compilation)
```

**Requirements:**
```
йүҒ?Re-read plan йҲ«?Create checklist йҲ«?Verify each йҲ«?Report gaps or completion
йүӮ?"Tests pass, phase complete"
```

**Agent delegation:**
```
йүҒ?Agent reports success йҲ«?Check VCS diff йҲ«?Verify changes йҲ«?Report actual state
йүӮ?Trust agent report
```

## Why This Matters

From 24 failure memories:
- your human partner said "I don't believe you" - trust broken
- Undefined functions shipped - would crash
- Missing requirements shipped - incomplete features
- Time wasted on false completion йҲ«?redirect йҲ«?rework
- Violates: "Honesty is a core value. If you lie, you'll be replaced."

## When To Apply

**ALWAYS before:**
- ANY variation of success/completion claims
- ANY expression of satisfaction
- ANY positive statement about work state
- Committing, PR creation, task completion
- Moving to next task
- Delegating to agents

**Rule applies to:**
- Exact phrases
- Paraphrases and synonyms
- Implications of success
- ANY communication suggesting completion/correctness

## The Bottom Line

**No shortcuts for verification.**

Run the command. Read the output. THEN claim the result.

This is non-negotiable.
Tool Result #1501 shell_command call_AldOija5n0g61tfqboC117ck exit 0 13:17:04
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: --- name: requesting-code-review description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify wor...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
---
name: requesting-code-review
description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements
---

# Requesting Code Review

Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent to catch issues before they cascade. The reviewer gets precisely crafted context for evaluation йҲҘ?never your session's history. This keeps the reviewer focused on the work product, not your thought process, and preserves your own context for continued work.

**Core principle:** Review early, review often.

## When to Request Review

**Mandatory:**
- After each task in subagent-driven development
- After completing major feature
- Before merge to main

**Optional but valuable:**
- When stuck (fresh perspective)
- Before refactoring (baseline check)
- After fixing complex bug

## How to Request

**1. Get git SHAs:**
```bash
BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD~1)  # or origin/main
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
```

**2. Dispatch code-reviewer subagent:**

Use Task tool with superpowers:code-reviewer type, fill template at `code-reviewer.md`

**Placeholders:**
- `{WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED}` - What you just built
- `{PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS}` - What it should do
- `{BASE_SHA}` - Starting commit
- `{HEAD_SHA}` - Ending commit
- `{DESCRIPTION}` - Brief summary

**3. Act on feedback:**
- Fix Critical issues immediately
- Fix Important issues before proceeding
- Note Minor issues for later
- Push back if reviewer is wrong (with reasoning)

## Example

```
[Just completed Task 2: Add verification function]

You: Let me request code review before proceeding.

BASE_SHA=$(git log --oneline | grep "Task 1" | head -1 | awk '{print $1}')
HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)

[Dispatch superpowers:code-reviewer subagent]
  WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED: Verification and repair functions for conversation index
  PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS: Task 2 from docs/superpowers/plans/deployment-plan.md
  BASE_SHA: a7981ec
  HEAD_SHA: 3df7661
  DESCRIPTION: Added verifyIndex() and repairIndex() with 4 issue types

[Subagent returns]:
  Strengths: Clean architecture, real tests
  Issues:
    Important: Missing progress indicators
    Minor: Magic number (100) for reporting interval
  Assessment: Ready to proceed

You: [Fix progress indicators]
[Continue to Task 3]
```

## Integration with Workflows

**Subagent-Driven Development:**
- Review after EACH task
- Catch issues before they compound
- Fix before moving to next task

**Executing Plans:**
- Review after each batch (3 tasks)
- Get feedback, apply, continue

**Ad-Hoc Development:**
- Review before merge
- Review when stuck

## Red Flags

**Never:**
- Skip review because "it's simple"
- Ignore Critical issues
- Proceed with unfixed Important issues
- Argue with valid technical feedback

**If reviewer wrong:**
- Push back with technical reasoning
- Show code/tests that prove it works
- Request clarification

See template at: requesting-code-review/code-reviewer.md

 import time
 from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Tuple

@@ -77,6 +77,17 @@ INTERNAL_PIPELINE_COMPLETION_BY_STAGE: dict[str, tuple[int, str]] = {
 }
 
 
+class _TaskThreadLogFilter(logging.Filter):
+    def __init__(self, *, task_id: str, thread_id: int) -> None:
+        super().__init__()
+        self.task_id = task_id
+        self.thread_id = thread_id
+
+    def filter(self, record: logging.LogRecord) -> bool:
+        record.clonecut_task_id = self.task_id
+        return int(getattr(record, "thread", -1)) == self.thread_id
+
+
 class WorkerService:
     def __init__(self, config: Any, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None) -> None:
         self.config = config
@@ -1498,89 +1509,184 @@ class WorkerService:
         with self._video_pipeline_runtime_lock:
             return self._video_pipeline_runtime
 
+    def _start_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        task: UnifiedTask,
+        task_dir: Path,
+    ) -> Tuple[Path, logging.Handler, List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]]]:
+        logs_dir = task_dir / "logs"
+        logs_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
+        log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}.log"
+        counter = 1
+        while log_path.exists():
+            log_path = logs_dir / f"funclip_{timestamp}_{counter}.log"
+            counter += 1
+
+        handler = logging.FileHandler(log_path, encoding="utf-8")
+        handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+        handler.addFilter(_TaskThreadLogFilter(task_id=task.task_id, thread_id=get_ident()))
+        handler.setFormatter(
+            logging.Formatter(
+                "%(asctime)s | %(levelname)-8s | task=%(clonecut_task_id)s | %(name)s | %(message)s",
+                datefmt="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S",
+            )
+        )
+
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]] = []
+        for logger_name in ("", "clonecut"):
+            target_logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
+            previous_level = int(target_logger.level)
+            logger_states.append((target_logger, previous_level))
+            if previous_level == logging.NOTSET or previous_level > logging.INFO:
+                target_logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+        logging.getLogger().addHandler(handler)
+        return log_path, handler, logger_states
+
+    def _stop_task_processing_log(
+        self,
+        *,
+        handler: Optional[logging.Handler],
+        logger_states: List[Tuple[logging.Logger, int]],
+    ) -> None:
+        if handler is not None:
+            root_logger = logging.getLogger()
+            try:
+                root_logger.removeHandler(handler)
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+            try:
+                handler.close()
+            except Exception:
+                pass
+
+        for target_logger, previous_level in reversed(logger_states):
+            try:
+                target_logger.setLevel(previous_level)
+            except Exception:
+                continue
+

         task_dir = Path(self.config.output_dir) / task.task_id
         task_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
         source = Path(source_path)

diff --git a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
index 9798502..78f42d7 100644
--- a/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
+++ b/tests/unit/test_worker_service.py
@@ -480,6 +480,85 @@ def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_preserves_user_clip_text_into_sta
     )
 
 
+def test_internal_pipeline_real_video_pipeline_emits_task_processing_log_artifact(
+    monkeypatch, tmp_path
+) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+    monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_internal_task_log.db"))
+    cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)
+    cfg.raw["worker"]["use_internal_pipeline"] = True
+    service = WorkerService(cfg)
+
+    source = tmp_path / "real-pipeline-log-source.mp4"
+    source.write_bytes(b"video-content" * 128)
+    task = UnifiedTask(
+        task_id="real-pipeline-task-log-1",
+        task_type=TaskType.VIDEO,
+        source="unit",
+        source_path=str(source),
+        metadata={"source": "unit", "forum_post_info": {"thread_id": "123"}},
+    )
+
+    final_output = Path(cfg.output_dir) / task.task_id / "final.mp4"
+
+    def passthrough_stage(input_video, output_dir, task_id, *args, **kwargs):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = output_dir
+        _ = task_id
+        _ = args
+        _ = kwargs
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(input_video))
+
+    def finalize_stage9(
+        input_video,
+        *,
+        output_dir,
+        task_id,
+        keep_intermediate_files=False,
+        forum_post_info=None,
+        original_filename="",
+    ):  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
+        _ = input_video
+        _ = keep_intermediate_files
+        _ = forum_post_info
+        _ = original_filename
+        final_output.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+        final_output.write_bytes(b"final-video")
+        return StageResult(success=True, output_file=str(final_output))
+
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage0_clean", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage1_transcode", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage2_silence", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage3_repair", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage4_asr", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage5_ai_text", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_clip", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage6_5_resub", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_correct", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage7_subtitle", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage8_cover", passthrough_stage)
+    monkeypatch.setattr(video_pipeline_module, "run_stage9_organize", finalize_stage9)
+
+    raw_result = service._run_internal_video_pipeline(task, str(source))
+    result = service._attach_video_render_manifest(task, raw_result)
+
+    artifacts = result.get("artifacts") or []
+    roles = {str(item.get("role")): item for item in artifacts}
+    assert "processing_log" in roles
+    processing_log = roles["processing_log"]
+    relative_path = str(processing_log.get("relative_path") or "").replace("\\", "/")
+    assert relative_path.startswith("logs/")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").startswith("funclip_")
+    assert str(processing_log.get("filename") or "").endswith(".log")
+
+    render_manifest = result.get("render_manifest") or {}
+    logs = render_manifest.get("logs") or {}
+    assert logs.get("processing") == processing_log.get("artifact_id")
+
+    log_text = Path(str(processing_log.get("path"))).read_text(encoding="utf-8")
+    assert "internal video pipeline started" in log_text
+    assert task.task_id in log_text
+    assert "stage9_organize" in log_text
+
+
 def test_attach_video_render_manifest_collects_primary_subtitle_cover_and_state(monkeypatch, tmp_path) -> None:  # type: ignore[no-untyped-def]
     monkeypatch.setenv("CLONECUT_DB_PATH", str(tmp_path / "clonecut_render_manifest.db"))
     cfg = _build_config(tmp_path)

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: d:\clonecut\Memory\02_todos\todo_goal_v2_v5.md
+# йЎ№зӣ®еҫ…еҠһ
+
+## з»‘е®ҡдҝЎжҒҜ
+- зӣ®ж ҮзүҲжң¬: goal_v2
+- еҫ…еҠһзүҲжң¬: v2_5
+- еҲӣе»әж—Ҙжңҹ: 2026-03-29
+- зҠ¶жҖҒ: еҪ“еүҚз”ҹж•Ҳ
+
+## еҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өз»“и®ә
+- дё»й“ҫж”¶еҸЈеҹәжң¬е®ҢжҲҗпјҢеҪ“еүҚе·Ід»ҺвҖңдё»й“ҫе»әи®ҫжңҹвҖқиҪ¬е…ҘвҖңе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢжңҹвҖқгҖӮ
+- еҪ“еүҚдёҚжҳҜвҖңиҝҳиғҪдёҚиғҪи·‘вҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өпјҢиҖҢжҳҜвҖңжҠҠиҫ№з•ҢиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘйҪҗпјҢи®©жӣҙеӨҡе№іеҸ°жҢүеҗҢдёҖж ҮеҮҶжҺҘе…ҘвҖқзҡ„йҳ¶ж®өгҖӮ
+- ж–№жЎҲBз»§з»ӯдҝқжҢҒзЎ¬еҲҮеҸЈеҫ„пјҡдёҚжҒўеӨҚ `openclaw_*` е…је®№еҲ«еҗҚпјҢдёҚжҒўеӨҚж—§ adapter/runner еӣһеҲ°дё»и·Ҝеҫ„гҖӮ
+- жҲӘиҮі 2026-03-29 жҷҡй—ҙпјҢе®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw smoke checklist е·ІиЎҘи·‘йҖҡиҝҮпјӣдё»й“ҫгҖҒcanonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖҒе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺдёҺзңҹе®һиҒ”и°ғз»“жһңе·ІеҪўжҲҗй—ӯзҺҜгҖӮ
+- жҲӘиҮі 2026-03-29 21:16пјҢд»»еҠЎзә§ `processing_log` е·ІжҢү task-local artifact ж–№ејҸиЎҘйҪҗпјҢзңҹе®һ smoke е·ІйӘҢиҜҒ `task_result.outputs.processing_log`гҖҒ`/api/tasks/<task_id>` дёӢ `render_manifest.logs.processing` дёҺж—Ҙеҝ—дёӢиҪҪй“ҫи·ҜеқҮеҸҜз”ЁгҖӮ
+
+## е·Іе®ҢжҲҗ
+- `domain/video/stages/` е·ІжҒўеӨҚгҖӮ
+- worker йҖҡз”Ёи§Ҷйў‘дё»и·Ҝеҫ„е·ІеҲҮеҲ° `VideoPipeline`гҖӮ
+- worker еёёй©»иө„жәҗжІ»зҗҶгҖҒ`ready gate`гҖҒе№¶еҸ‘йҷҗеҲ¶е·ІиҗҪең°гҖӮ
+- canonical API/CLI е·ІиҗҪең°пјҡ`apps/api/task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_task_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/clonecut_run_video_task.ps1`гҖӮ
+- canonical з»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·Іеӣәе®ҡдёә `task_result` + `render_manifest`пјҢз»“жһңжҺҘеҸЈдёә `/api/tasks/<task_id>/result`гҖӮ
+- OpenClaw е·ІеҲҮеҲ° canonical е…ҘеҸЈгҖӮ
+- `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` зҡ„ canonical CLI е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+- OpenClaw helper е®һзғҹе·ІйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+- `/ready` е·ІжҳҺзЎ®дёә `scope=video_pipeline`гҖӮ
+- Phase 8 ж—§ `pre` дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе·Іе®ҢжҲҗгҖӮ
+- `adapters/video_pipeline/`гҖҒ`apps/api/openclaw_client.py`гҖҒ`scripts/openclaw_*` зӯүж—§е…ҘеҸЈе·ІдёӢзәҝгҖӮ
+- focused suite е·ІйҖҡиҝҮпјҢдё»й“ҫдёҺз»“жһңеҘ‘зәҰе·ІжңүзЁіе®ҡйӘҢиҜҒеҹәзәҝгҖӮ
+- д»»еҠЎзә§ `processing_log` е·ІиҗҪең°дёә `output/<task_id>/logs/funclip_*.log`пјҢе№¶йҡҸ `artifacts` / `render_manifest` / `task_result.outputs.processing_log` зЁіе®ҡжҡҙйңІгҖӮ
+
+## еҪ“еүҚиҝӣиЎҢдёӯ
+- еҪ“еүҚдё»й“ҫгҖҒе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺгҖҒsmoke checklist дёҺд»»еҠЎзә§ж—Ҙеҝ—еҘ‘зәҰе·Іе…ЁйғЁж”¶еҸЈпјӣеҰӮз»§з»ӯжҺЁиҝӣпјҢдёӢдёҖжӯҘиҝӣе…ҘеҗҺзҪ®еўһејәеҠҹиғҪгҖӮ
+
+## еҫ…е®ҢжҲҗ
+- иҝӣе…ҘеҗҺзҪ®еўһејәеҠҹиғҪи®ҫи®ЎдёҺжҺ’жңҹгҖӮ
+
+## еҗҺзҪ®дјҳеҢ–еҫ…еҠһ
+- `fast` / `standard` / `full`
+- иҮӘз„¶иҜӯиЁҖеҲ°з»“жһ„еҢ–жү§иЎҢйҖүйЎ№жҳ е°„
+- вҖңеҸӘеүӘиҫ‘ / еӯ—е№• / е°ҒйқўвҖқиғҪеҠӣиЎЁиҫҫеұӮ
+- е°Ғйқўж Үйўҳзӯ–з•Ҙз»ҶеҢ–
+- жӣҙз»ҶзІ’еәҰжҖ§иғҪжҢҮж ҮдёҺжү№еӨ„зҗҶдјҳеҢ–
+
+## еҸҳжӣҙи®°еҪ•
+- 2026-03-29: ж–№жЎҲBдё»й“ҫе®ҢжҲҗзЎ¬еҲҮеҗҢжӯҘпјҢworkerгҖҒcanonical API/CLIгҖҒ`task_result` еҘ‘зәҰгҖҒOpenClaw жҺҘе…ҘдёҺж—§дё»й“ҫиҝҗиЎҢж—¶дҫқиө–жё…зҗҶе…ЁйғЁеҜ№йҪҗпјӣеҪ“еүҚйҳ¶ж®өеҲҮжҚўдёәе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺиЎҘе®ҢгҖӮ
+- 2026-03-29: иЎҘеӣһ `domain/video/asr` е…је®№жЁЎеқ—д»Ҙи·‘йҖҡ `test_asr_engine_factory.py` / `test_funasr_engine.py`пјҢе№¶иЎҘйҪҗе№іеҸ°йҖӮй…ҚиҜҙжҳҺдёӯзҡ„иҝҗиЎҢзҺҜеўғжҺҘе…ҘдёҺеӨұиҙҘеҸҜи§ӮжөӢжҖ§еҸЈеҫ„гҖӮ
+- 2026-03-29: иЎҘи·‘е®Ңж•ҙ OpenClaw smoke checklistпјӣ`/health`гҖҒ`/ready`гҖҒPowerShell wrapperгҖҒNode/OpenClaw helperгҖҒд»»еҠЎиҜҰжғ…гҖҒartifacts еҲ—иЎЁдёҺжҲҗзүҮ/еӯ—е№•/е°ҒйқўдёӢиҪҪеқҮйӘҢиҜҒйҖҡиҝҮгҖӮ
+- 2026-03-29: иЎҘйҪҗд»»еҠЎзә§ `processing_log` иҫ“еҮәдёҺ stage зә§иҝҗиЎҢж—Ҙеҝ—пјӣзңҹе®һ smoke йӘҢиҜҒ `task_result.outputs.processing_log`гҖҒ`render_manifest.logs.processing` дёҺ processing log artifact дёӢиҪҪй“ҫи·Ҝе…ЁйғЁеҸҜз”ЁгҖӮ
*** End Patch

*** Add File: d:\clonecut\Memory\03_chat_logs\2026-03-29_211718.md
+# 2026-03-29 21:17:18 дјҡиҜқи®°еҪ•
+
+---
+ж—¶й—ҙ: 2026-03-29 21:17:18
+з”ЁжҲ·: жҢҮеҮәеҪ“еүҚ canonical з»“жһңйҮҢжІЎжңүе®Ңж•ҙж—Ҙеҝ—дёҚеҸҜжҺҘеҸ—пјҢиҰҒжұӮиЎҘйҪҗвҖңе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„гҖҒжңҖдҪіе®һи·өзҡ„ logвҖқгҖӮ
+еҠ©жүӢ: е…ҲжҢү MemoryTree иҜ»еҸ–еҪ“еүҚ goal/todo/chat зҠ¶жҖҒпјҢйҡҸеҗҺз”Ё `systematic-debugging` + `test-driven-development` иҝҪжҹҘж №еӣ пјҢзЎ®и®Өе№¶дёҚжҳҜ `task_result` / `render_manifest` жҳ е°„зјәеӨұпјҢиҖҢжҳҜеҶ…йғЁи§Ҷйў‘дё»й“ҫзңҹе®һиҝҗиЎҢж—¶жІЎжңүжҠҠеӨ„зҗҶж—Ҙеҝ—иҗҪеҲ°д»»еҠЎзӣ®еҪ•пјҢеҜјиҮҙ artifact ж”¶йӣҶй“ҫи·ҜжӢҝдёҚеҲ° `processing_log`гҖӮе…ҲеңЁ `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py` ж–°еўһзңҹе®һ internal pipeline иҝҗиЎҢеҗҺеҝ…йЎ»иҮӘеҠЁдә§еҮә `processing_log` artifact зҡ„еӨұиҙҘжөӢиҜ•пјҢеҶҚеңЁ `apps/worker/service.py` дёәжҜҸдёӘи§Ҷйў‘д»»еҠЎжҢӮжҺҘзәҝзЁӢйҡ”зҰ»зҡ„ task-local file handlerпјҢжҠҠж—Ҙеҝ—еҶҷе…Ҙ `output/<task_id>/logs/funclip_*.log`пјӣеҗҢж—¶еңЁ `domain/video/pipeline.py` иЎҘе…… pipeline run / stage start / stage completed / stage failed зҡ„жҳҫејҸж—Ҙеҝ—дәӢд»¶гҖӮйҡҸеҗҺйӘҢиҜҒ `tests/unit/test_worker_service.py` е…ЁйҮҸ 33 дҫӢйҖҡиҝҮгҖҒ`tests/integration/test_api_task_management.py` е…ЁйҮҸ 7 дҫӢйҖҡиҝҮпјӣе№¶дёӨж¬ЎеҜ№ `D:\clonecut\input\test.mp4` и·‘зңҹе®һ smokeпјҢзЎ®и®Ө `task_result.outputs.processing_log` йқһз©әгҖҒ`/api/tasks/<task_id>` дёӢ `render_manifest.logs.processing` дёә `processing_log`гҖҒ`/api/tasks/<task_id>/artifacts` дёӯеӯҳеңЁ `processing_log` artifact дё”ж—Ҙеҝ—дёӢиҪҪжҲҗеҠҹгҖӮзңҹе®һ smoke д»»еҠЎеҸ·еҲҶеҲ«дёә `59db0202-a915-42e1-9ade-f5eeef0c4d53` дёҺ `ecad4ee7-771a-47bc-ba97-efc318311f99`гҖӮ
*** End Patch
